properties.Description: On 15 February 2022, Israeli military forces demolish a water well and a house in Khallat al Mayyah village, Hebron, West Bank, to evict the Palestinian residents from the area.

properties.Title: Saudi-led air raids on a water drilling rig in Yemen kills one and injures two
properties.Description: Saudi-led coalition air raids strike a water rig in As Safiyah, Al Jawf, Yemen, killing 1 laborer and injuring 2 more.

properties.Title: Violence over access to water in Sanaa, Yemen results in one death and one injury
properties.Description: Bani Habar tribesmen attack and clash with Bani Buays tribesmen in Arhab, Sanaa, Yemen, over the control of a water source. The clash results in 1 fatality and 1 injury.

properties.Title: Militants destroy water pumps in Burkina Faso
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'at Nusrat al Islam wal Muslimin militants destroy three water pumps in the village of Singtanga, Sanmatenga, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: An explosive planted at a Syrian water tank kills one and destroys the tank
properties.Description: An explosive planted by an unknown group explodes at a Syrian state water tank in Al Baghala, Homs, destroying it and killing one soldier.

properties.Title: Militants destroy water company machinery in Burkina Faso
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'at Nusrat al Islam wal Muslimin militants destroy national water company machinery in the town of Djibo, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: Palestinian and Israelis clash in the West Bank after soldiers prevent Palestinians from digging a water well near Jenin
properties.Description: Palestinian rioters clash with Israeli military forces during a raid in Dhaher al-Abed, Jenin, West Bank, after soldiers attempted to prevent Palestinians from digging a water well.

properties.Title: Violence reported between pastoralists and farmers over access to water sources and land near Chomboro in South Sudan
properties.Description: Armed pastoralists, possibly Bor Dinka, fire upon Lokoya children bathing at a water source in the area of Chomboro, Eastern Equatoria state, South Sudan, wounding one. A local official has claimed that 2,810 people were displaced from the area, in heightened tensions between pastoralists from Jonglei state and residents in parts of Eastern Equatoria state over water and land.

properties.Title: Ukrainians flood lands north of Kyiv in an effort to stop an armored assault on Ukraine's capital
properties.Description: In late February 2022 at the start of the expanded Russia-Ukraine war, the Ukraine military intentionally flood lands north of the capital, Kyiv, by destroying a hydraulic structure near Kazarovichi village. This leads to the inundation of the floodplain of the Irpin River with water from the Kyivski Reservoir, helping to stop a Russian armored assault.
properties.Sources: Gleick et al. 2023; Mundy 2019; Kucharski 2022; Kramer 2022

properties.Title: Conflict over use of government-controlled water pipeline in India leads to violence
properties.Description: Three rioters assault a female Sarpanch, head of the Panchayat, and her family members in Gunga village, Madhya Pradesh, India, after she warned the rioters for misusing a government water pipeline.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers flood Palestinian lands near Majdulim in the West Bank with sewage and wastewater
properties.Description: Israeli settlers from Majdulim settlement, West Bank flood Palestinian-owned lands with sewage and wastewater, causing material damages.

properties.Title: Russian forces attack Siverskyi Donets-Donbas water pipeline
properties.Description: Russian forces attack the Siverskyi Donets-Donbas water pipeline providing water to the city of Donetsk, February 2022.

properties.Title: Violence over a water project in Kassala, Sudan kills two and wounds seven.
properties.Description: In the city of Kassala, Sudan, a violent incident at the end of March results in two deaths and seven injured in a conflict over a water project. Authorities impose a security cordon around the affected area and arrested eight alleged perpetrators and on April 6, negotiators sign an accord between the Beni Amer, Habab, and Sibarat tribes to put an end to the conflict.

properties.Title: Russians bomb water supply system in Kherson, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russians bomb water supply system in Kherson, Ukraine, March 1, 2022.

properties.Title: Violent demonstrations in Brazil over water shortages
properties.Description: Violent protests in Esmeraldas, Minas Gerais, and Serra, Espirito Santo, Brazil, with burning obstacles in protests against a shortage in water supply. One demonstrator is reported injured.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID.  BRA51402, BRA51428

properties.Title: Extensive French protests and sabotage of water basin in a protest against agricultural and industrial water use during drought
properties.Description: During March 2022, numerous groups, including the 'Executive Committee of Regional Water Protection,' the collective 'Stop Bassines,' and the Peasant Confederation protest the creation of water basins for industrial agricultural irrigation. Various protests, including between 5000 and 7000 people near the end of March, sabotage water basins and damage pump stations in Nouaille-Maupertuis and La Ro
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. FRA16071, FRA16070, FRA16603

properties.Title: Russian forces shell Kharkiv water systems, with numerous deaths reported
properties.Description: On 7 March 2022, Russian military forces shell the city of Kharkiv destroying energy facilities, pipelines, and water systems. Numerous civilians as well as servicemen are reported wounded and killed.

properties.Title: An attempt to divert water on the Mahakali River at the Nepal-Indian border is met with violence extending over several weeks
properties.Description: An attempt to divert water on the Mahakali River at the Nepal-Indian border because of construction is met with violence in Khalanga town, Darchula district, Nepal. The dispute extends over several weeks.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. NEP14812, NEP10091

properties.Title: Attack on water pumps and systems in Burkina Faso, with seven reported deaths
properties.Description: Ongoing violence between presumed Jama'at Nusrat al Islam wal Muslimin militants and volunteer fighters in Burkina Faso, with extensive sabotage of water systems. On March 14, at least seven people are reported killed in Arbinda, with violence also in the town of Djibo.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID.  BFO6755, BFO6811

properties.Title: Houthi forces attack water infrastructure in Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces in Yemen target water infrastructure in Al Haymah, Al Hudaydah, Yemen damaging it.

properties.Title: Clash in Madhya Pradesh, India over communal water resources
properties.Description: Two groups of villagers clash in Nowgong, Madhya Pradesh, India, over communal water resources.

properties.Title: Israeli military and settlers destroy Palestinian water systems in Birin, Hebron in the West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces and Israeli settlers destroy a water network and water tanks and confiscated water pumps and electrical cables belonging to a Palestinian in Birin village, Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: Violent demonstration over lack of potable water in Peru
properties.Description: Residents of at least ten settlements of Veintiseis de Octubre in Peru, damage the offices of the EPS Grau potable water company to complain about the lack of potable water services.

properties.Title: The Russian military bombs a water pumping plant in Chernihiv, Ukraine, killing four
properties.Description: The Russian military bombs one of the Chernihiv pumping stations, March 14, 2022. Four people, including station employees, are killed.

properties.Title: Destruction of the sewage treatment plant in Vasylivka leads to contamination in the Kakhovske reservoir
properties.Description: The Russian destruction of the sewage treatment plant in March 2022 at the town of Vasylivka in Zaporizhzhia oblast leads to sewage contamination of the Kakhovske Reservoir.
properties.Sources: Gleick et al. 2023; Shevchuk et al. 2022; Interfax Ukraine 2022

properties.Title: Russian missile attack damages a water-supply plant and kills two in Sievierodonetsk, Luhansk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces clash with Ukrainian forces in Sievierodonetsk, Luhansk. Russian forces fire Grad missiles, damaging a water-supply plant. Two people die, four are wounded.

properties.Title: Dispute over irrigation water leads to 10 injuries in Bangladesh
properties.Description: At least 10 people are injured in a clash between two groups from villages of Kaishalarbagh and Bagabaria in Sonaimuri upazila, Noakhali, Bangladesh over canal water dispute.

properties.Title: Houthi forces attack water supply and desalination infrastructure in a series of missile attacks on Saudi Arabia
properties.Description: In a series of attacks, Houthi forces fire cruise missiles at Saudi Arabia's Ash Shuqayq Water Desalination Plant, Ad Darb, Jizan, and at the National Water Company in Dhahran Al Janub, causing damages to both facilities.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. SAU23182, SAU23191

properties.Title: Deaths and injuries during a clash in Sudan over a water project on the Atbara River
properties.Description: Two unspecified clan militias clash in El Birma area, Aroma, Sudan, over a water project on the Atbara River. Two people are killed and seven others  injured.

properties.Title: Russian missile attack on an oil depot in Kalynivka, Ukraine contaminates water resources
properties.Description: A Russian missile attack on an oil depot in Kalynivka, Ukraine leads to water contamination at a fish farm and pond about 30 kilometers (about 18 miles) southwest of Kyiv, also threatening the Irpin River (March 2022).

properties.Title: Russian forces cut off access to water and electricity to the city of Sievierodonetsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces destroy electricity and water lines near Sievierodonetsk, Luhansk. Severodonetsk is cut off from access to electricity and water.

properties.Title: Bomb blast in Myanmar at drinking water tank
properties.Description: Bomb blast in Pyapon, Ayeyarwady, Myanmar at drinking water tank.

properties.Title: Gates on the dam on the Oskil reservoir are destroyed, causing flooding in Svyatogorsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: In April 2022, gates of the dam on the Oskil reservoir in the Kharkiv area are destroyed, releasing water from the reservoir and causing the level of the Siverskyi Donets River to rise, flooding Svyatogorsk. The reservoir provided water for the Donbas region.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers vandalize water tanks in Birin, Hebron, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers set fire to building supplies and vandalize water tanks belonging to Palestinians in Birin (Hebron, West Bank).

properties.Title: Activists protest in  Angola against the lack of water
properties.Description: Activists protest in Lobito, Angola, against the lack of water in the city. Police arrest seven activists and reportedly beat them.

properties.Title: At least one death and multiple injuries reported in ongoing clashes in Sanaa, Yemen, over control of a water source
properties.Description: In extended clashes, Bani Buays and Bani Habar tribesmen fight in Bani Ahkam, Sanaa, Yemen, over the control of a water source, killing at least one and injuring four.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. YEM74752, YEM74753

properties.Title: Protest in Guatemala City, Guatemala with blocked roads and a violent confrontation with police over lack of water services
properties.Description: People in Guatemala City, Guatemala, block roads to demand reconnection of water services in their communities, protesting they've been ignored by the water company. Violence occurs when police arrive to evict demonstrators.

properties.Title: Residents of Ibague, Colombia, protest against a water cut and the lack of drinking water supply
properties.Description: Residents of La Pola neighborhood, Ibague, Colombia, protest against a water cut and the lack of drinking water supply for weeks, demanding the reconnection of services. At least one injury reported.

properties.Title: South Sudanese refugees are attacked at Um Sangour, Sudan, in a dispute over access to the waters of the Nile
properties.Description: South Sudanese refugees are attacked by local residents at Um Sangour camp, White Nile state, Sudan, in a dispute over access to the waters of the Nile. Gunshots are fired in the air, with property, including a school, destroyed and looted, with no precise information on casualties.

properties.Title: Demonstrations and vandalism of a major water tunnel project in Nepal over concern about local water supplies
properties.Description: Local demonstrations against the Dahchok-Sisnekhola Tunnel project in Chandragiri, Nepal, over concern it has dried up the local drinking water include vandalization of the offices of the Nagdhunga Tunnel Project.

properties.Title: Russia is blamed for deliberately cutting off the water supply to Mykolaiv city
properties.Description: Russian forces are blamed for deliberately cutting off the water supply of Mykolaiv in April by sabotaging the water pipeline from the Dnipro River, based on satellite imagery and data from intelligence sources.

properties.Title: Several towns in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine lose water services due to attacks
properties.Description: Russian attacks leave the towns Huliaipole and Stepnohirsk in the Zaporizhzhia region without water services (April). The town of Polohy is partly without water services. No wastewater treatment is available in Vasylivka and Stepnohirsk due to damage to water systems.

properties.Title: Water supply for five towns in the Luhansk region of Ukraine is cut off
properties.Description: Water supply for five towns in the Luhansk region is cut off in April, including Rubizhne, Popasna, Hirske, Sievierodonetsk, and part of Lysychansk.

properties.Title: Many towns in Donetsk, Ukraine are cut off from water supplies during the Russia-Ukraine war
properties.Description: 37 towns in the Donetsk are cut off from water supplies; 27 water-supply systems are damaged; 40 percent of the water-supply system in Mariupol is damaged (April).

properties.Title: One killed; one injured in dispute over access to canal water in Haryana, India
properties.Description: A dispute over access to canal water leads to one killed and one injured in Sultanpur village, Haryana, India.

properties.Title: 106 towns in the Kherson region of Ukraine are left without water after Russian attacks on energy and water infrastructure
properties.Description: 106 towns in the Kherson region of Ukraine are left without water services in April 2022 after Russian attacks on energy and water systems.

properties.Title: An explosion at a water pandal in Myanmar injures two
properties.Description: In Hlaingtharya township, Yangon, Myanmar, an explosion at a water pandal injures two.

properties.Title: Pumping stations in Lysychansk are damaged by attacks in the Russia-Ukraine war
properties.Description: Water supply to the south part of Lysychansk is cut off after attacks on the water pumping stations “Lisova Dacha”, “GTV,” and “Sumischena.” (April 2022)

properties.Title: Russian attack on water distribution pipeline in Luhansk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces shell Sievierodonetsk, Luhansk, Ukraine, damaging a water distribution pipeline.

properties.Title: Russian attack on water processing systems in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces shell and mine water-processing systems in Verkhnia Krynytsia, Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine.

properties.Title: An attack on a water truck in Burkina Faso was accompanied by a threat to attack all water systems
properties.Description: Gunmen set fire to a water truck in the Centre-North region of Burkina Faso. Assailants made it clear they did not want to see water trucks on that road again. All water trucking activities, currently the only way to provide emergency water assistance to the residents, were halted, according to the Norwegian Refugee Council.

properties.Title: Violent protest over contaminated water and inadequate water supply in Maharastra, India
properties.Description: Around a dozen Shiv Sena members in Nagpur, Maharastra, India, ransack the offices of the Orange City Water Pvt Ltd. and manhandle a senior company official during a protest over contaminated and low-pressure water supply.

properties.Title: Major portions of Kharkiv are left without water by attacks on water and energy systems
properties.Description: More then than 100 multi-story buildings in Kharkiv are left without water by Russian attacks on water and energy systems during the Russia-Ukraine war (April 2022).

properties.Title: Israeli settlers in violence against Palestinian energy, land, and water resources in Salfit, West Bank (April)
properties.Description: Israeli settlers break into Palestinian agricultural lands in Dayr Istiya village, Salfit, West Bank, and vandalize solar cells and a water tank in late April 2022.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage water well in West Bank; injure several, sparking protests with 50 more injured
properties.Description: Israeli settlers under the protection of Israeli soldiers break into a water well in Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank in late April and early May, and damaging the well and polluting the water with unknown materials. Three days later Israeli settlers, under the protection of Israeli military forces, physically assault Palestinians at a water well in the same area injuring several, including a 14-
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PSE14813, PSE14833, PSE14935, PSE14590

properties.Title: Myanmar military bombs two villages after water is cut off from a military camp
properties.Description: After the blockade of a watercourse used by military forces in Kwi Lon Taing, Myanmar, the military attacks the Kwee Lel Te and Kee Lel Ywar Thit villages of Kyainseikgyi, Kayin.

properties.Title: Russian forces shell Zelenodolsk, Ukraine, cutting off water and electricity
properties.Description: Russian forces shell Zelenodolsk, Dnipropetrovsk, Ukraine, cutting off water and electricity.

properties.Title: Water cut provokes violence in Candelaria, Colombia
properties.Description: A group in Candelaria, Valle del Cauca, Colombia, demonstrate against an eight-day water cut and vandalize the town hall and mayor's office. Arrests are reported.

properties.Title: Chernihiv loses centralized water due to attacks on infrastructure
properties.Description: Chernihiv is left without centralized water supply due to attacks on electrical and water service systems (April).

properties.Title: A clash over the distribution of drinking water injures six in Chattradev, Nepal
properties.Description: A clash over the distribution of drinking water injures six in Chattradev, Nepal.

properties.Title: Three killed in dispute over control and distribution of drinking water in Mexico
properties.Description: Violence over the control, distribution, and sale of drinking water in San Gregorio, Cuautzingo, Mexico, leads to three deaths and one injury.

properties.Title: Continuing attacks in Kharkiv cut off water supply for major sections of the city
properties.Description: In May, continuing Russian attacks in Kharkiv, Ukraine cut off water supply for major sections of the city. More than forty multi-story buildings in Kharkiv are left without water.

properties.Title: Pumping stations on the Popasna water pipeline are damaged, cutting water supply to a million people
properties.Description: The pumping station and first lift of the Popasna Water Pipeline sustain heavy damage, cutting off water supplies for around one million people in early May. The station pumps water from the Siverskyi Donets River to several settlements in the north of the Luhansk Region, including Popasna, Zolote, Hirske, Pervomaisk, Kadiyevets, Alchevsk, Khrustalny, Antratsyt, as well as in the villages of Toshk

properties.Title: Russian attacks on water systems cut water supply to one million people in the Luhansk region
properties.Description: The entire Luhansk region is left without central water supply due to destruction of electricity stations in early May 2022. This Russian attack cuts the water supply to a million people.
properties.Sources: Shumilova et al. 2023; Aretem Lysohor Luhansk 2022a; Rothrock 2022

properties.Title: Violent protest in Musina, South Africa, over chronic water shortages
properties.Description: Over several days, rioters barricade streets with burning tires and riot in Musina, Vhembe, Limpopo, South Africa to demonstrate against chronic water shortages. Police intervene and shoot rubber bullets and live ammunition, injuring at least one, and rioters throw stones at the police. Several arrests are reported.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. SAF16688, SAF16691, SAF16736, SAF16739

properties.Title: Attacks leave 40 towns in the Mykolaiv region without water services
properties.Description: In May, attacks leave 40 towns in the Mykolaiv region of Ukraine without water services; 30 water-supply systems are damaged.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroys Palestinian water tank near Jericho, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy a Palestinian-owned water tank used to water agricultural lands in Marj Naajah village, Jericho, West Bank.

properties.Title: Gates on the dam at the Mironovsky reservoir are damaged, causing downstream flooding on the Luhan River
properties.Description: Russia accuses the Ukrainian armed forces of destroying the gates on the dam in May 2022 at the Mironovsky reservoir near Svitlodarsk to slow the Russian advance across the Luhan River toward Svitlodarsk in the Bakhmut Region of Donetsk Oblast.

properties.Title: Water pollution from mining in Madagascar prompts violent protests from local fishers
properties.Description: Local fishers attack soldiers and block a road leading to the QMM mining company in Fort Dauphin, Taolagnaro, Madagascar, in a demonstration to force the company to meet demands to stop water pollution. 30 soldiers are taken hostage by the group, 5 soldiers are injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers break into a water well in Qaryut, Palestine, and clash with local residents
properties.Description: Israeli settlers under the protection of Israeli soldiers break into a water well in Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank, and clash with Palestinian who confronted them.

properties.Title: Protest against long-term water cuts in Democratic Republic of Congo turns violent
properties.Description: Mwetu Mwa Kele activists demonstration in Tshikapa, Tshikapa, Kasai, Democratic Republic of Congo, against a two-year water cut. Police disperse the protest using tear gas and firearms, injuring four.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroys Palestinian water well in Ras Atiya, West Bank, and block farmers from using the water
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy a Palestinian-owned water well in Ras Atiya, West Bank, and block farmers from using the water for agricultural purposes.

properties.Title: Violent demonstration over lack of potable water in Gedaref, Sudan
properties.Description: Demonstrators stage a protest in Gedaref, Sudan, demanding access to potable water. Security forces beat and arrest some of the protesters.

properties.Title: Two killed in attack on tractor delivering water to Pakistan military in Balochistan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Balochistan Liberation Army militants detonate a landmine targeting a tractor carrying water for Pakistan forces in Khost, Balochistan, Pakistan, killing two.

properties.Title: Clan dispute over access to water and land leads to three deaths in Somalia
properties.Description: Ogaden-Mohamed Zubeyr Clan militia clashes with Marehan clan militia near Dif, Lower Juba, Somalia, in a dispute over access to water resources and grazing land. Three people and several animals are killed.

properties.Title: Residents of Lysychansk, Ukraine collecting water are attacked by Russian forces, killing ten and injurying more than 20
properties.Description: Russian army fires on residents in Lysychansk who had come out to replenish supplies of drinking water, June 2022. At least ten deaths and 21 injuries are reported.

properties.Title: Shortage of water in Samba, India, leads to violent demonstration
properties.Description: Women hold a demonstration and vandalize government offices at Samba, India, over shortages of water supply in their area.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroy structures, including water well, near Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli military forces demolish structures, including a water well belonging to Palestinians, northeast of Hebron city, West Bank, under the pretext of not having a building permit.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroy the water well used for water supply in Bayt Lid, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy a Palestinian-owned water well used for the entire town of Bayt Lid, Tulkarm, West Bank, and backfilled it with rocks and concrete.

properties.Title: Violent protests over pollution from mining in Bolivia
properties.Description: Residents of Oruro, Bolivia, block a highway to demand the closure of a mine in their neighborhood due to water pollution. In a counter-demonstration, mining workers of Bolivar, Totoral, and Avicaya areas, march through the city detonating dynamite and attempting to enter the building of the Oruro Regional Government.

properties.Title: One farmer is killed and another injured in a dispute over access to water in Uttar Pradesh, India
properties.Description: The village head/Pradhan in Imlia, Balrampur, Uttar Pradesh, India, shoot two farmers in a dispute over taking water from government tube well, killing one and injuring the other.

properties.Title: Mali militias and the Russian Wagner group attack Mopti, Mali, killing three and sabotaging a water tower
properties.Description: Militias from Forces Armées Maliennes, Dan Na Ambassagou, and the Russian paramilitary group Wagner, attack the village of Yalema, Mopti, Mali, killing three and sabotaging a water tower.

properties.Title: Attack on water pumping station in Dori, Burkina Faso, disrupts local water supply and kills four
properties.Description: Presumed Islamic State Sahel militants attack a police position at the water pumping station in Yakouta, Seno, Burkina Faso. Four policemen are reported killed, two wounded, and two missing and the water supply to the town of Dori is disrupted.

properties.Title: Water supply canal is attacked in Zlitan, Libya
properties.Description: An unidentified armed group damages water canal in Zlitan, Almargeb, Libya, cutting available water supplies.

properties.Title: Violent protest over lack of water services in Monterrey, Mexico
properties.Description: Protestors in Monterrey, Nuevo Leon, Mexico, block a road to demand water services and some are assaulted by drivers opposed to the blockade.

properties.Title: Militants in Mali destroy water pumps and rice fields
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'a Nusrat ul-Islam wa al-Muslimin militants destroy water pumps and rice fields in Kouna, Mopti, Mali.

properties.Title: Attack on water systems of the Great Man-Made River in Libya
properties.Description: An unidentified armed group destroys infrastructure at four different stations belonging to the Man-Made River in Wadi al Washkah, Libya, causing significant water loss.

properties.Title: Violent demonstration in Sindh, Pakistan, against the diversion of water from farmers, with multiple injuries
properties.Description: Farmers stage a demonstration near Khairpur Nathan Shah, Sindh, Pakistan, to demand irrigation water be diverted to the lands of the 'influential people.' Police clash with the demonstrators: farmers pelt stones and the police retaliate with gunfire, injuring 25 people, including 5 police.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers and soldiers destroy water wells, tanks, and agricultural facilities in West Bank villages; clashes ensue
properties.Description: In mid- to late-June 2022, Israeli settlers and soldiers destroy a water well in Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank, fill another well with stones near Yabad, Jenin, demolish a pond used to water grapes in Bir Zayt, water tanks and agricultural facilities in Al Quds-AzZaayyim village, and destroy a water network, trees, and agricultural facilities in Ibziq. Clashes erupt between the soldiers and Pa
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PSE15594, PSE15606, PSE15612, PSE15611, PSE15621, PSE15518

properties.Title: Russian forces attack a dam on the Siverskyi Donets River draining the reservoir and causing flooding
properties.Description: Russian forces attack the Oskil dam on the Siverskyi Donets River in the Kharkiv region, draining the reservoir and causing flooding (July 2022).

properties.Title: Environmental water defender Yuli Velasquez attacked by gunmen in Colombia
properties.Description: Environmental water defender Yuli Velasquez, president of Fedepesan [the Federation of Santander Fishers for Tourism and Environment], is attacked by gunmen in Colombia in 2022; her bodyguard is injured.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroys water pipes at the spring in Duma Village, Nablus, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy Palestinian-owned equipment, including water pipes and barbed wire, at the water spring of Duma village, Nablus, West Bank.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PSE15693; Middle East Monitor 2022

properties.Title: Seven deaths are reported in clashes over irrigation water and agricultural land in Yemen
properties.Description: Clashes over irrigation water and agricultural land take place between Kaut and Abu Ahmad tribesmen in As Sudah district, Amran, Yemen. The clashes result in seven fatalities and two injuries, over 21 - 23 July.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. YEM75092, YEM75081, YEM75078

properties.Title: Underwater pipeline supplying water to Aegina, Greece, is damaged by sabotage
properties.Description: According to the Attica Regional Authority in Greece, unidentified assailants use explosives to damage the underwater pipeline that supplies water to the island of Aegina. The incident reportedly occurred near the village of Perani, 300 meters off the Coast of Salamina at a depth of 14 meters.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers demolish Palestinian agricultural water well in Dura and damage water networks in Dayr Istiya, West Bank
properties.Description: A group of Israeli settlers demolish a Palestinian-owned agricultural water well in Dura town, Hebron, West Bank, and water and sewage networks in Dayr Istiya village, Salfit, West Bank in July 2022.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PSE29770, PSE29769

properties.Title: Large protest in Iraq over lack of irrigation and drinking water is met by police using live ammunication to disperse the demons
properties.Description: Hundreds in Maysan, Iraq, protest lack of irrigation and drinking water, demanding better public services. Police uses live ammunition to disperse the demonstration.

properties.Title: Russian forces damage the Karlivka water purification station
properties.Description: Russian forces shell civilian and military infrastructure near Karlivka, Donetsk region, damaging the Karlivka water purification station.

properties.Title: A caste dispute in India over irrigation water leaves two injured
properties.Description: In a caste dispute in UP, India, an upper caste mob beat up a Dalit group and attempt to strip a Dalit woman, in a clash over watering their fields. Two injuries are reported.

properties.Title: Clash on the Afghanistan-Pakistan border injures at least two after Pakistani forces allegedly attempt to divert floodwaters to
properties.Description: At least two are injured in an armed clash between Taliban and Pakistan security forces on Spin Boldak-Chaman border, Kandahar, Afghanistan. The clash starts after Pakistani forces allegedly attempt to divert floodwaters towards Afghanistan.

properties.Title: Water truck is targeted by Syrian government forces, injuring three
properties.Description: Syrian government forces target a drinking water truck in Idleb countryside with a guided missile, injuring 3 people.

properties.Title: Israeli military forces destroy a Palestinian water well and olive trees near Bethlehem in the West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces demolish a Palestinian-owned water well and uproot 20 olive trees belonging to a Palestinian in Tuqu village, Bethlehem, West Bank.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers seize Palestinian land near Ain As Sakout, West Bank in order to control water wells
properties.Description: Israeli settlers seize Palestinian-owned lands near Ain As Sakout, West Bank, to control the water wells in the area.

properties.Title: Attack on a water well during dispute in Somalia beween Al Shabaab and Hawadle clan
properties.Description: Al Shabaab militants burn and destroy houses, including destroying a water borehole in a dispute between Al Shabaab and the Hawadle clan, Bulo Burto, Somalia. About 60 household are displaced.

properties.Title: A water tanker is destroyed and four soldiers are injured in Al Shabaab attack in Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab militants target government security forces convoy with a water tanker, injuring four and destroying the water tanker in Afgooye, Somalia.

properties.Title: Water basins are damaged in France in a protest over the use of water during a drought
properties.Description: Members of a group of gardeners, fishers, and 'water stream lovers' damage large water reserve basins in Pouille, France, denouncing the use of water during a drought.

properties.Title: The water supply to the city of Basra, Iraq, is attacked
properties.Description: Unidentified militants sabotage the Bidaa canal in Basra province, Iraq, threatening the water supply for the city of Basra.

properties.Title: Attack on energy system providing water for five villages in Morocco
properties.Description: An unidentified group destroys power generators used to pump water for five villages and a school in Toumliline, Sidi Ifni, Guelmim-Oued Noun, Morocco.

properties.Title: Turkish attack on drinking water system in Ar Raqqa, Syria
properties.Description: Turkish military shells the town of Al Hishah in Ar Raqqa, Syria, damaging the drinking water station.

properties.Title: Israeli forces raze Palestinian street to construct a water line to serve Israeli settlements near Zawiya, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces raze part of a Palestinian-owned street near Zawiya, Salfit, West Bank, to construct a water line serving Israeli settlements.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water network irrigating Palestinian agricultural lands near Tubas, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a water network distributing water to more than 300 dunams of Palestinian agricultural lands in Al Farsiyah, Tubas, West Bank.

properties.Title: Militants attack water administration building in Turkey
properties.Description: Halklar?n Birle?ik Devrim Hareketi militants attack the building of the Turkish state's water administration with improvised explosive devices in Kayapinar, Diyarbakir.

properties.Title: Militants in Pakistan kill one, injure two soldiers repairing a water-supply line
properties.Description: An IED planted by unidentified militants in Bara Banda area, Lower Dir, Pakistan, kills a soldier and injures two more. The blast took place while the soldiers were repairing a water-supply connection from a natural spring.

properties.Title: Clash over land and water injures five in West Bengal, India
properties.Description: Two groups clash over land and water issues in Kumarsanda, Murshidabad district, West Bengal, India, injuring five.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers flood Palestinian lands near Hebron, West Bank, with sewage
properties.Description: Israeli settlers release sewage water onto Palestinian agricultural lands in Bayt Ummar, Hebron, West Bank, damaging a vineyard.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroy Palestinian water pipelines and uproot palm and citrus trees near Jericho, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces uproot 166 palm and citrus trees, destroy water pipelines, and confiscate fences belonging to Palestinian farmers in Awsaj, north of Jericho, West Bank (August).

properties.Title: Residents in Mpumalanga, South Africa assault construction officials during a protest against water project corruption
properties.Description: Cottondale Village residents, Mpumalanga, South Africa, barricade a road with burning tires and pipes meant for a water distribution project in protest over corruption. There are reports that rioters assaulted the construction company officials. The police arrested two suspects.

properties.Title: Israeli military forces destroy a Palestinian water well and grape trees in Al Khadir, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy a water well and uproot 55 grape trees belonging to Palestinian farmers in Al Khadir village, Bethlehem, West Bank (August).

properties.Title: Violent protest over lack of water and electricity in schools in Gedaref, Sudan
properties.Description: Students of Azza and Al Sir schools in Gedaref, Sudan, stage a protest and close the national road in a demonstration against the lack of water and electricity. Security forces fire tear gas to disperse the crowd and beat protesters.

properties.Title: Clash between two groups in Karachi City, Pakistan, over government efforts to stop illegal water connections, injures six
properties.Description: A clash takes place between two groups when the Karachi Water and Sewerage Board takes action against illegal water connections in Karachi City, Pakistan. Six people are injured.

properties.Title: Protest in Hamadan, Iran, over water shortages and government mismanagement with at least one injury reported
properties.Description: Around 200 residents protest in Hamadan, Iran, over ongoing water shortages, protesting government mismanagement of the situation, and cuts in water supply during severe drought. Police and protesters clash when the police attempt to disperse the gathering. Injuries are reorted.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. IRN19661; RFE/RL 2022a

properties.Title: Militants in Burkina Faso attack government infrastructure, including drinking-water-supply pipes
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants blow up a police station, gendarmerie, the mayor's office, the prefecture, and drinking-water-supply pipes, and burn several trucks in the town of Kouka, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: Houthi forces fire upon residents in Yemen, injuring three women and two children in a dispute over water wells and land
properties.Description: Houthi security forces fire upon residents of Iyal Husayn, Arhab, Sanaa, Yemen, injuring three women and two children in a dispute over water wells and agricultural land.

properties.Title: Militants in Burkina Faso attack water pumping station in Djibo; soldiers kill two
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants attack a checkpoint and fire gunshots at a water pumping station in the town of Djibo, Burkina Faso. Soldiers responding to the attack kill two militants.

properties.Title: In a dispute over digging a water well, Houthi forces and local residents exchange gunfire in Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces and local residents exchange fire in Bayt al Yazidi, Damt, Ad Dali, Yemen, after Houthi forces raid over a disagreement on digging a water well. No fatalities or injuries but Houthi forces kidnap eight residents.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab militants detonate an improvised explosive device at a water source borehole in Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab militants detonate an improvised explosive device at a water source borehole and destroy houses of civilians near Maarsomage and Qaayib, Galgaduud, Somalia.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. SOM37669, SOM37672

properties.Title: Israeli settlers vandalize the water supply network in the West Bank, causing water cuts
properties.Description: Israeli settlers vandalize the water supply network in Kisan, Bethlehem, West Bank, causing water cuts.

properties.Title: Violent demonstration in Karachi City, Pakistan over water connections, injuring one
properties.Description: Violent demonstration in Karachi City, Pakistan, over water connections to a private hospital. Demonstrators scuffle with police forces, injuring one.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab militants destroy water pumps in Hanan, Galgaduud, Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab militants set several houses on fire and destroy water pumps in Hanan village, Cadaado, Galgaduud, Somalia.

properties.Title: Israeli military forces demolish Palestinian-owned agricultural facilities in Al Khadir, West Bank, including a water well
properties.Description: Israeli military forces demolish Palestinian-owned agricultural facilities in Al Khadir, Bethlehem, West Bank, including a water well.

properties.Title: Islamic State Sahel militants kill 30 civilians in Talataye, Mali, and destroy homes, markets, and water wells
properties.Description: Islamic State Sahel militants kill at least thirty civilians from the Dawsahak, Tuareg, Djerma, and Songhai communities in Talataye, Mali, and destroy houses, markets, water wells, and more.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water network, vandalize pond, and loot water pump in Bayt Dajan, Nablus, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a Palestinian-owned water supply network and vandalize a pond, both used for farming east of Bayt Dajan, Nablus, West Bank. Also, settlers loot a water pump from the land (September).

properties.Title: One killed in clash in Somalia over water resources
properties.Description: Pastoralists from Dhulbahante clan militia clash with Majeerteen-Issa Mahmud militia in Fadhiyar near Garowe, Somalia, in a dispute over water resources. One person is killed.

properties.Title: Police beat and arrest over 20 residents of Hamadan, Iran,  protesting ongoing water shortages
properties.Description: Residents of Hamadan, Iran, protest an ongoing water shortage. Police attack protesters and make over 20 arrests.

properties.Title: Myanmar military raids a village and destroys water pumps and other property
properties.Description: Myanmar military raids Hput Hlaing village (Sagaing region), destroying motorcycles, solar boards, water pumps, and other valuable items belonging to the villagers.

properties.Title: Russian attack on water and energy infrastructure cuts utilities to Kharkiv in northeastern Ukraine
properties.Description: The mayor of Kharkiv reports that a Russian strike on an infrastructure facility knocks out power and water to much of the city in northeastern Ukraine in mid-September 2022.

properties.Title: One person is shot during a clash between two groups of villagers in Nagsosha, Bangladesh, over water-logging
properties.Description: One person is shot during a clash between two groups of villagers in Nagsosha, Natore, Rajshahi, Bangladesh, over water-logging issue in the area.

properties.Title: September 2022 Russian missile strike on Karachunov dam in Kryvyi Rih causes flooding, cutting water to 100+ homes
properties.Description: A September 2022 Russian missile attack on the Karachunov dam at the Karachunivske Reservoir on the Ingulets River in the city of Kryvyi Rih destroys water gates and causes a flood and the loss of water supply to a hundred residential buildings.
properties.Sources: Gleick et al. 2023; Golowanow 2022; Gettleman 2022; United Kingdom MoD 2022; Novaya Gazeta Europe 2022

properties.Title: Militants destroy a water pumping station in Burkina Faso, cutting water deliveries in several quarters in the regional capital
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants destroy a water pumping station in the village of Zorkoum, Sanmatenga, Burkina Faso. The sabotage cuts water deliveries in several quarters in the regional capital of Kaya.

properties.Title: Kyrgyz-Tajik border clash at disputed Golovnoy water facility leaves one Kyrgyz guard dead
properties.Description: A firefight between Kyrgyz and Tajik border guards on the disputed perimeter at the Golovnoy water distribution facility in Ak-Sai, Batken, Kyrgyzstan kills one Kyrgyz serviceman.

properties.Title: Suspected Somali camel herders injure two farmers near Tseikuru, Kenya, in a fight over grazing land and watering points
properties.Description: Suspected Somali camel herders injure two farmers in Masungwa area of Tseikuru, Kitui, Kenya, in a fight over grazing land and watering points.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab destroys houses and water wells in near Maxaas, Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab destroys houses and water borehole in Ceel-Jiqoow village near Maxaas town, Bulo Burto, Somalia

properties.Title: Israeli military forces destroy a Palestinian agricultural water distribution network in al-Awsaj, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy a water distribution network and fence on Palestinian agricultural land in al-Awsaj village, north of Jericho city, West Bank (September).

properties.Title: Russian and Ukrainian forces blame each other for shelling of an industrial area that cuts off water for several cities
properties.Description: Russian and Ukrainian forces blame each other for shelling the industrial area of Enerhodar, Zaporizhzhia. The shelling cuts off the water supply in several districts of the city.

properties.Title: Russian missile attack near a Ukrainian nuclear plant also shuts down a nearby hydropower plant
properties.Description: Russian missiles strike near the Ukrainian Pivdennoukrainsk nuclear plant, also known as the South Ukraine Nuclear Power Plant. The attack damages a hydroelectric power station near the nuclear facility, forces the shutdown of one of the plant’s generators, and causes partial power outages in the area (September 2022).

properties.Title: Russian missile attack on the Pechenihy dam
properties.Description: In September, 2022, Russian missiles attack the Pechenihy Dam in Pechenihy on the Siverskyi Donets River, Kharkiv Oblast.

properties.Title: Israeli military destroys two Palestinian water wells in West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy two Palestinian-owned water wells in Al Ras, West Bank, by filling them with concrete.

properties.Title: Israeli forces and settlers raze Palestinian land, uproot olive trees for Ariel Settlement water networks
properties.Description: Israeli military forces and settlers raze Palestinian-owned land and uproot 50 olive trees near Zawiya village, Salfit, West Bank, to set up water networks for the Ariel settlement (September).

properties.Title: Israeli settlers from Eli destroy Palestinian water networks and spring in Nablus Village, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers from Eli destroy Palestinian-owned water networks and a spring in As Sawiyah village, Nablus, West Bank.

properties.Title: Armed group in Chiapas, Mexico, kills two men reportedly trying to poison a water well in an ongoing land conflict
properties.Description: A Santa Martha community armed group near Atzamilho, Chiapas, Mexico, shoot and kill two men reportedly trying to poison a water well. The attack is related to an ongoing land conflict.

properties.Title: Environmental defender and local leader of opposition to dam projects on the Rio Verde is found dead in Oaxaca, Mexico
properties.Description: The environmental defender and local leader of the Consejo de Pueblos Unidos por la Defensa del Rio Verde, Filogonio Martínez Merino, is found dead in Santiago Jamiltepec in the Mexican state of Oaxaca. He had been part of the local resistence to two dam projects on the Rio Verde.

properties.Title: Attacks on Kremenchuk and Dnipro dams in Ukraine in October 2022
properties.Description: Russian missile attacks (in October 2022) are aimed at the Dnipro Hydroelectric Power Station in Zaporizhzhia, Dniester Pumped Storage Power Station in Chernivtsi Oblast, and Kremenchuk Hydroelectric Power Plant in Svitlovodsk in Kirovohrad Oblast. [The Dnipro hydroelectric plant near Zaporizhzhia is attacked in December 2022 and again in February 2023.]
properties.Sources: Wilk and Zochowski 2022; Harding et al. 2022; BBC News 2023

properties.Title: Al Shabaab bombs a water source borehole near Belet Weyne, Hiraan, Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab detonates an improvised explosive device at a water source borehole and destroys houses from the Hawadle clan near Belet Weyne, Hiraan, Somalia. Al Shabaab was targeting clans supporting government operations in the region.

properties.Title: Military forces clash with rioters in raids to stop water and power network violations in Al Badiya al Wosta, Jordan
properties.Description: Military forces clash with rioters during raids into several areas in Al Badiya al Wosta, Jordan, to stop and control violations against water and power networks.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers demolish Palestinian-owned facilities, including water tanks in West Bank, to advance settlement projects
properties.Description: Israeli settlers demolish Palestinian-owned facilities, including solar cells and water tanks in Al Farsiyah, Tubas, West Bank, in an attempt to advance settlement projects (October).

properties.Title: Russian forces destroy a dam in Donetsk, flooding the town of Raihorodok
properties.Description: The Russians blow up a dam during their retreat in Donetsk Oblast in October 2022, flooding the settlement of Raihorodok.

properties.Title: Around 100 farmers in Tacna, Peru clash over ownership of a water well in the sector
properties.Description: Around 100 farmers of the Huerto de Olivos Fronteras Vivas association, Tacna, Peru, clash over ownership of a water well in the sector.

properties.Title: Residents and farmers destroy intake pipes that drew water from a river and transferred it to a dam in Kenya
properties.Description: Residents and farmers from eight villages destroy intake pipes that drew water from a river and transferred it to Ragati dam, Mathira East, Nyeri, Kenya in demonstration against the move by the Mathira Water and Sanitation Company, Mawasco. The pipes cut the flow of water to domestic users and irrigators.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy solar cell units and damage water tanks belonging to Palestinian farmers in Al Farsiyah, West Bank
properties.Description: A group of Israeli settlers destroy solar cell units and damage water tanks belonging to Palestinian farmers in Al Farsiyah, Tubas, West Bank.

properties.Title: Houthi fighter kills civilian in Yemen in a water project dispute
properties.Description: A Houthi fighter shoots and kills one civilian in Razih district, Sadah, Yemen, over benefits from a water project.

properties.Title: Physical conflict erupts between two clans over control of water resources and water services in Sidon, Lebanon
properties.Description: Physical conflict erupts between workers, drivers and owners of two different Water Associations and clans, Al Salim and Al Aafara, in Sidon, Lebanon over control of water resources and client competition.

properties.Title: Israeli forces destroy water pump in Nablus, West Bank, cutting water supply to over 20,000 Palestinians in multiple villages
properties.Description: Israeli military forces destroy a central water pump that supplies water to several villages, including Burin, Madama, Asirah, and Urif, Nablus, West Bank, cutting water supply to more than 20,000 Palestinians (October).

properties.Title: Palestinians clash with Israeli settlers and soldiers over Qaryut water spring
properties.Description: Palestinians clash with Israeli settlers and soldiers who broke into the water spring of Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank.

properties.Title: Suspected Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants sabotage water installation in Sebba, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: Suspected Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants sabotage the National Office of Water and Sanitation water installation by destroying the generator in the town of Sebba, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: Clashes erupt between unknown gunmen and Syrian Democratic Forces after attack on Zir water facility in Deir ez Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Clashes take place between unknown gunmen believed to Islamic State members and Syrian Democratic Forces after a water facility in Zir, Deir ez Zor, Syria is attacked.

properties.Title: A farmer is killed and two others injured in a clash at Satpakia, Bangladesh, following an altercation over allocation of water
properties.Description: Rivals groups clash at Satpakia village, Bangladesh, following an altercation over giving water to rice fields. A farmer is killed and two others are injured in the clash.

properties.Title: Suspected Somali herders invade farms and destroy water points in Kilifi, Kenya
properties.Description: Suspected Somali herders invade farms in Magarini, Kilifi, Kenya and destroy some water points.

properties.Title: Thousands protest large basin irrigation project; violent clashes with 1,500 police leave 60+ officers, 50 demonstrators injured
properties.Description: Between 4,000 and 7,000 people from a wide range of community, environmental, and political groups demonstrate against the large basin project being built to irrigate fields in times of drought. Around 1,500 police officers and six helicopters are deployed to meet them and a violent confrontation injures more than 60 police officers and 50 demonstrators. A pipeline is cut.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. FRA19929, FRA19930

properties.Title: Airstrike hits water tanks in Saada, Yemen
properties.Description: On November 1, an airstrike hits water tanks in Sa'ada District, Saada, Yemen.

properties.Title: Russian forces shell Shevchenkove in Mykolaiv, Ukraine, damaging power station and water tower
properties.Description: Russian forces shell Shevchenkove community in Mykolaiv, Ukraine, damaging a power distribution station and a water tower.

properties.Title: Israeli military demolishes Palestinian-owned agricultural facilities, including water well, near Hebron in West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces demolish Palestinian-owned agricultural facilities, including a water well, in Al Frihat area near Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: One injured in protest over water shortages in Polokwane, South Africa
properties.Description: Community members in Polokwane, Limpopo, South Africa protest against water shortages. Demonstrators barricade the N1 with rocks and one person is reported hit by a police vehicle and hospitalized.

properties.Title: An attack partly destroys three spillways and the roadway on the Kakhovka Dam on the Dnipro River
properties.Description: An attack in November 2022 partly destroys three spillways and the roadway on the Kakhovka Dam on the Dnipro River, leading to a decrease in water levels in the Kakhovske Reservoir, threatening water supply in regional cities, reducing water available for the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, and hindering Ukrainian advances across the river.
properties.Sources: Gleick et al. 2023; Shevchuk and Vyshnevskyi 2022

properties.Title: Israeli settlers, under the protection of Israeli soldiers, clash with Palestinians after raiding a water well
properties.Description: Israeli settlers, under the protection of Israeli soldiers, clash with Palestinians after raiding the water well of Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank. Soldiers fire stun grenades and tear gas canisters toward Palestinians.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab explosive attack kills eight African Union Transition Mission peacekeepers and destroys water tanker in Somalia
properties.Description: An improvised explosive device planted by Al Shabaab is used to attack a convoy of the African Union Transition Mission peacekeepers in Somalia, killing eight soldiers and destroying a water tanker.

properties.Title: Unidentified armed group targets water-transport truck with explosive device in Marib, Yemen
properties.Description: An improvised explosive device planted by an unidentified armed group targets a water-transport truck in Marib, Yemen.

properties.Title: Presumed Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants sabotage a water pumping station near Tiben, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: Presumed Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin militants sabotage a water pumping station near the village of Tiben, Sanmatenga, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: A political demonstration in Brazil turns violent and demonstrators break water pipes and damage the water and sanitation system
properties.Description: On November 18, 2022, in Ariquemes (Rondonia), Bolsonaro supporters protesting the result of the October 30th damage the city's water and sanitation system by breaking water pipes, causing a shortage in water supply in six neighborhoods.

properties.Title: Thee soldiers from the Myanmar military are killed while repairing a water system for a military camp
properties.Description: Myanmar military repairing a water system for a military camp are attacked in Hpruso, Kayah, Myanmar, killing three soldiers.

properties.Title: Water access clash injures two in Mallah community, Badin, Sindh, Pakistan
properties.Description: A clash over access to water takes place between two groups of the Mallah community, Badin, Sindh, Pakistan, injuring two.

properties.Title: Fighting between Bani Fadol and Bani Badr militias over a water station in West Kordofan, Sudan leaves two dead and 13 injured
properties.Description: Fighting breaks out between Bani Fadol militia and Bani Badr militia in multiple locations in West Kordofan, Sudan, following a dispute over a water station. Two are killed, and 13 people are wounded across two days.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. SUD18570, SUD18571

properties.Title: Russia reportedly attacks the Dnipro hydropower plant in December 2022
properties.Description: The Dnipro hydropower plant near Zaporizhzhia is reportedly attacked by Russia in December 2022.

properties.Title: Several are injured in a clash between police and demonstrators in Ciudad de Mexico in a protest over a water system
properties.Description: Several people are injured in a clash between police and demonstrators in Ciudad de Mexico, Xochimilco. Residents are protesting hydraulic works of the Actopan collector and denouncing the misuse of water resources.

properties.Title: Houthi forces kill two farmers and injure three in water well dispute in Al Hudaydah, Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces shoot and kill at least two farmers and injure three others in Bani Ubaqah in Bajil district, Al Hudaydah, Yemen when Houthi forces attempt to seize civilian lands and dig a water well.

properties.Title: Russian forces shell the Kherson, Ukraine water utility, killing one
properties.Description: Russian forces shell the Kherson, Ukraine water utility, resulting in the death of one civilian.

properties.Title: Community members in Johannesburg, South Africa threaten contractors, fire shots, demand illegal water connections
properties.Description: Community members threaten Joburg Water contractors and fire gunshots in Johannesburg, South Africa, demanding permission for illegal water connections.

properties.Title: Farmers vandalize and burn Champadevi hydropower office in Nepal over water diversion
properties.Description: Farmers vandalize and burn the office of the Champadevi hydropower project in Siranchok, Nepal, to protest the diversion of their irrigation water towards the hydropower project.

properties.Title: Russian forces shell Kupiansk and Kharkiv, Ukraine, damaging water pipe and civilian infrastructure
properties.Description: Russian forces shell Kupiansk and Kharkiv, Ukraine, damaging a water pipe and other civilian infrastructure.

properties.Title: Israeli military demolishes Palestinian house and water well in Hebron, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces demolish a Palesinian house under construction and a water well in Farsh al Hawa, Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: Violent demonstration in Chilpancingo de los Bravo, Guerrero, Mexico, over access to water services leads to injuries
properties.Description: A violent demonstration in Chilpancingo de los Bravo, Guerrero, Mexico, over access to water services leads to injuries.

properties.Title: Regional special forces shoot protesters opposing water well drilling in Shilabo, Ethiopia, killing two and injuring seven
properties.Description: Regional special forces shoot into protesters who had gathered to oppose the drilling of a water well in a cattle grazing area near Shilabo, Ethiopia, killing two and injuring seven others.

properties.Title: Bomb planted by unknown armed group explodes at water station in Dara, Syria
properties.Description: A bomb planted by an unknown armed group explodes in a water station near Kharab Shahem town in Dara, Syria.

properties.Title: Deaths and injuries reported in fight between Garre and Degodia clans over water and pasture lands in Banissa, Kenya
properties.Description: Nine are reported killed and several injured in a fight between Garre and Degodia clans over water and pasture lands in Banissa, Kenya.

properties.Title: Locals in Balochistan protest for rights and clean water; clashes with police leave one officer dead, complex set on fire
properties.Description: Locals hold a demonstration in Gwadar city, Balochistan, Pakistan, demanding rights for the people of Gwadar, clean drinking water, and an end to fishing trawlers. The demonstrators besiege the residence of the deputy commissioner and other offices. Police lob tear gas shells and fire shots to disperse the protesters. One policeman is reported killed, and a police complex is set on fire.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PAK80310, PAK80336

properties.Title: Israeli military demolishes water well, shop, and fence in Qalqas Village, Hebron, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli military forces demolish a water well, a shop selling car parts, and a fence at the junction of Qalqas village, Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: Unknown gunmen, believed to be Islamic State members, attack Asayish water truck in Syria, killing 1 and injuring 2
properties.Description: Unknown gunmen believed to be Islamic State members target an Asayish water truck in Karama, Syria, killing 1 Asayish member, and injuring two others.

properties.Title: Grenade blast in water tank leaves 40 families without water in Potrerito, Valle del Cauca, Colombia
properties.Description: Three unidentified individuals detonate a grenade in a water tank in Potrerito, Valle del Cauca, Colombia, leaving around 40 families without drinking water.

properties.Title: College students in South Africa protest water, book, and student card shortages; set fire to vehicle and water tank
properties.Description: College students in eSikhawini, uMhlathuze, KwaZulu-Natal, protest demanding solutions for the shortages of water, books, and student cards on the campus. Demonstraters set fire to a college vehicle and a water tank.

properties.Title: Eastern Cape's Raymond Mhlaba residents block road with stones and burning tires to demand water after pump station vandalism
properties.Description: In Raymond Mhlaba,  Eastern Cape, residents block road near Fort Beaufort with burning tires and stones, demanding water due to the vandalism of a water pump station by criminals.

properties.Title: Residents in Indwe, South Africa, demand water supply and police use rubber bullets injuring 16
properties.Description: Residents in Indwe, Emalahleni, Eastern Cape, South Africa block roads using burning tires, demanding water supply and service delivery. The police respond by firing rubber bullets, injuring 16.

properties.Title: Water allocation conflict erupts between villagers in Chilaura Nowapara Village, Sylhet, Bangladesh
properties.Description: On January 4, 2023, a dispute between villagers over the allocation of water for cultivation erupts in Chilaura Nowapara village, Jagannathpur upazila, Sunamganj, Sylhet, Bangladesh.

properties.Title: Suspected group for support of Islam and Muslim militants sabotage power lines in Gayeri, Burkina Faso, disrupting water system
properties.Description: Around January 8, 2023, suspected Group for Support of Islam and Muslims militants sabotage power lines in Gayeri, Burkina Faso, disrupting water systems.

properties.Title: Israeli military forces demolish water well in Kafr ad Dik Village, Plestibe, citing permit absence
properties.Description: On January 10, 2023, Israeli military forces demolish a water well in the village of Kafr ad Dik, Salfit, West Bank, Palestine, citing the absence of building permits as their justification.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage Palestinian water pipes in Qusra Village, West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: On January 11, 2023, Israeli settlers destroy water pipes that belong to Palestinians in the village of Qusra, Nablus, West Bank.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab attack results in 350+ camel deaths and water contamination in Ceel Xeero Village, Somalia
properties.Description: Deadly Al Shabaab assault claims lives of over 350 camels and pollutes water sources in Ceel Xeero Village, Bulo Burto, Somalia.

properties.Title: West Papua National Liberation Army damages water pipes and disrupts access to clean water in Oksibil District, Indonesia
properties.Description: Disruption of the clean water supply to the Oksibil district in Papua province, Indonesia, results from an attack on a water pipe by the West Papua National Liberation Army.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. IDN11341, IDN11342

properties.Title: Protest in Yauri, Cusco, Peru escalates with mining facility breach and attack on a community water tank
properties.Description: A four-day protest against Peru's president Dina Boluarte in Yauri, Cusco, Peru, escalates as demonstrators breach Antapaccay mining facility, targeting a vital water tank supplying local communities.

properties.Title: Residents clash with Exaltacion de Colcapirhua board over water well construction amid ongoing border conflict in Bolivia
properties.Description: In a border conflict, Sirpita residents clash with Exaltacion de Colcapirhua board during a demonstration against a water well construction in Tiquipaya, Cochabamba, Bolivia. The well is destroyed.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. BOL4051,  BOL4050

properties.Title: Mexican residents in Rincon de Tamayo, Guanajuato protest water mismanagement, leading to clashes, injuries, and arrests
properties.Description: Mexican residents in Rincon de Tamayo, Guanajuato, protest against the Municipal Water and Sewage Board over water mismanagement, leading to clashes with personnel and police that results in injuries and arrests.

properties.Title: One death during protests over water shortages in Mpumalanga, South Africa
properties.Description: A protest over water shortages near Piet Retief in Mkhondo, Gert Sibande, Mpumalanga, leads to road blockades with burning objects; police use shots to disperse the crowd, fatally injuring a 17-year-old.

properties.Title: South African residents barricade roads with burning items in Parys, Ngwathe, Free State, protesting water shortage
properties.Description: Residents in Parys, Ngwathe, Free State, South Africa, barricade roads with burning items to protest water shortage, resulting in property damage by rioters; police intervene, arresting five for violence.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. SAF18185, SAF18186

properties.Title: Water tanker and machinery set on fire by People's Liberation Front of India members in Ranchi district, Jharkhand, India
properties.Description: People's Liberation Front of India members set fire to construction equipment, including a water tanker, near Orga railway station in the Ranchi district, Jharkhand.

properties.Title: Armed men attack police in Guanajuato, Mexico amid water control dispute
properties.Description: Armed men in pickups shoot at police near Water Committee, Rincon de Tamayo, Guanajuato, Mexico, possibly due to Municipal Water Board control of community wells.

properties.Title: Israeli military demolishes Palestinian-owned water well in Kafr Laqif, Palestine, due to permit issue
properties.Description: The Israeli military demolishes a Palestinian-owned water well in Kafr Laqif, Qalqilya, West Bank, due to a lack of required permit.

properties.Title: Water shortage protest in Lichtenburg, South Africa, leads to truck burning and 24 arrests
properties.Description: In Lichtenburg, Ngaka Modiri Molema, North West, South Africa, residents burn trucks and loot amid water shortage protest, leading to 24 arrests.

properties.Title: Clash erupts as Palestinian protesters confront Israeli forces and settlers over water well usage in Qaryut Village, Palestine
properties.Description: In Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank, Palestinian protesters confront Israeli military forces and settlers, triggered by settlers' intrusion for utilizing the village water well.

properties.Title: Residents protest lack of water access in Castilla, Piura, Peru
properties.Description: In Castilla, Piura, Peru, residents throw rocks and reject officials inspecting water works due to the lack of access to water infrastructure.

properties.Title: Israeli military demolishes Palestinian-owned water well in Hablah Village, citing building permit absence
properties.Description: An under-construction water well owned by Palestinians in Hablah village, Qalqilya, West Bank, is destroyed by Israeli military forces, who claim the absence of a building permit as the reason.

properties.Title: Israeli police confiscate water tank in West Bank, citing license issue near Al Quds - Isawiya
properties.Description: In Cisjordânia, east of Al Quds - Isawiya, West Bank, a water tank is confiscated by the Israeli police who allege lack of license.

properties.Title: Russian forces damage water pumping station in attack in Dnipropetrovsk region, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces damage a water pumping station in an attack to the Chervonohryhorivka community in the Dnipropetrovsk region, Ukraine.

properties.Title: The city of Odesa, Ukraine loses water supply after Russian attacks on energy and water systems
properties.Description: The entire city of Odesa, Ukraine population 1 million, is temporarily left without water in late January 2023 after Russian attacks on energy and water systems.

properties.Title: Residents protest water shortage in Case Noyale, Mauritius, blocking road, damaging police vehicle, and disrupting water supply
properties.Description: 100 residents protest inadequate drinking water supply, blocking a major road with concrete blocks and damaging a police vehicle in Case Noyale - Black River, Mauritius. Water supply disruption is attributed to a damaged pipe.

properties.Title: Soldiers destroy water pump at Mahar Myat Muni pagoda in Kyauktaw, Myanmar
properties.Description: Four soldiers stationed at Mahar Myat Muni pagoda in Kyauktaw township, Myanmar destroy a water pump.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage Palestinian-owned agricultural equipment, fence, and water tanks in Al Masoudiyah, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers engage in the destruction of Palestinian-owned agricultural equipment and cause damage to a fence and water tanks in the Al Masoudiyah area near Burqah village, Nablus, West Bank.

properties.Title: Russia again attacks the Dnipro hydropower plant in February 2023
properties.Description: The Dnipro hydropower plant near Zaporizhzhia is attacked by Russia in February 2023.

properties.Title: Russians manipulate the water levels in the reservoir behind Kakhovka Dam, affecting civilian and agricultural water supplies
properties.Description: Russian forces manipulate water releases from the Kakhovka Dam in February 2023 to hinder Ukrainian military operations and threaten the water supplies for the cities of Enerhodar, Melitopol, and Berdiansk, which rely on water from the reservoir. Water supply for irrigation and power plant cooling at the Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant is also threatened.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab attack kills two civilians and destroys water points in Sirirale, Somalia
properties.Description: An improvised explosive device planted at two water points by Al Shabaab detonates, killing two civilians, injuring one, and destroying the two water points in the Sirirale area near Baardheere village, Hiraan, Somalia.

properties.Title: A clash in Kenya between Samburu militia and Isiolo herders over grazing land and water access leaves one dead, 5 injured
properties.Description: A confrontation occurs between suspected Samburu militia and an unidentified militia group, described as Isiolo herders, near Archers Post, Samburu East, Kenya. The clash arises from disputes over grazing land and access to watering holes for livestock, resulting in one fatality and five injuries.

properties.Title: Balochistan Liberation Front strikes army water-supply post in Balochistan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Members of the Balochistan Liberation Front launch an assault on the Pakistan army's water-supply post in Gawak town, Kech, using rockets and heavy weapons.

properties.Title: Political dispute in Tamil Nadu, India, over misuse of drinking water leads to violence and one death
properties.Description: A Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam councillor and eight of his relatives attack two soldiers on leave near Pochampalli village, Tamil Nadu, India due to an altercation over the misuse of drinking water, killing one of the soldiers.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers attack Palestinian shepherd and restrict access to a water pond in Ayn al Bayda, West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: A group of Israeli settlers attack a Palestinian shepherd and restrict access to a Palestinian-owned water pond in Ayn al Bayda, Tubas, West Bank.

properties.Title: Myanmar military launches airstrikes on War Ri Khu Village, damaging religous buildings and water storage
properties.Description: The Myanmar military carries out airstrikes on War Ri Khu village in Pekon, damaging the Me Taw Gu Christian religious buildings and water-storage facilities.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage Palestinian-owned solar cells, cars, and water tanks in Tubas, West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: Individuals from the Israeli settler community damage solar cells, agricultural equipment, and water tanks owned by Palestinians in Khirbat al Malih village, Tubas, West Bank. They assault a Palestinian before soldiers arrest them.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PSE31987, PSE31986

properties.Title: Protesters in Ethiopia demand water and are met with violence from local military, resulting in fatalities and injuries
properties.Description: Residents of Welkite, Guraghe, Ethiopian, block a road and throw stones at the Water and Sanitation Office to protest the lack of drinking water, which has been shut off in some parts of the city for over a month. Southern Nations, Nationalities, and Peoples' Region forces fire live bullets at the rioters, killing at least three and wounding 30 people. Several dozen people are later arrested.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. ETH9774, ETH9794

properties.Title: Confrontation erupts as Palestinians clash with Israeli forces during raid on the water spring in Qaryut Village, Nablus, Palest
properties.Description: Palestinians and Israeli military forces clash after Israeli raid on the water spring in Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank. Soldiers use stun grenades and tear gas canisters, leading to several injuries.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. PSE31755, PSE32094

properties.Title: Ituru residents in Kenya vandalize Karimenu dam pipeline in protest over lack of access to water for their homes
properties.Description: Residents of Ituuru village, Gatundu South, Kiambu, Kenya, vandalize the Karimenu dam water pipeline in a protest over the unsuccessful delivery of water into their taps, and demand an immediate supply of water to their homes.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers seize water sources and build networks in West Bank, causing extensive damage to Palestinian lands
properties.Description: In the Sahel Al-Baqiaa area, east of Tammun town, Tubas, West Bank, Israeli settlers appropriate water sources and construct water-supply networks, resulting in the extensive damage to Palestinian agricultural lands.

properties.Title: Protestors in Mexico face eviction and assault by police during demonstration against farming that contaminates water sources
properties.Description: In Sitilpech, Yucatan, Mexico, over 100 residents face eviction and physical assault by more than 150 state and municipal police officers after a protest over farming practices that cause environmental contamination and damage to water sources. The protests continue for two weeks.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al 2010 ID. MEX70925,  MEX71452

properties.Title: Armed group's attack on oil pipeline in Ricaurte, Narino, Colombia, results in oil spill, contaminating local water sources
properties.Description: An armed group damages an oil pipeline in Ricaurte, Narino, Colombia, causing an oil spill that pollutes local water sources.

properties.Title: Suspected Jama'a Nusrat ul-Islam wa al-Muslimin members destroy two water pumps in Barsalogho, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: Individuals believed to be associated with the Jama'a Nusrat ul-Islam wa al-Muslimin destroy two water pumps in the town of Barsalogho, Sanmatenga, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: Russian forces shell Marhanets, Ukraine, disrupting water supplies for 35,000
properties.Description: Russian forces shell Marhanets in the Dnipropetrovsk region, Ukraine, damaging private houses, a gas pipeline, and a power line connected to the water pumping station, resulting in water-supply disruption for 35,000 people.

properties.Title: Fatal clash between Baiki and Tangi tribes in Khost, Afghanistan, over road construction and possible water dispute
properties.Description: A violent clash occurs between Baiki and Tangi tribes in Khost's Spera, Afghanistan, over road construction and a possible dispute over water. One Taliban member dies, two to four civilians are injured, and seven are arrested.

properties.Title: Protest in Evaton, South Africa, over water shortage leads to one fatality
properties.Description: Residents in Evaton, Gauteng, South Africa, barricade roads with burning tires, rocks, and debris to protest water and electricity shortages. A 22-year-old man is fatally shot during the demonstration.

properties.Title: Water supplies in three districts in Ukraine are cut off by attacks on civilian infrastructure
