properties.Description: Israeli settlers from the Avigail settlement destroy 30 olive trees and grape vines, water containers, and solar energy power lines, and contaminate water wells in the Umm Turait Bedouin community near Shaab al Butm in Massafer Yuta (Hebron, West Bank)

properties.Title: RSF shells Al Manara water station in Karari, Khartoum, Sudan
properties.Description: On 21 October 2023, Rapid Support Forces, a paramilitary group, shelled Al Manara water station in Karari, Karrari, Khartoum, Sudan, causing the station to temporarily go out of service.

properties.Title: Wagner mercenaries attack the village of Lougui, Mali, killing seven and destroying the water tank
properties.Description: Wagner mercenaries attack the village of Lougui (Niono, Segou), Mali, killing seven civilians including the chief of the village and a marabout. The mercenaries also destroy the water tower and houses, and loot goods.

properties.Title: Clash over equitable distribution and access to potable water infrastructure in Bolivia
properties.Description: Residents of Palacio Tambo  San Lucas, Bolivia clash with residents of Japo in an ongoing issue around a potable water system from a river in Japo that would only benefit Palacio Tambo. Several residents were injured and three residents from Japo are reported missing.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers raid Palestinian properties in West Banck, cutting down olive trees and looting water pipes
properties.Description: On October 22, Israeli settlers from Avigayil settlement raid Khirbet Umm Thret near Sha'ab al-Batum in Hebron, West Bank, Palestine, cutting down olive trees, destroying electricity lines, and looting agricultural equipment and water pipes.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers steal Palestinian water pumps and cut pipes in West Bank
properties.Description: On October 22, Israeli settlers from the Suseya settlement steal two water pumps and cut water pipes belonging to Palestinians in Khirbat Susiyah, Hebron, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Civilians at a water well in Al Fitahab, Sudan are attacked, killing one
properties.Description: Civilians at a water well in Al Fitahab, Sudan are attacked by RSF artillery, killing one, wounding 6.

properties.Title: Drinking water system in Nepal is vandalized
properties.Description: An unidentified group vandalizes properties of the Roshnidanda-Rumaldev-Gadakha Lifting Drinking-Water Program, in the Chamunda Bindrasaini municipality, Nepal. The drinking-water project served more than 350 consumers in the municipality.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers take over water well on Palestinian lands in Hebron, West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: On October 23, Israeli settlers set up tents and take over a water well on Palestinian lands in the Sha'ab al-Batum area in the southern hills of Hebron, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Mothers and children protest food and water shortages in Guantanamo, Cuba, leading to violent clashes
properties.Description: In Maisi, Guantanamo on October 23, a group of mothers, together with their children, hold a demonstration against the national regime and decrying the lack of water and food. Demonstrators block roads with empty water tanks and police forces intervene, leading to violent altercations. Injuries and arrests are reported.

properties.Title: Israeli forces seize Palestinian water tank and agricultural equipment near Al Hadidiyah, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli forces seize Palestinian-owned agricultural equipment, a water tank, and two vehicles east of Al Hadidiyah village (Tubas, West Bank) (October 25).

properties.Title: Water truck is attacked near the Romo gold mines in Kenya, killing two
properties.Description: Suspected Turkana ethnic militia shoot at a truck ferrying water to the Romo gold mines at Chepiririch, Kenya by the Turkwel River killing two and wounding three others.

properties.Title: Israeli settler damage water tanks and destroy trees in Ain Al Baydha, Palestine
properties.Description: On 26 October 2023, armed Israeli settlers raid Ain Al Baydha, east of Yuta, Hebron, West Bank, Palestine, damaging over 200 commercial trees, water tanks, and other infrastructure, and looting farming equipment.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE39402; PSE38559

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy almonds and olives seedings and irrigation pipelines and loot a water pump in the West Bank
properties.Description: On October 27, Israeli settlers cut 2,000 almonds and olives seedings, destroy irrigation pipelines and loot a water pump in Al Thaala near Yuta in the West Bank.

properties.Title: Israeli forces demolish the water line to a refugee camp in the West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli forces demolish the main water line for the Jenin - Mukhayyam refugee camp, houses, and infrastructure in the West Bank.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers demolish a water tank in Ayn al Bayda (West Bank) and cut a water line
properties.Description: On October 27, Israeli settlers demolish a water tank in Ayn al Bayda (Tubas, West Bank) and cut a water line.

properties.Title: Water pipes in Umm Tuba, West Bank are destroyed by Israeli settlers
properties.Description: On 27 October, Israeli settlers storm the Umm Tuba neighborhood, Al Quds, West Bank and demolish water pipes in the area.

properties.Title: Fishers are killed in a dispute in Mali over management of a water pond
properties.Description: On October 29, fishers are killed in a dispute over management of a water pond near near the village of Troh, Segou, Mali.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy an irrigation network and water tanks in Qaryut, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers storm agricultural lands in Qaryut village, Nablus, West Bank and demolish irrigation network and water tanks.

properties.Title: The hactivist group Cyber Av3ngers claims to have hacked 10 water treatment stations in Israel on October 30
properties.Description: The hactivist group Cyber Av3ngers claims to have hacked 10 water treatment stations in Israel on October 30.

properties.Title: The water supply for the village of Troitskoye, Russia is damaged by Ukrainian shelling
properties.Description: Ukrainian military shells the village of Troitskoye (Korenevskiy, Kursk), Russia, damaging the water tower and cutting water supply for 300 people (October 31).

properties.Title: In November 2023, the second largest water testing laboratory of the Gaza municipal water utility is destroyed by Israeli forces
properties.Description: The second largest water testing laboratory of the Coastal Municipalities Water Utility  in Gaza  is destroyed by Israeli forces.

properties.Title: Hackers gain access to computers in water and wastewater systems in seven US states, forcing some to switch to manual operations
properties.Description: Cyber Av3ngers hackers gain access to computers in US water and wastewater systems in seven states, posting anti-Israel messages and forcing some to shut down their systems and switched to manual operations.
properties.Sources: Office of the Director of National Intelligence 2024

properties.Title: Russia attacks a dam in Terny, Donetsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: On 1 November 2023, Russian forces conduct an airstrike near a dam in Terny, Donetsk region, Ukraine.

properties.Title: During violence between gangs and the police in Mariani, Haiti, the National Directorate of Drinking Water and Sanitation (DINEP
properties.Description: During violence between gangs and the police in Mariani, Haiti, the National Directorate of Drinking Water and Sanitation (DINEPA) facilities are assaulted and occupied. One fatality and several injuries are reported.

properties.Title: Protesters in Guinea block roads, burn tires, and destroy army office demanding water, electricity, roads, and jobs
properties.Description: Demonstrators in Dubreka, Guinea block the road and burn tires to demand water, electricity, roads and jobs. They also attack and destroy a local army office. Some arrests are reported.

properties.Title: Gunmen shoot and kill a senior South African municipality water and sanitation official
properties.Description: Gunmen shoot and kill a senior eThekwini municipality water and sanitation official Mandeni, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa. The victim also served as the manager for Plants and Logistics in the Water and Sanitation Unit.

properties.Title: Israeli attack on southern Lebanon disrupts water supply for Tair Harfa.
properties.Description: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon in November 2023 destroy a solar-energy project that supplies electricity to operate the water well in Tair Harfa, Lebanon, disrupting its water supply.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers and military cut the main water line that feeds the town of Bayt Lid, West Bank
properties.Description: On 3 November, Israeli settlers protected by Israeli forces cut the main water line to Bayt Lid (Tulkarm, West Bank) that feeds the whole town with water.

properties.Title: Militia positions are shelled at a water station in Thiban, Syria
properties.Description: Tribal and clan forces shell Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) militia positions at a water station in Thiban, Deir ez Zor, Syria.

properties.Title: Israeli aircraft strike a water supply tank in the Gaza Strip, causing damage and killing several dozen people
properties.Description: Israeli military airplanes strike a main water supply tank east of Rafah in the Gaza Strip, causing damage and killing several dozen people.

properties.Title: Hezbollah militants attack a water tanker in Israel killing the driver
properties.Description: Hezbollah militants fire an anti-tank missile in the Shoshan base area near Yiftah, Israel hitting an Israeli water tanker and killing the driver.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage water tanks and water pipes in Ar Rakiz and Al Mafqara villages, near Hebron, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers raid Palestinian houses in Ar Rakiz and Al Mafqara villages in Mosafer Yuta, near Hebron, West Bank, damaging water tanks, water pipes, solar panels, and car tires.

properties.Title: Rioters in Bangladesh set fire to a water tanker during a clash between opposition parties and police forces
properties.Description: Rioters set fire to a water tanker in Shajahanpur, Bangladesh during a clash between opposition parties and police forces, demanding resignation of the Awami League government.

properties.Title: Violent protest and military deployments over the construction of a canal along the Massacre River and a dispute over the border
properties.Description: In Ouanaminthe, Nord-Est, Haiti residents protest the presence of Dominican soldiers at the Haitian-Dominican border during a dispute over the construction of a canal on the Massacre River.  Military are deployed in the area and during the demonstration, rioters set up barricades of burning tires, dig a ditch, and attack the departmental head of the Protected Areas of Surveillance Brigade (BSAP) a
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. HTI5476; ID. DOM624

properties.Title: Community members from Aquixcuatitla, Hidalgo, Mexico abduct a public official and clash with police in a dispute over a drinkin
properties.Description: In Huejutla de Reyes, Hidalgo, Mexico community members from Aquixcuatitla abduct a public official from the Huejutla de Reyes municipality in a dispute over the drinking water pumping system electricity contract. Police rescue him and clash with the rioters, who attack them with machetes.

properties.Title: Attack by Israel on the system providing energy for the Gaza Central Wastewater Treatment Plant
properties.Description: In November, Israeli air strikes destroy part of the energy production system, including solar panels, that provided energy for the Gaza Central Wastewater Treatment Plant, opened in April 2021 with the help of EU funding. The plant served 11 communities and one million people.

properties.Title: RSF militia seize dam near El Fasher, imposing water fines and blocking tanks; Sudan Armed Forces retaliate
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) militia seize Goro dam and reservoir near El Fasher (Al Fasher, North Darfur) (November 8) and begin imposing fines on civilians attempting to fetch water. They also prevent water tanks from entering the city after the water supply is cut off. Sudan Armed Forces airstrikes target Rapid Support Forces (RSF) on November 13, with numerous deaths reported.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SUD23724; SUD23805; SUD23716; SUD23693

properties.Title: Ukrainian military shells damage a water tower in Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian military shell the village of Novostroyevka-Pervaya, Belgorod, Russia damaging a water tower, November 8.

properties.Title: Rioters in Iraq protesting the lack of jobs shut down water projects in Thi Qar, Iraq and fire on security forces, killing one
properties.Description: Dozens riot in the Bada area of Shatrah district, Thi Qar, Iraq over lack of jobs. The rioters close water projects in the area and when security forces try to disperse the riot and reopen the water projects rioters open fire at the security forces killing one and injuring another.

properties.Title: Israeli forces bulldoze the main water pipeline in the West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli forces bulldoze the main water pipeline in Kisan, near Bethlehem, West Bank, on November 9.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage water pipeline to At Tuwani villagte, Hebron, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers raided At Tuwani village (Hebron, West Bank) on November 10 and attacked Palestinian farmers harvesting olives. The settlers also damage the main water pipeline in the village.

properties.Title: Israel shells the Kawkab dam in Syria in response to attacks from this area on the Golan
properties.Description: Israeli forces shell the Kawkab dam in rural western Dara, Syria in response to unidentified shelling originating from the area targeting the Golan.

properties.Title: A political clash turns violent in India over the failure to complete an irrigation project in Telangana
properties.Description: On November 14, members of the Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) political party assault members of the  Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) including the Nalgonda District President in Nellikal village Telangana, India, while the BJP was demonstrating against the BRS for not completing the Nellikal Lift irrigation project as promised.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water main feeding Khirbat al Thaala, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers from the Karmiel settlement destroy a main water line that feeds Khirbat al Thaala in Mosafer Yuta in Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: Water treatment factory and infrastructure destroyed in Gaza City during the Israeli attack on Gaza
properties.Description: Fire destroys the Abdul Salam Yaseen Water Company factory on the outskirts of Gaza City during the Israeli invasion of Gaza. This water treatment plant produced domestic, agricultural, and industrial water and wastewater pumps and equipment for large-scale water desalination units and plants.

properties.Title: A dam in Sudan is attacked and damaged during fighting between Sudanese Armed Forces and the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces
properties.Description: In November 2023, attacks on the Jebel Aulia Dam in Sudan during fighting between Sudanese Armed Forces and the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces damage the infrastructure, cut its ability to regulate water levels and deliveries, and threatens dam collapse.

properties.Title: Israeli fighter jets strike a water project on the outskirts a town in Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli fighter jets strike a water project on the outskirts of Taybeh, Marjayoun, Lebanon on November 19.

properties.Title: Israeli forces destroy a Palestinian water reservoir, water pipeline, and olive plantings in Yuta, West Bank
properties.Description: On November 20 Israeli settlers demolish housing, a school's water tanks, a water pipeline, and uproot 70 olive seedings in Yuta, Hebron, West Bank.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE41345; Middle East Monitor 2023

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy a Palestinian water well in Massafer Yuta, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli forces demolish houses, a sheep pen, and a water well in Shaab al Batm and Main areas in Massafer Yuta, Hebron, West Bank on November 22.

properties.Title: Russia attacks a water pumping station in Vovchansk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces shell Vovchansk, Kharkiv, Ukraine, damaging two generators of the local water pumping station.

properties.Title: Russia attacks the water supply system of Nikopol, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces launch four drone strikes and shell Nikopol, Ukraine, damaging the water supply system on November 22.

properties.Title: A Pennsylvania water authority, with several other organizations, is the victim of a cyberattack by Iran-affiliated hackers
properties.Description: In November 2023, an Iranian-linked group, "Cyber Av3ngers," targets multiple organizations, including a small Pennsylvania town's water provider. Earlier this year, a Russian-linked "hactivist" group attempted to disrupt operations at several Texas utilities.

properties.Title: Ukraine attacks a Russian military outpost at an occupied water tower in Donetsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: On November 26 Russian military forces occupy a water tower in Horlivka, Donetsk, Ukraine, which is then attacked by Ukrainian forces, destroying a machine gun position and ammunication depot.

properties.Title: Caste violence kills one Dalit man for using a public tap to drink water in India
properties.Description: In mob and caste violence on November 27, several people assault and kill a man from the Dalit community in Sathra village, Uttar Pradesh, India for using a public tap to drink water. One person is arrested.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND145392; The India Express 2023

properties.Title: Israeli forces destroy a water network and water tanks in the Birin area, Hebron, West Bank
properties.Description: On November 27, Israeli forces destroy two houses, three dunam of agricultural lands cultivated with olive trees, and a water network and tanks in Birin area, Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: Violent clash between Hawazmah-Baggara and Nuba clans in Sudan over access to water kills as many as nine and injuring others
properties.Description: The Hawazmah-Baggara and Nuba clans in Sundan clash when Nuba prevent the pastoralists from watering livestock and limit access to water sources in Al Tabldiat and Abu Zaid neighborhoods in Dilling. Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) shell the region killing as many as nine and wounding eight more, destroying houses and displacing residents.

properties.Title: A clash between two clans in Somalia kills one and leads to the destruction of houses and water reservoirs
properties.Description: Dhulbante clan militia in Somalia set fire and destroy houses and water reservoirs belonging to Habarjeco clan in Boodhlay village, Ceerigaabo, Sanaag. One civilian is killed.

properties.Title: In a dispute between the regions in India over irrigation and drinking water, police take control of a dam and release water
properties.Description: In India on November 30, about 700 police personnel from Andhra Pradesh (AP) clash with Telangana state special police forces guarding the Nagarjunasagar dam on Krishna River in Nalgonda district in a long-standing dispute over water sharing and releases of irrigation water. AP police take control over the dam and irrigation officials start releasing water into Andhra Pradesh.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND145511; Apparasu 2023

properties.Title: Israeli forces destroy Palestinian water containers, water lines, and more near Jenin, West Bank
properties.Description: On November 30, Israeli forces demolish Palestinian-owned residences, water containers, solar panels, and electricity and water lines in Firasin, Jenin, West Bank.

properties.Title: A community water system in Ireland is hacked, cutting water supply to 180 households for two days
properties.Description: In December 2023, a community-owned and managed water system in Ireland is hacked and a computer controller is disabled, cutting water supply to 180 households for two days. The hackers stated the equipment was targeted because it originated in Israel.

properties.Title: Boko Haram and ISIS militants attack fishing communities, killing 7, abducting 25, and forcing thousands to flee
properties.Description: Boko Haram and Islamic State West Africa Province militants launch over a dozen attacks on fishing communities as part of the longstanding land and water disputes in the northern part of Logone-et-Chari division, abducting around 25 people and killing at least seven. Thousands flee to the southern parts of the division.

properties.Title: Desalination plant in Gaza bombed by Israel
properties.Description: In December 2023, the Eta Water company reports at least one of its desalination plants in Gaza has been bombed by Israel.

properties.Title: A violent conflict erupts in Chiapas, Mexico over the control and allocation of water from a spring
properties.Description: Around 80 residents from Tunapaz, Chichabantelja, Chiapas, Mexico protest the lack of an agreement for the distribution of water from a local spring in Chic'habantelja on December 3. Some protestors start shooting in the air, open a ditch in the road, and cut off electricity service. The rioters also throw stones and sticks at their neighbors resulting in at least eight indigenous people injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water lines to several Palestinian communities near Yuta, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy main water lines that feed the Al Asfa, Maghayer Al Ubied, and At Tubah communities near Yuta, Hebron, West Bank on December 3.

properties.Title: Residents in Omiltemi, Mexico cut off water to the municipality in protest over failure to receive water services or other benef
properties.Description: Residents from Omiltemi in Chilpancingo de los Bravo, Guerrero, cut off the pumps that supply water to the municipality to demand compensation for the failure to receive any water, fire protection, or other benefits for 50 years.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MEX81860; Arista 2023

properties.Title: Violence between Meiteis and Kuki communities in India include attacks on the Maphou Dam
properties.Description: Armed Kuki assailants attack villages near Maphou Dam located in Thoubal River and Meitei villages, India. The Gorkha regiment of the Indian army and local police forces retaliate with several rounds of firing. Numerous injuries are reported. The dam has been at the center of disputes between Meiteis and Kuki communities.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND145943; Bordoloi 2024

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian almond trees and seize water containers and pipelines in the Al Tabaq area of the West Bank
properties.Description: On December 10, Israeli settlers from the Tekoa settlement uproot 15 Palestinian-owned almond trees, cut fences, and seize water containers and pipelines in Al Tabaq area in Tuqu, Bethlehem, West Bank.

properties.Title: A dispute among water pipe operators leaves one dead, one injured in Mexico
properties.Description: Two armed individuals traveling on a motorcycle shoot workers in a dispute over water pipe operators in Chalco de Diaz Covarrubias, Mexico. One person is killed and one injured.

properties.Title: Israeli forces destroy a Palestinian water well and agricultural road near Bethlehem, West Bank
properties.Description: On December 11, Israeli forces bulldoze an agricultural road and demolish a Palestinian-owned water well in Artas, near Bethlehem, West Bank.

properties.Title: The Israeli military begins pumping water into tunnel complexes in Gaza
properties.Description: The Israeli military begins pumping seawater into Hamas' tunnel complex in Gaza in an effort to destroy them.

properties.Title: Two soldiers in Benin killed by JNIM militants as they go to fetch water
properties.Description: On December 12, an IED likely planted by JNIM militants (a subgroup of Katibat Mouslimou formed in Burkina Faso) kill two Benin soldiers who were going to fetch water in the vicinity of Bako Maka, Alibori.

properties.Title: Water containers are booby-trapped with explosives by IS militants in Iraq
properties.Description: Popular Mobilization Forces defuse five booby-trapped water containers in Ramadi, western Al Anbar, Iraq. The booby traps contained TNT and other high-explosives and were left behind by IS militants.

properties.Title: Mobapane residents in Gauteng, South Africa take officials hostage over illegal water disconnections, block reservoir exit
properties.Description: In December, residents of Mobapane, Gauteng, South Africa take officials from the Water and Sanitation Department and Tshwane Metro police hostage and threaten them with violence when the officials came to disconnect illegal water connections at the local reservoir. Residents blocked the reservoir exit with rocks, temporarily trapping the officials and police.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water containers in Hebron area of the West Bank
properties.Description: On December 13, Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water containers in the Shaab Al Batm and Wadi Abu Juhaish area in Massafer Yuta, Hebron, West Bank.

properties.Title: Israeli military shoots six Palestinians filling water at the Al Shifa Hospital, Gaza
properties.Description: Israeli snipers shoot and injure six Palestinians filling water in Al Shifa Hospital in Gaza City, Gaza Strip.

properties.Title: Farmers in Guerrero, Mexico cut off a pipeline water supply to demand improved government response to Hurricane Otis
properties.Description: Farmers around Acapulco de Juarez, Guerrero, Mexico disrupt pumping equipment of the Lomas de Chapultepec pipeline to demand better federal government response to the rural impacts of Hurricane Otis. The disruption cut off a water supply to the region.

properties.Title: Greenpeace activists cut of the water supply to a Spanish water agency in protest over water pollution
properties.Description: In December, Greenpeace activists cut off the water in the office of the hydrographic confederation in Laguna de Duero (Castilla y Leon, Spain) to demand the cessation of nitrate pollution.

properties.Title: Protestors and police clash at a protest over a water treatment plant in Puebla, Mexico
properties.Description: In Santa Ana Xalmimilulco, Puebla, Mexico, municipal police, state police, and demonstrators clash at a protest over the construction of a new water treatment plant. The protesters feel the plant will harm the aquifers of the community in Colonia Los Tanques. Six state police are injured and at least eight environmental activists are arrested. According to residents, the police shoot at the rioter

properties.Title: Sinaloa Cartel in Mexico cuts off water and electricity to force community into joining roadblocks in territorial dispute
properties.Description: Members of the Sinaloa Cartel in Chiapas, Mexico cut off water and electricity in the community to pressure community members to join roadblocks and participate in a dispute over territorial control.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike destroys a water desalination plant in Jabalya, Gaza
properties.Description: On December 22, Israeli artillery shell Jabalya town in Gaza Strip, killing an unspecified number of Palestinians and injuring several others. Warplanes strike a house, kill six, and destroy a water desalination plant.

properties.Title: Israelis destroy water supply line in Al Minya, West Bank
properties.Description: On December 22, Israeli forces destroy water supply line network in Al Minya, Bethlehem, West Bank, that supplies water to the village.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike kills two and injures several others filling water in Khan Yunis, Gaza
properties.Description: Israeli airstrikes kill two Palestinians and injure several others filling water in Khan Yunis, Gaza Strip.

properties.Title: Israeli settler rioters destroy water infrastructure in Jalud, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy olive trees, water containers, and irrigation lines in Jalud, Nablus, West Bank.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water systems on Palestinian lands in Jalud, West Bank
properties.Description: On December 24, Israeli settler rioters chop down 60 olive trees and destroy water containers and irrigation lines on Palestinian-owned lands in Qitaa Kamel in Jalud, Nablus, West Bank.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike on a car belonging to the Gazan Water Authority kills three.
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes carry  out airstrikes in Khan Yunis, Gaza, including an attack on a car belonging to the Gazan Water Authority, killing three.

properties.Title: KRRS members storm a water pumping station, Karnataka, India seeking compensation for lands damaged by a dam
properties.Description: Karnataka Rajya Raitha Sangha (KRRS) members protest and storm the Thumbe water pumping station in Thumbe town, Karnataka, India demanding compensation for farmers whose lands are damaged due to water releases from the dam.

properties.Title: One person killed in explosion of water well mined with an IED by JNIM militants in Sorga, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: A water well mined with an IED by JNIM militants (a subgroup of Katibat Mouslimou formed in Burkina Faso) explodes in the area of Sorga, Bogande, Burkina Faso, killing one.

properties.Title: Ukrainian military shells Belgorod, causing casualties and water pipes damages
properties.Description: Ukrainian military shells Belgorod with over 13 rockets, killing one man and damaging houses, cars, and gas and water pipes.

properties.Title: Israeli settler rioters chop down Palestinian olive trees and destroy water meters in Jenin, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settler rioters chop down Palestinian-owned olive trees and destroy water meters for agricultural lands in Khirbat al Makhal, southwest of Jenin, in the West Bank on December 31.

properties.Title: The main warehouse of the Coastal Municipalities Water Utility in Gaza is destroyed and seven people are killed
properties.Description: The main warehouse of the Coastal Municipalities Water Utility in Gaza is destroyed, seven people are killed, and $9 million in water equipment and supplies are destroyed.

properties.Title: The "water tanker mafia" in Kwa-Zulu Natal, South Africa is accused of actively sabotaging water infrastructure
properties.Description: The "water tanker mafia" in Kwa-Zulu Natal, South Africa is accused of actively sabotaging water infrastructure to continue and prolong contracts with municipalities to deliver water.

properties.Title: Three-fifths of 350 US/British utilities surveyed report cyberattacks with a majority suffering serious disruption
properties.Description: Over three-fifths of 350 US and British water and electricity firms surveyed report being targeted by cyberattacks in 2024 with a majority suffering serious disruption or permanent corruption or destruction of data or systems.

properties.Title: The Bani Saeed water pipeline from Israel to Gaza is shut down due to damage from military activities
properties.Description: The Bani Saeed Mekorot water line from Israel to Gaza is shut down for 10 days after sustaining damage due to military activities, cutting expected water supply to zero.

properties.Title: The Southern Gaza Desalination Plant is shut down for four days after damages from military actions
properties.Description: The Southern Gaza Desalination Plant serving the Deir al Balah, Khan Younis, and Rafah governorates is shut down for four days due to attacks on power lines to the plant. Operations resume after repairs.

properties.Title: Armed clans clash over river water; one killed, six wounded in Yirol, South Sudan
properties.Description: Two clans armed with wooden sticks and spears clash over river water at a cattle camp in Nyinloou, Yirol, South Sudan. One person is killed and six people are left with stab wounds.

properties.Title: Deadly clashes are reported between Syrian regime forces and the Islamic State over control of Wadi Adiad Dam
properties.Description: Clashes take place between Syrian regime forces and IS members around Wadi Abiad Dam in eastern Homs and resulted in deaths and injuries.

properties.Title: National Defence Forces (QDW) member executed after attempt to poison water tanks in northern Homs, Syria
properties.Description: A National Defence Forces (QDW) member is executed by firing squad after being captured attempting to poison regime-affiliated water tanks in rural northern Homs, Syria.

properties.Title: Turkish drone attacks water facilities in a rural village in Syria
properties.Description: Turkish drones target a water station and water storage facilities in the village of Shirk in rural Al Hasakeh, Syria. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan militants kill a security guard while he collects water in Dera Ismail Khan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) militants fatally shoot a security guard in the town of Drazinda in Dera Ismail Khan District, Pakistan. The guard is attacked while fetching water.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike kills two Palestinian workers repairing water pipes in Gaza, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes carry out an airstrike in Abasan al Kabirah, located in the Khan Yunis area of the Gaza Strip, Palestine. The attack kills two Palestinian workers who are repairing water pipes.

properties.Title: A union leader is killed in dispute over control of drinking water pipes in Solidaridad, Mexico
properties.Description: Armed assailants kill a man in Valle de Chalco Solidaridad, Mexico. Authorities link the attack to an ongoing rivalry between labor unions competing for control over drinking water pipelines.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drone strikes damage water facility in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces carry out drone strikes on Donetsk People's Republic (DPR) positions in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine. A water pumping station is damaged in the attack.

properties.Title: A pro-Russia hacktivist group gains control over computers at Texas, USA water and wastewater systems causing flooding
properties.Description: On 18 January 2024, a pro-Russia hactivist group accesses control systems at two Texas water facilities and tampers with water pumps and alarms, causing water to run past designated shutoff levels and overfill storage tanks.
properties.Sources: Office of the Director of National Intelligence 2024

properties.Title: Al Shabaab explosive device destroys water truck in Lower Shabelle, Somalia
properties.Description: An improvised explosive device planted by Al Shabaab destroys a water truck in a convoy from the African Union Transition Mission and Uganda Peoples' Defence Forces in Lower Shabelle, Somalia.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage Palestinian crops and pollute water well in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers contaminate a water well and destroy Palestinian crops in Hebron, Palestine.

properties.Title: Police beat protesters in Delfan, Iran, during demonstration over textile factory's impact on water resources
properties.Description: Residents and farmers from the villages of Hasanabad and Aliabad, in Delfan county, Iran, protest at the Red Crescent Delfan textile factory construction site against the loss pastures and the drying up of water resources. Police beat the protesters with batons in response. Several people are taken to hospital for their injuries.

properties.Title: A water pump is stolen and equipment damaged during a clash with police in Napeitom, Kenya
properties.Description: Unidentified assailants clash with police, destroy a water pump, and steal equipment in Napeitom, Kenya.

properties.Title: Five killed and two injured when military forces are attacked while fetching water in Myanmar
properties.Description: Forces of the Taw Bone Gyi People's Defence Force and Tanintharyi Yoma Force attack Myanmar military troops in the Tanintharyi region of Myanmar while they are fetching water. In the battle, five soldiers are killed and two injured.

properties.Title: Russian shelling damages water filtration plant near Karlivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces shell an area near Karlivka, in the Donetsk region of Ukraine, damaging a water filtration station.

properties.Title: A woman is injured in a water access protest in Ecatepec de Morelos, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents in Ecatepec de Morelos, Mexico, protest to demand drinking water services. During the protest, a car strikes a female demonstrator, who receives medical care and the driver is arrested.

properties.Title: A clash over the lack of water services in the eThekwini Municipality township in South Africa injures many protesters
properties.Description: During a protest over the lack of water services, about two dozen residents of the Phoenix township in South Africa are injured in a confrontation with the South African Police Service (SAPS) and Durban Metro Police. The protest was planned by the Voice of Phoenix, a civic movement concerned with the failures of water service delivery in the eThekwini Municipality township.

properties.Title: Two Rand Water executives shot dead in Johannesburg, South Africa
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen open fire in City of Johannesburg, South Africa, killing two Rand Water executives and injuring the city’s chief whip along with two others, in what has been described as mafia-style incidents around disputed control of water, water utility corruption, and competition over service delivery.
properties.Sources: The Water Diplomat 2024; Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SAF20521; Ngcobo 2024

properties.Title: Civilian and police reservist killed in clash at water point in Nakwamoru, Kenya
properties.Description: Unknown gunmen shoot and kill a civilian during a raid at a watering point in Nakwamoru, Kenya, likely due to pastoral violence in the area. Afterwards, there is a clash between the unknown assailants and the National Police Reservists. A police reservist is killed.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers puncture Palestinian-owned water containers in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers in Hebron, Palestine, puncture Palestinian-owned water containers, dismantle a tent and cut down 20 olive trees.

properties.Title: Armed group abducts water tanker driver in threat over water deliveries in Manipur, India
properties.Description: Around 15 suspected armed Kuki assailants abduct a Muslim water tanker driver near Moreh town in Manipur, India, after he delivers water to Indian Reserve Battalion (IRB) police forces. The driver is released later the same day with a warning not to supply them with water again.

properties.Title: Russian attacks on Ukrainian energy systems disrupt water supply in the city of Nikopol
properties.Description: Due to Russian attacks, an overhead power line is severed, the water supply station is cut off in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast and disruptions in the water supply in the city of Nikopol are recorded.

properties.Title: Independent Electoral Commission official injured during demonstration over water shortages near Kamaqhekeza, South Africa
properties.Description: Residents protest the lack of water and the poor state of roads in the village of Dludluma, near Kamaqhekeza, South Africa, assaulting and injuring an electoral commission official.

properties.Title: Solar energy for water stations looted during clash in Babanussa, Sudan
properties.Description: Solar energy systems for water stations are looted during a battle between Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) and Rapid Support Forces (RSF) in Babanussa, Sudan.

properties.Title: Water offices and vehicles torched, two left injured during anti-government protest in Petit-Goave, Haiti
properties.Description: Residents in Petit-Goave, Haiti, protest against Prime Minister Ariel Henry, burning tires and setting fire to the National Directorate of Drinking Water and Sanitation (DINEPA) office and two of its vehicles. Police intervene with firearms, injuring two demonstrators.

properties.Title: Locals injured by grenade blast during protest over contaminated water in Ah Htet Hpa Re, Myanmar
properties.Description: The Kachin Independence Army attacks villagers protesting water contamination from rare earth mineral mining in the village of Ah Htet Hpa Re, Myanmar. Two people are injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water pipelines in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settler rioters destroy water pipelines and grape vine seedlings in Hebron, Palestine.

properties.Title: Israeli drone strike damages water infrastructure in Al Wazzani, Lebanon
properties.Description: Water infrastructure is damaged during an Israeli drone attacks in Al Wazzani, Lebanon.

properties.Title: Israeli drone strike targets Palestinians collecting water, killing 13 in Gaza, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike a group filling water jugs in Gaza City, Palestine, killing 13 Palestinians and injuring a number of others.

properties.Title: Israeli snipers kill eight Palestinians collecting water near Naser Hospital, Gaza, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli snipers kill eight Palestinians filling water containers near Naser Hospital in Gaza, Palestine.

properties.Title: Syrian Democratic Forces shells water stations and depots in Jarablus, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) attacks water depots and stations with heavy machine guns in Jarablus, Syria.

properties.Title: Russian attack on oil depot leads to major oil spill into the Nemyshlia River, Ukraine
properties.Description: More than 3,000 tons of oil spill into the Nemyshlia River in the Kharkiv Region after a Russian attack on Ukrainian energy systems.

properties.Title: Houthi forces abduct 70 civilians; authorities cut off water from villages in Jiblah, Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi fighters abduct 70 civilians from two villages in Jiblah, Yemen, following the death of a Houthi leader during a clash with a family a week earlier. Houthi authorities also cut off the villages' water supply.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. YEM85564, YEM85565

properties.Title: Naxal-Maoist rebels abducted four Jal Jeevan Mission drinking water scheme workers in Sukma, India
properties.Description: Naxal-Maoist rebels abduct at least four workers involved in the Jal Jeevan Mission drinking water scheme in a forest in the Sukma district of Chhattisgarh, India. The armed rebels also seized a JBC machine used for excavating, obstructing the development project.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND150290; O.rganiser 2024

properties.Title: Water company worker assaulted over water network leak in Cartagena, Colombia
properties.Description: A group of people in a residential complex in Cartagena, Columbia, temporarily detain and assault a water company worker over a leak in the water network which had not been repaired. They seize his motorcycle keys and damage his phone before police intervene to protect him and restore order.

properties.Title: Deadly fight over water supply line in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Residents and local builders clash with guns and physical violence in Karachi, Pakistan, over an illegal water supply line. One person is killed and two others injured.

properties.Title: Dispute over water point in Narus, South Sudan, critically injures several and displaces thousands
properties.Description: Bunno and Nyianginyang sections of the Toposa clash with stones and sticks over ownership of the Lokisele Lopua water point in Narus, South Sudan. Between nine and 11 people are critically injured, and 11,000 are displaced.

properties.Title: Protest over construction of the Kikar-Navgaon drinking water scheme injures police and guard in Himachal Pradesh, India
properties.Description: A demonstration against the Kikar-Navgaon drinking water scheme in a village in Himachal Pradesh, India results in seven policemen and one home guard being injured. Around 400 locals associated with the Ali Khud Bachao Sangarsh Samiti (Save the Ali River Tributary Struggle Committee) pelt stones and machinery at the police, claiming the scheme would deprive other areas of drinking water. The polic

properties.Title: Police injure Tibetans during protest over dam project that will displace villagers in Dege County, China
properties.Description: Over 300 Tibetans protest outside a local town hall in Dege County, China, demanding the government withdraw its plans to build a dam that will displace residents of at least two villages and affect six monasteries. Police disperse the crowds with electronic batons, pepper sprays and water cannons, causing injuries. More than 100 demonstrators are arrested.

properties.Title: Armed dispute over village water tank construction leaves six injured in Pachladi, India
properties.Description: Two groups clash over alleged encroachment of land as a result of the construction of a water tank for public use in the village of Pachladi, India. Sticks, bricks and rods are used in the dispute, leaving six people injured.

properties.Title: Clashes among different refugee groups over access to drinking water kill three in a refugee camp in Kakuma, Kenya
properties.Description: Refugees from South Sudan clashed with refugees from Africa's Great Lakes region, mainly Congolese, Burundians, and Rwandans at the Kakuma refugee camp in Kakuma, Kenya, over drinking water resources. The clash results in the death of three South Sudanese refugees.

properties.Title: Police kill militiaman after shooting of a boy collecting water in Gwadabawa, Nigeria
properties.Description: After Sokoto militia shoot a boy in the leg while he is collecting water, the police and vigilantes engage the militia in a firefight on the outskirts of a village in Gwadabawa, Nigeria. The battle results in the death of one militiaman.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water meters in Kifil Haris, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settler rioters destroy several water meters belonging to Palestinians during a raid on Kifil Haris, Palestine, to perform Jewish prayers in the area.

properties.Title: Al Shabab blows up water truck and claims three soldiers killed in Lower Shabelle, Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab detonates a remote-controlled explosive device, targeting Uganda Peoples' Defence Forces (UPDF) and African Union Transition Mission in Somalia (ATMIS) troops in Lower Shabelle, Somalia, as they pass between two villages. A water truck is destroyed and Al Shabaab claims to have killed three soldiers.

properties.Title: Two young men lynched by residents of Maharashtra, India, over alleged theft of motor-operated water pump
properties.Description: Two men in their twenties are lynched with bamboo sticks by residents as they allegedly attempt to steal a motor-operated water pump, in Maharashtra, India.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND151156; Khan 2024

properties.Title: Residents beaten by police during protest over water reconnection in Oaxaca, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents of colonia Benito Juarez in Salina Cruz, Oaxaca, stage a protest to demand reconnection to a municipal drinking water pipeline. Military and municipal police intervene violently, beating demonstrators.

properties.Title: Protest against a water supply project in Kerala, India, leaves official injured
properties.Description: Indian National Congress members, including two members of the Legislative Assembly, protest against a Kerala Industrial Infrastructure Development Corporation (KINFRA) water supply project in Aluva, Kerala. Demonstrators assault KINFRA officials, leaving one with minor injuries.

properties.Title: FAMa and Wagner forces kill five civilians and destroy a water tower in Tachorft, Mali
properties.Description: FAMa (Malian Armed Forces) and Wagner forces kill five civilians and destroy a water tower in the village of Tachorft in Bourem, Mali. Corpses are booby-trapped with improvised explosives.

properties.Title: Mob stones a man to death who is accused of stealing a school water tank in Nairobi, Kenya
properties.Description: A mob in the Riruta area of Nairobi, Kenya, stones a man to death for allegedly attempting to steal a school water tank.

properties.Title: Two men killed, 10 arrested and water towers destroyed during FAMa raid in Bourem, Mali
properties.Description: Malian Armed Forces (FAMa) loots property and destroy houses, water towers and a mosque in Bourem, Mali. They kill two civilians and arrest 10 others.

properties.Title: Turkish airstrike destroys livestock water project in Duhok, Iraq
properties.Description: A Turkish airstrike destroys a livestock water project near Belave village in Duhok, Iraq.

properties.Title: Clashes between regime members and QSD forces damage water station near Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Armed clashes between regime forces and Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria, damage a water station. Casualties unknown.

properties.Title: Protesters injured in clash with police over lack of water and services in Free State, South Africa
properties.Description: Residents block a highway in Botshabelo, Free State, demanding water, electricity and basic services. Police disperse the crowd with rubber bullets and arrest 12. A community leader says some protesters were beaten, and there are allegations live ammunition was used.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SAF20748; Semela 2024

properties.Title: Water supply is cut by workers protesting unpaid salaries in Kohat, Pakistan
properties.Description: Water and Sanitation Services Company workers in Kohat, Pakistan, suspend water supply during a protest over unpaid salaries.

properties.Title: Durban municipal workers vandalize water meters in salary protest, South Africa
properties.Description: Durban Solid Waste workers overturn refuse bins, abandon vehicles, and vandalize water meters in a protest demanding higher salaries.

properties.Title: Chinese dam workers are attacked and killed in Pakistan
properties.Description: Five Chinese nationals working on the Dasu hydroelectric dam site are killed along with their driver on March 26 when a suicide bomber targeted their vehicle in northwest Pakistan.

properties.Title: At least 15 injured in clash over land irrigation system in Bogra, Bangladesh
properties.Description: Two groups of villagers clash with batons and rods in Aolakandi village in Bogra, Bangladesh, during a dispute over the local irrigation system. At least 15 people are injured.

properties.Title: Municipal workers sabotage water infrastructure in Durban, South Africa, amid wage strike
properties.Description: Members of South African Municipal Workers' Union in Durban vandalize and sabotage water infrastructure during five days of protests over wage increases.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SAF20774, SAF20743, SAF20820

properties.Title: Islamic State fighters destroy a water tank and injure shepherd in Homs countryside, Syria
properties.Description: Islamic State (IS) fighters attack shepherds in rural Homs, Syria, destroying a water tank and killing 80 sheep. One shepherd is wounded.

properties.Title: Municipal water truck driver injured during labor strikes in Durban, South Africa
properties.Description: Unknown suspects attack a municipal water truck driver in Phoenix, Durban, during strikes led by the South African Municipal Workers' Union. The driver is hospitalized.

properties.Title: Russian shelling kills a civilian and damages water facility in Sumy, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian shelling in Sumy, Ukraine, damages a water facility, medical facilities and a school. One civilian is killed and another wounded.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers cut water pipes and harass Bedouin families in Tubas, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers in Ain As Sakout in West Bank, Palestine, harass Bedouin families, cutting water pipes, blocking roads and throwing stones, driving the Palestinian families from the area.

properties.Title: Protesters injured in clash over access to water and electricity in Durban, South Africa
properties.Description: Students and residents barricade streets with burning tires and throw objects at the police over water and electricity shortages in Durban, South Africa. Police arrest five demonstrators and some are left injured.

properties.Title: Protest over poor water services leaves one hospitalized in Ataq, Yemen
properties.Description: Residents in Ataq, Yemen, march to the governor’s house in protest over poor water service. Guards intervene with force, with a protester requiring hospital treatment for their injuries.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water pipeline and crops in Bethlehem, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a Palestinian-owned water pipeline and crops in Al Jabah in Bethlehem, Palestine.

properties.Title: A Sudanese nomad watering cattle is killed at water source in Unity, South Sudan
properties.Description: Armed youth attack and kill a Sudanese nomad watering his cattle in Pan-Akuach, Unity. The assailants flee when security forces arrive at the scene.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drone strike damages water pipes in Belgorod, Russia
properties.Description: Water pipes are damaged when the village of Golovchino in Belgorod, Russia, is shelled and struck by a Ukrainian drone. The strike also damages houses, cars and a gas pipe. No casualties are reported.

properties.Title: Russian airstrike disrupts water supply in Bilopillia, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out an airstrike on Bilopillia, Sumy. The strike damages a critical component of the city's water supply system, leading to water outages.

properties.Title: Activists cut off water supply in protest over tourism industry consumption amid drought in Barcelona, Spain
properties.Description: Activists in Barcelona demand restrictions are placed on the tourism industry's water consumption in light of the severe drought in Cataluna. They occupy the Turisme de Barcelona Consortium, shutting off the water supply.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike damages water and power networks in Tay Harfa, Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike Tayr Harfa, South Lebanon, targeting Hezbollah militants. The attack causes major damage to water and electricity networks.

properties.Title: The Coastal Municipalities Water Utility headquarters and main water testing laboratory are destroyed by Israeli bombs
properties.Description: The Coastal Municipalities Water Utility headquarters and main water testing laboratory are destroyed by Israeli bombs.

properties.Title: Gangs attack water and food deliveries in Haiti in power struggle
properties.Description: In Haiti, gangs, including the "G9" gang, struggle for power and attack water and food deliveries causing severe shortages among Haiti's poorest.

properties.Title: Russian missile strike damages power plant, interrupting heat and water supply in Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out a missile strike on Burshtynska thermal power plant in the Ivano-Frankivsk region of Ukraine. The strike disrupts heat generation and hot water supply and injures an employee.

properties.Title: Russia attacks the Dnipro Dam on World Water Day causing massive damage and power outages
properties.Description: Ukraine's largest dam, the Dnipro Dam, is attacked by Russia, causing massive damage and leading to extensive blackouts in Ukraine. This attack falls on World Water Day.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. UKR152844; British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) 2024

properties.Title: Gang attack on water board members and local officials inspecting spring leaves six dead and three injured in Chiapas, Mexico
properties.Description: Water board members and local officials are attacked with gunfire while inspecting a spring near the town of Pantelhó, Chiapas, Mexico, leaving six dead and injuring three. The attack is carried out by the Los Herrera gang, who controlled the municipality until 2021. Residents report that the authorities had asked the Ministry of National Defense (SEDENA) to accompany them to the spring, but the r
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MEX85527; LaJornada 2024

properties.Title: JNIM militants attack women and damage water pump in Gorgadji, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group) militants attack and injure four women and damage a water pump at a borehole in Gorgadji, Burkina Faso.

properties.Title: Israeli gunfire aimed at El Meri farmers in Levanon leaves water tanks and bee hives badly damaged
properties.Description: Israeli forces fire machine guns at farmers in El Meri, Lebanon, causing extensive damage to the town's water tanks and bee hives.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. LBN19690, LBN19688

properties.Title: Bahrain's Jaw Prison inmates protest over living conditions; prison cuts off drinking water in response
properties.Description: Detainees of Jaw Prison, Bahrain, protest to demand improved living conditions. Prison officials cut off drinking water to the protesters.

properties.Title: Israeli strike on café in Ras al Naqoura, Lebanon, kills four and destroys water and electricity networks
properties.Description: An Israeli airstrike hits a café in Ras al Naqoura, South Lebanon. The attack destroys water and electricity networks in the town and kills four people, including an Amal movement member and a health worker.

properties.Title: Missile debris damages water supply pipeline in Chernivtsi, Ukraine
properties.Description: Debris from intercepted Russian missiles damages a water supply pipeline and an administrative building in Chernivtsi, Ukraine.

properties.Title: RSF shelling in Khartoum kills two and damages Al Manara water station
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) targets Al Manara water station in Al Jarrafa, Khartoum, Sudan. The attack leaves two dead and damages the water station.

properties.Title: The Cyber Army of Russia hacks the computer systems of the Tipton Wastewater Treatment Plant, Indiana, USA and posts video
properties.Description: The Cyber Army of Russia hacks the Tipton Wastewater Treatment Plant, Indiana, United States and posts a video showing the attack. The utility switched to manual operations.

properties.Title: Women protesting the impacts of mines on water systems in Bolivia are attacked
properties.Description: Environmental activists in Bolivia are targeted with death threats and bombings after speaking out against mining operations contaminating water resources in Oruro, Bolivia. Women protesting the harmful impacts of mining are attacked, their campsites burned, and miners allegedly throw dynamite into their homes.

properties.Title: Chinese hacking campaign gains access to major water, energy, and telecomm systems, including in US
properties.Description: An ongoing Chinese hacking campaign known as Volt Typhoon successfully gains access to numerous US-based companies in telecommunications, energy, water, and other critical sectors, with 23 pipeline operators targeted.

properties.Title: Protesters who demand access to adequate drinking water services in Tabasco, Mexico, are attacked and beaten by security forces
properties.Description: Residents of Dos Montes and La Palma, Tabasco, Mexico, block the Villahermosa-Macuspana highway demanding access to adequate drinking water services. In efforts to try and reopen the roads, officials from the Secretariat of Security and Citizen Protection use tear gas and beat the protesters.

properties.Title: Farmers in Mexico sabotage illegal commercial water systems to restore flow for downstream villages
properties.Description: Farmers sabotage illegal water connections, water pumps, and unlicensed containment ponds that are taking water for large-scale avocado farms at the expense of water supply to downstream villages.

properties.Title: Russian airstrike damages water supply infrastructure in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out an airstrike on a rural settlement in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, Ukraine, damaging water supply infrastructure.

properties.Title: Russian attacks in Kharkiv, Ukraine leave many without water or electricity
properties.Description: Water systems are cut off by a wave of Russian attacks on civilian infrastructure in Kharkiv, Ukraine.

properties.Title: Man attacks and kills aunt with axe during water dispute in Pathari, India
properties.Description: A man attacks his aunt with an axe during an argument over water in the village of Pathari, India. He fatally injures her in the neck and flees the scene.

properties.Title: Deadly clash over a water source in in Nueva Esperanza Chacula, Guatemala
properties.Description: Militias from El Aguacate and Chacula hamlets clash over a disputed water intake in Nueva Esperanza Chacula, a town in Huehuetenango, Guatemala. The altercation started after members of Chacula were fixing the damaged intake, which was broken by the El Aquacate community. Three people are killed and numerous others are injured.

properties.Title: Al Shabaab ambush destroys water truck and kills two in Lamu West, Kenya.
properties.Description: Al Shabaab militants ambush a military convoy between Wito and Hindi, Lamu West, Kenya, destroying a military vehicle and a water truck. The group claims two soldiers were killed.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike targets water tanks in Tyr, South Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike water tanks in the vicinity of Yarine, South Lebanon, amid ongoing fighting with Hezbollah.

properties.Title: Houthi shelling damages water project in Shabwah, Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces shell Al Atfah in the Ain district of Shabwah, Yemen, severely damaging a local water project.

properties.Title: A Russian-linked group launches cyberattack on Texas water utilities, USA
properties.Description: In April 2024, a Russian-linked "hactivist" group attempts to disrupt operations at several Texas utilities, including the Muleshoe water utility, temporarily disrupting their operations and causing a water tank to overflow.

properties.Title: Two killed in clan clashes over access to watering spot in Pathai Payam, South Sudan
properties.Description: Rival Lou Nuer sub-clans clash at Nyanuai cattle camp in Pathai Payam, South Sudan, over access to a communal watering spot for animals. Two people are killed and one injured before security forces arrive.

properties.Title: Four injured in violent clash over water drainage in Haryana, India
properties.Description: Two groups clash violently in Mamauta Kalan village, Haryana, India, in a dispute over drain water. They pelt stones and bricks, leaving four people injured. Three are reported to be in serious condition.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND156153; Bureau 2024

properties.Title: RSF seizes water resources and kill civilians during attack in Sidraha, Sudan
properties.Description: During a raid in Sidraha, Sudan, Rapid Support Forces (RSF) takes control of water resources, cuts communications, loots property and livestock and kills seven civilians.

properties.Title: On two days in April 2024, a pro-Russian hactivist group attacks two US wastewater systems
properties.Description: On 20 and 24 April 2024, a pro-Russian hactivist group posted videos showing an attacker remotely manipulating settings on human-machine interfaces (HMIs) in two US wastewater systems and one US energy company.
properties.Sources: Office of the Director of National Intelligence 2024

properties.Title: Two protesters are killed and 12 injured during protests against a mining company over lack of water services in Lero, Guinea
properties.Description: Following 10 days of protests against a mining company and demanding water and other basic services, security forces in Lero, Guinea, kill two residents, injure 12, and destroy homes.

properties.Title: Drone strike on village well kills five in Maqbanah, Yemen
properties.Description: A drone strike carried out by unidentified assailants strikes a village well in Maqbanah, Yemen, killing five civilians including two young girls who were fetching water at the time of the attack. Houthi and Internationally Recognized Government (IRG) forces exchange accusations over responsibility.

properties.Title: Armed youth abduct children at water point in Akobo, South Sudan
properties.Description: Suspected Murle youth abduct two children from the Lou Nuer community at a water collection site in Akobo, South Sudan. Local youth pursue the abductors, but further details are unknown.

properties.Title: One person injured in protests by residents over water shortages in Retreat, Jamaica
properties.Description: Residents of Retreat, Jamaica, protest lack of water by blocking the main road between New Hope and Negril with debris. A motorcyclist crashes into tree trunks that were placed on the road and is injured.

properties.Title: Farmers clash at protest over water pipeline damage in Junin, Peru
properties.Description: Around 200 locals and farmers in Junin, Peru, protest against a private company that damaged a pipeline and left the surrounding areas without water for their crops. They block roads, set fire to tires and clash with one another. There are no fatalities.

properties.Title: Father and son injured during a dispute over access to water in Shivpuri, India
properties.Description: Three men assault a man and his son with rods in Shivpuri, India, during a dispute over water collection. Both victims sustain head injuries and are hospitalized.

properties.Title: Protesters violently detained outside municipal palace while demanding access to water in Ixtaczoquitlan, Mexico
properties.Description: A group of 16 residents, including a disabled youth, protesting for water access in front of the municipal palace in Ixtaczoquitlan, Mexico, are violently detained by police. They are released after four hours following further demonstrations.

properties.Title: Widespread corruption over water tanker contracts leads to the murder of a water employee in South Africa
properties.Description: A water employee for the eThekwini Municipality in South Africa is murdered as part of widespread corruption and fights for water tanker contracts. As many as eight employees have been killed in recent years over issues related to water provision and management.

properties.Title: Armed clash over children washing at water tank leaves six injured in Agra, India
properties.Description: Members of the Valmiki and Prajapati communities clash in Agra, India, after Valmiki children are assaulted for washing their hands and feet at a water tank. Stones, axes, and firearms are used, leaving six injured, including one with bullet wounds. A shop is set on fire and arrests follow.

properties.Title: Two injured in Antananarivo, Madagascar, during student protest over poor water supply infrastructure
properties.Description: University students in Antananarivo, Madagascar, demonstrate, demanding better infrastructure, including water and electricity, and unpaid scholarships. Police fire tear gas; students respond with stones and bricks. During the clash, one student and a passerby are injured.

properties.Title: Settlers attack Palestinian homes and empty water containers in Arab al Mlihat, Palestine
properties.Description: About 15 Israeli settlers raid homes in the Arab al Mlihat community in West Bank, Palestine, emptying seven water containers.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian farmer's water pumps in Khirbat ad Dayr, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers damage water pumps belonging to a Palestinian farmer in Khirbat ad Dayr in West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike damages water and electricity networks in Al Nabatieh, South Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike Al Nabatieh, Lebanon, targeting Hezbollah infrastructure. During the raid, water and electricity networks are damaged.

properties.Title: Hafiz Gul Bahadur Group militants kill water tanker driver in Mir Ali, Pakistan
properties.Description: Hafiz Gul Bahadur Group (TTP-HGB) militants fatally shoot a driver delivering water to government authorities in Mir Ali, Pakistan.

properties.Title: Sudanese Armed Forces airstrikes destroy farms and water wells in Kebkabiya, North Darfur
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) conducts airstrikes on Kebkabiya, Sudan. Farms and water wells are destroyed in the attack.

properties.Title: Islamic State attack damages water tanker in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Islamic State (IS) militants attack a water tanker in the countryside village of Al-Hessan in Deir ez-Zor, Syria. During the attack, two Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) members are injured.

properties.Title: Myanmar rebel group kills three soldiers fetching water in Monywa, Myanmar
properties.Description: A rebel group, Brave Heart Army, ambushes Myanmar military troops from the Baw Di Ta Htaung camp in the town of Monywa as they go to collect water. Three Myanmar soldiers are killed, and weapons and ammunition are seized.

properties.Title: Gunmen kill an employee of eThekwini Municipality’s water and sanitation department in Springfield, South Africa
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen kill an employee of eThekwini Municipality’s water and sanitation department in Springfield, Durban, South Africa

properties.Title: Rebel forces kill two Myanmar soldiers pumping water in Zin Bar village, Tanintharyi, Myanmar
properties.Description: Joint forces of the Dawei National Liberation Army (DNLA), Kaw Thoo Lei Army (KTLA), and Shwe Be Lone PDF (SBL) attack 10 Myanmar soldiers pumping water in Zin Bar village, Myanmar. Two soldiers are killed and one injured.

properties.Title: Protesters in Carraipia, Colombia block access to water plant, disrupting water supply to Maicao
properties.Description: Residents near Carraipia, La Guajira, Colombia, block the Jordan Water Treatment Plant for three days to protest service fees and energy systems, disrupting water supply to Maicao.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian agricultural water pumps near Tubas, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers damage water pumps for agricultural pools on Palestinian-owned land in Khirbat ad Dayr, near Tubas, Palestine.

properties.Title: Clash over water distribution injures four in Jhando Marri, Pakistan
properties.Description: Two groups from the Kachhi community clash with sticks in Jhando Marri, Pakistan, during a dispute over water distribution. Four people are injured.

properties.Title: Seven injured during protest over water diversion in Damavand, Iran
properties.Description: Residents of Aru, near Damavand, Iran, rally against plans to divert their spring water to other towns. Police clash with villagers. One civilian sustains a gunshot wound and six officers are injured as villagers throw stones. At least 15 protesters are arrested.

properties.Title: Myanmar troops injured in ambush while collecting water in Tilin Township, Myanmar
properties.Description: Fighters from the People’s Defence Force (PDF) ambush Myanmar soldiers from the Yae Myet Ni police station in Tilin Township, Myanmar, while they fetch water. Two soldiers are injured after exchanging fire for around 15 minutes.

properties.Title: Settlers assault Palestinian and seize water containers in Ayn Samiya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers beat a Palestinian in Ayn Samiya, Palestine, and confiscate 15 tons of animal feed, water containers, and a vehicle.

properties.Title: Israeli settler and military forces raid Qusra, Palestine, damaging Palestinian homes and water tanks and injuring two
properties.Description: Around 20 Israeli settlers, accompanied by Israeli forces, raid Qusra in West Bank, Palestine, throwing stones at Palestinian houses. 18 windows and a solar panel are destroyed, along with eight water tanks and a gate. Palestinians repel the attack, and both settlers and soldiers fire live rounds. Two Palestinians and one settler are injured.

properties.Title: FAMa and Wagner kill 11 civilians and destroy water wells in Kidal, Mali
properties.Description: Malian Armed Forces (FAMa) and Wagner Group (Russian private military company) forces raid Teghayghayt and nearby Tin-Alamadja in the Kidal region of Mali. 11 civilians are killed. They arrest residents, seize livestock, loot traders, and destroy water wells and satellite equipment.

properties.Title: Regime fighters target civilian vehicle and water tank with guided missile in Idlib, Syria
properties.Description: Regime forces fire a guided missile near Maaret Al Naasan in northern Idlib, Syria. A civilian vehicle and a water tank are struck, causing material damage but no casualties.

properties.Title: Pro-Iran militias shell water station in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Local pro-Iranian militia members shell a water station in Sfireh Tahtani, rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria. The station burns but no casualties are reported.

properties.Title: Violent protests erupt during World Water Forum events in Denpasar, Indonesia
properties.Description: Members of the Bali Community Joint Alliance demonstrate at the World Water Forum in Denpasar, Indonesia, opposing the event as unrepresentative of local needs. They seize banners and violently clash with several forum participants.

properties.Title: BLF ambush in Kech District, Pakistan, targets military vehicles, including water tanker
properties.Description: Balochistan Liberation Front (BLF) militants ambush four military vehicles, including a water tanker, in Kech District, Pakistan. The BLF claims five soldiers were killed and several injured. Vehicles sustain heavy damage.

properties.Title: Violent clashes between police and protesters over lack of water service in Ixtaczoquitlan, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents of Ixtaczoquitlan, Mexico, clash with police during a demonstration over water supply issues. The protesters throw stones at the city hall, break windows and torch a palm tree as well as a parked vehicle. Police attack the protesters with stones, sticks and broken flower pots. Powder from fire extinguishers is discharged and police allegedly administer slaps, shoves and blows to disperse
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MEX87856; Castillo 2024; Castukki 2024

properties.Title: Residents in Altamira, Mexico, attempt to lynch suspected water thieves
properties.Description: Residents of Altamira, Mexico, detain three people accused of water theft in an apartment building. They begin destroying their vehicle in an attempted lynching. The suspects flee the scene.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers assault deputy mayor and Palestinian workers installing water pipelines in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers attack Palestinian municipality workers and the Bani Naim deputy mayor in Hebron, Palestine, while water pipelines are being installed. The deputy mayor is hospitalized.

properties.Title: Maphou Dam in India is mined with explosive devices
properties.Description: The Indian Army finds three improvised explosive devices (IEDs) near Maphou Dam, Imphal East district, India. The bombs are defused.

properties.Title: Ukrainian missile strike in Belgorod, Russia, injures civilians and damages water, gas, and electric lines
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces fire five missiles in Belgorod, Russia. Three civilians are injured. Homes, cars, as well as electricity, gas, and water infrastructure are also damaged.

properties.Title: RSF shuts down water supply in North Darfur, Sudan, after clashes between RSF and SAF
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) and allied Arab militias battle Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) near Khazan Golo in North Darfur, Sudan. RSF captures the reservoir and closes water pipes.

properties.Title: Councilor severely injured by landmine while repairing water supply in El Plateado, Colombia
properties.Description: A local councilor from the Liberal Party is gravely injured by a landmine in El Plateado, Colombia. The device, allegedly planted by the Carlos Patino Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC) dissidents, explodes while he attempts to connect water for residents. The victim loses a leg to amputation after the explosion.

properties.Title: RSF commander injured as SAF reclaims control of reservoir in Khazan Golo, Sudan
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF), with the support of Darfur Joint Forces (JSAMF), launches airstrikes and retakes Khazan Golo water reservoir from Rapid Support Forces (RSF). Water pipes are reopened. An RSF commander is injured.

properties.Title: JNIM militants destroy water well near livestock market in Kantchari, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group) militants detonate explosives at a water well near a livestock market in Kantchari, Burkina Faso. The well is destroyed.

properties.Title: Israeli artillery shells strike water container in Gaza Strip, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli artillery shells strike a water container in the Musabbah area north of Rafah, Gaza Strip, Palestine.

properties.Title: Russian forces hit Ochakiv, Ukraine, with incendiary weapon; water supply disrupted
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out a strike on Ochakiv, Ukraine, using an unidentified incendiary weapon. The attack sparks fires and disrupts water services. Casualties unknown.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water pipelines in Ayn Samiya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers damage and destroy Palestinian-owned water pipelines in Ayn Samiya, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Karnataka politicians protest Hemavathi River “Express Canal” diversion project and clash with police in Tumakuru, India
properties.Description: Members of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), Bahujan Samaj Party (BSP), and the Janata Dal (Secular, or the People's Party (JD(S)), including a former minister and Members of the Legislative Assembly (MLA), protest in front of the Home Minister’s residence in Gollahalli, India, in opposition of the Hemavathi river “Express Canal” diversion project. Police disperse demonstrators with baton charges,

properties.Title: Dispute over water sparks deadly clash between Kuchi groups in Shaykhabad, Afghanistan
properties.Description: Two armed Kuchi groups clash in Shaykhabad, Afghanistan, in a dispute over water. One person is killed and another is seriously injured after a gunman opens fire.

properties.Title: FAMa and Wagner group destroy water tank and abduct infants in Tuareg camps in Tessalit, Mali
