properties.Description: Malian Armed Forces (FAMa) and the Wagner Group (Russian private military company) raid Tuareg encampments in Tessalit, in the Kidal region of Mali. They burn tents, destroy a water tank, and abduct two infants.

properties.Title: Russia attacks Dnipro Dam again
properties.Description: In another attempt to destroy Ukrainian energy and water systems, Russia launches another attack on the Dnipro Hydroelectric Power plant near Zaporizhzhia.

properties.Title: Residents of Ludhiana, India, protest for two days over water shortages and assault municipal worker
properties.Description: Residents in Ludhiana, India, demonstrate against water shortages for two days. During the rally, protesters burn an effigy and assault a municipal employee.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND158620, IND158621

properties.Title: Syrian rebel group attacks and abducts farmer over failed water delivery in northwestern Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Armed militants from the 9th Division, a Syrian rebel group, accost and attack a farmer in Kura village in northwestern Aleppo, Syria, after accusing him of failing to deliver water to the group's headquarters. They abduct the victim, whose whereabouts remain unknown.

properties.Title: Attack on the Golo water reservoir in North Darfur
properties.Description: On May 26, the paramitary group Rapid Support Forces (RSF) attack and occupy the Golo water reservoir, in El Fasher, North Darfur, a critical resource for an estimated 270,000 people, but the army and allied groups retake it the next day.

properties.Title: Qush Tepa canal project employees killed in office attack in Sheberghan, Afghanistan
properties.Description: Gunmen kill an engineer and a cleaner working for a private contractor in Sheberghan, Afghanistan. Although linked to the Qush Tepa canal project, the Taliban claims the victims were not involved.

properties.Title: Unknown assailants open fire at herders near water point in Bambo, Kenya, amid inter-clan fighting
properties.Description: Unidentified ethnic militia open fire at two herders near a water point in Bambo, Kenya. Police and reservists intervene, killing two of the attackers while the rest of the group manage to escape. The violence occurs amid ongoing Degodia–Murule clan disputes.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. KEN14552; Yahya 2023

properties.Title: Malian soldiers kill pastoralist and livestock near Segou irrigation canals
properties.Description: Soldiers taking exams in Kolongo Tomo, Mali, open fire on pastoralists and cattle near irrigation canals. One pastoralist is killed and livestock is slaughtered.

properties.Title: Water and electricity infrastructure damaged in Ukrainian attacks on 10 locations in Belgorodsky, Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces attack 10 locations in Belgorodsky, Russia, using drones, mortar and (likely) missiles. The attacks damage water and electricity lines, two apartment buildings, six outbuildings and eight cars.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. RUS17624, RUS17640, RUS17642, RUS17649, RUS17654, RUS17656, RUS17661, RUS17662, RUS17664, RUS17667, RUS1

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike injures civilians and damages water and power networks in Wadi Jilo, Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike a house in Wadi Jilo, South Lebanon, amid clashes with Hezbollah. The strike causes severe damage to water and electricity networks. Four civilians are injured, and two Civil Defense workers are hurt while extinguishing a fire. Israel claims it targeted Hezbollah infrastructure.

properties.Title: A water-management facility in Gaza is attacked, damaging the plant and killing the town's mayor
properties.Description: Air strikes by Israel hit a water-management facility serving Nuseirat municipality in Gaza, damaging the plant and killing the town's mayor who was in the plant at the time.

properties.Title: Environmental and water rights activist kidnapped in Villa Madero, Mexico
properties.Description: Unidentified assailants abduct an environmental activist from El Zangarro community in Villa Madero, Mexico. The activist is known for defending forests and water access in an area dominated by avocado and berry orchards. He is rescued alive two days later.

properties.Title: Castilla residents clash with authorities over removal of sewage water pump in Piura, Peru
properties.Description: Residents of the 28 de Julio settlement in Castilla, Piura, Peru, clash with local police and administrators who attempt to remove a water pump. Locals say the pump is needed to clear sewage flooding after a system collapse.

properties.Title: Russian shelling and drone strikes damage water pipeline in Chuhuiv, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out drone and missile strikes on Chuhuiv, in the Kharkiv region of Ukraine, damaging medical and residential buildings and a water pipeline.

properties.Title: Violent riots erupt in the central Algerian city of Tiaret as taps run dry and people are forced to queue up for water
properties.Description: Violent riots erupt in the central Algerian city of Tiaret as taps run dry and people are forced to queue up for water. The region is plagued by extreme heat, and local reservoirs are drying up as temperatures rise and rain diminishes.
properties.Sources: Water, Peace, and Security Partnership 2024; Associated Press 2024a

properties.Title: Militant killed in firefight after water dispute in Kathua district, India
properties.Description: Militants infiltrating from across the border open fire at civilians who denied them water and clash with police in Kathua district, India. One militant is killed.

properties.Title: Man killed in Chitrakoot, India, in dispute over fetching water
properties.Description: Three men, reportedly linked to the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), assault and kill a man in the village of Lauri, in Chitrakoot, India. The victim, believed to be Dalit, is attacked and killed after failing to fetch water quickly. The assailants also shout casteist insults.

properties.Title: Residents in Jharkhand, India, tie public health contractor to pole during protest over water supply
properties.Description: Giridih residents in Jharkhand, India, demonstrate against the irregular water supply. During the protest, they tie a Public Health Engineering Department contractor to a pole for over an hour. The contractor is released after an executive engineer promises improvements.

properties.Title: Two PHED officials held hostage during water shortage protest in Hisar, India
properties.Description: Residents of Dhad village in Hisar, India, stage a protest over water shortages. Demonstrators take two Public Health Engineering Department (PHED) officials as hostages and force them to sit in the sun until their concerns are acknowledged.

properties.Title: Clash over water access injures three in Najafgarhi, India
properties.Description: Members of two communities clash in Najafgarh, India, over who would fetch water first from a shared tap. Three people are seriously injured in the fight.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water well and block roads in Salfit, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a Palestinian-owned water well and agricultural walls in Salfit, Palestine. They also block roads used by farm vehicles.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE53270, PSE53276

properties.Title: Four Sudanese refugees attacked while fetching water near refugee camp in Metema woreda, Ethiopia
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen assault four Sudanese refugees while collecting drinking water near the Awlala Akushara camp in Metema woreda, in the Amhara region of Ethiopia. The victims are seriously injured in the attack and are hospitalized for severe blood loss.

properties.Title: Protest against company over contaminating and looting water supplies in Veracruz, Mexico, turns deadly
properties.Description: Residents and farmers in San Antonio Limón, Veracruz, Mexico, rally against a company accused of polluting aquifers and stealing large volumes of water. Police move to disperse the crowd and gunfire is reported. Authorities confirm two deaths, with farmer groups claiming three, and multiple people are injured.

properties.Title: Farmers protesting extreme water use by a US agribusiness in Mexico are fired upon by police, killing two
properties.Description: Two farmers protesting extreme water use and groundwater contamination caused by a Carroll Farms feed plant in Totalco, Veracruz, Mexico are killed by police during a large community protest.

properties.Title: Woman and son assaulted in Bareilly, India, after drinking from a water tap
properties.Description: In Chaubari village in Bareilly, India, a group attacks a woman and her son, likely from the Dalit community, after the young man attempts to drink from a field tap. The assailants use caste-based slurs and tear the woman's clothes.

properties.Title: Protest erupts in Meerut, India, after three killed in farm irrigation dispute
properties.Description: Relatives and residents block the Muradnagar–Ganganahar bridge in Meerut, India, protesting the recent shooting deaths of three people in a farm irrigation dispute.

properties.Title: A protest over control and access to water between Delhi and Haryana, India turns violent with police response
properties.Description: A protest in front of the Delhi Jal Board (DJB) filling pump in Okhla against the water crisis in Delhi is met by police using water cannons on the protestors. At the same time, Delhi Water Minister Atishi launches a fast alleging Haryana is failing to release Delhi's rightful share of water in Yamuna, and the BJP is ramping up protests over water shortages and the black marketing of water in Delh

properties.Title: Six injured in clash over distribution of agricultural irrigation water in Tando Muhammad Khan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Members of the Lashari and Nizamani groups fight in Shah Bukhsh Lashari village in Tando Muhammad Khan District, Pakistan, during a dispute over farm water allocation. Six people are injured.

properties.Title: Ukrainian strike in Belgorod, Russia, damages water supply system
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces carry out a drone strike and shell two sites in the Krasnoyaruzhskiy district in Belgorod, Russia. During the attack, part of a water supply system is damaged.

properties.Title: Father and son shot dead following irrigation dispute in Modinagar, India
properties.Description: A father and his two sons are shot following a dispute over irrigation water in Modinagar, India. The argument began over the family’s use of water for their mango orchard. Although the dispute was reportedly resolved, the attackers later opened fire on the victims, killing the father and one son and injuring the other. The assailants then threw the bodies of the deceased into a canal before fleei

properties.Title: Mass protest over irrigation water access and power outages injures 15 in Babil, Iraq
properties.Description: Around 1,500 residents rally on the Baghdad–Basrah highway in Babil, Iraq, to protest the cutting off of irrigation water to farmland, power outages, and the drying up of rivers. Security forces arrest about 20 people and injure 15 while dispersing the demonstration.

properties.Title: Protesters detain mayor and block highway over pork producer's water use in San Antonio Limon, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents and farmers in San Antonio Limon, Mexico, detain the mayor during a fourth consecutive day of protests against pork production company 'Granjas Carroll' and its use of water from sources along the Veracruz-Puebla border. Members of the Movement in Defense of the Water of the Free-Eastern Basin block a highway with stones, banners and vehicles, demanding justice for two farmers killed dur

properties.Title: Water suppliers protest pump removals that cut off water supply in Mandi Buchiana, Pakistan
properties.Description: Water suppliers in the town of Mandi Buchiana in Punjab, Pakistan, demonstrate against the irrigation department’s dismantling of canal-side pumps, which they say cut residents’ water supply.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers torch Palestinian water tank in West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers riot and set fire to a Palestinian-owned water tank in Ramallah and Al Bireh, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Residents brawl and riot over water shortages in Garcia, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents of Garcia, Mexico, close a road and protest water shortages in the Paseo de Capellanía, Riberas, and Bugambilias neighborhoods which have reportedly lasted more than a week. The protest turns violent when cars begin to drive through the blockade, leading to brawling and rioting.

properties.Title: Dispute over water use between fishers and farmers kills one and injures three in Maga, Cameroon
properties.Description: Fishers and rice farmers in Maga, Cameroon, fight after fishers divert water from a rice field to their channels. The clash kills one farmer and injures three fishers.

properties.Title: Israel's military blows up more than 30 water wells in Gaza in July 2024
properties.Description: Between July 18 and 27, Israeli forces destroy more than 30 water wells in the southern Gaza towns of Rafah and Khan Younis, according the the head of water networks for the Khan Younis municipality.

properties.Title: Unknown assailants attack Water Resources Department workers in Al Shomaly, Iraq, injuring four
properties.Description: Unknown assailants attack employees of a water resources department as they clear encroachments from tributaries in Al Shomaly, Iraq. Four employees are left injured and three perpetrators are arrested.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IRQ56558, IRQ56542

properties.Title: Cantonment Board councilor fatally shot in Karachi, Pakistan; attack possibly linked to water supply dispute
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen on a motorcycle shoot dead an elected Cantonment Board councilor and injure his brother in a targeted attack in Karachi, Pakistan. The killing is thought to be related to a personal enmity or action he took against people disrupting water supply in his area.

properties.Title: 10 Palestinians killed while filling water near mosque in Gaza City, Palestine
properties.Description: 10 Palestinians are killed, likely by Israeli artillery shelling, while filling water near the Al Shamaa mosque, Gaza City, Palestine.

properties.Title: Israeli settler damages pipeline supplying water to more than 30 homes in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: An Israeli settler damages a pipeline supplying water to more than 30 homes in Hebron, Palestine.

properties.Title: Internally displaced persons block roads and empty water tankers during protest in Goma, Democratic Republic of Congo
properties.Description: Internally displaced people in Nord-Kivu, Democratic Republic of Congo, barricade roads to protest renewed attacks on their camp and demand aid. Protesters block and empty two humanitarian water tankers en route to deliver water to the Rusayo camp. Police intervene to restore order.

properties.Title: Protesters shut water valves at Morbe Dam, cutting water supply to the city of Navi Mumbai, India
properties.Description: Villagers from multiple communities in Maharashtra, India, force entry into the Morbe Dam premises. During the demonstration, they close valves to cut off the water supply to Navi Mumbai. The action is part of a protest over compensation and employment.

properties.Title: Suicide drones target water truck on Afes axis in Idlib, Syria
properties.Description: Regime forces in Syria launch four suicide drones along the Afes axis in rural Idlib, hitting civilian and rebel positions. One drone targets a water truck, and another drone is shot down by rebels.

properties.Title: Palestinians clash with Israeli settlers after water pipeline destroyed in Ramallah and Al Bireh, Palestine
properties.Description: A clash breaks out between Palestinians and Israeli settlers in Ramallah and Al Bireh, Palestine, after dozens of Israeli settlers destroy water pipelines that supply Palestinian houses. The settlers withdraw from the area.

properties.Title: Boko Haram and ISWAP clash in Mafa, Nigeria; 16 dead and eight water vessels seized
properties.Description: Boko Haram and Islamic State – West Africa Province (ISWAP) fighters clash in the rural town of Mafa, in Borno State, Nigeria. Boko Haram kills 16 ISWAP members and seizes eight water vessels, as well as weapons and cash.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. NIG38060, NIG37525

properties.Title: Eleven are hospitalized after clashes between ethnic Tajiks in Afghanistan and the Taliban over the Qosh Tepa Canal project
properties.Description: On July 7, 2024, 11 people are reportedly hospitalized after protests against the Qost Tepa Canal project. The clash took place between ethnic Tajiks in Afghanistan and Taliban leaders near the Qosh Tepa Canal.

properties.Title: Four killed and eight injured in clash over Indian government water distribution in Shri Hargobindpur
properties.Description: Rival groups fight with weapons in the town of Shri Hargobindpur, India, during a dispute over the distribution of government-supplied water. Four people are killed and eight injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water valves that supply villages in West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers damage main water valves in Sabastiyah, West Bank, which supply nearby Palestinian villages.

properties.Title: Abducted Water and Sanitation deputy director found dead in Pretoria, South Africa
properties.Description: The deputy director of the Water and Sanitation Department in Pretoria, South Africa, is carjacked and abducted by unknown assailants. Police trace the vehicle to Johannesburg and arrest a 53 year old suspect. The victim is later found dead.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SAF21593; Mlangeni 2024

properties.Title: Settlers under protection of Israeli forces destroy main water pipelines in Umm al Khayr, Palestine
properties.Description: While under protection of Israeli forces, Israeli settlers destroy pipelines that supply water to houses in the village of Umm al Khayr in West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers drain water well in Salfit, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers empty a water well and destroy fencing and metal structures on Palestinian-owned land in Salfit, Palestine.

properties.Title: Residents of Saint Albans, South Africa, protest lack of water services; police respond with rubber bullets and tear gas
properties.Description: Over 200 residents in Saint Albans, South Africa, block a road with burning debris to protest inadequate electricity, water, and sanitation facilities. Demonstrators torch a signboard and hurl rocks at a truck that forced its way past the roadblock. Police disperse the crowd with rubber bullets and tear gas.

properties.Title: Russian airstrikes hit water station in Idlib, Syria
properties.Description: Russian aircraft strike the town of Upper Sheikh Sindyan and a water station in the Idlib countryside. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Russian drone strike on Kherson, Ukraine, damages water facility and injures two
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out a drone strike on a rural settlement in Kherson, Ukraine, damaging a water supply facility and injuring two civilians.

properties.Title: Neighbors kill farmer with axe over construction of water channel in Gujarat, India
properties.Description: Neighbors attack and kill a farmer with an axe in Ranigam village in Gujarat, India, during an argument over building a water channel on his farmland.

properties.Title: BLA militants destroy water supply machinery near a military camp in Balochistan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Balochistan Liberation Army (BLA) militants open fire near a military camp in Zamuran Tehsil in Balochistan, Pakistan. They destroy machinery and solar systems used for water supply.

properties.Title: Cyclists attacked in Saintes, France, en route to anti-megabasin rally
properties.Description: Five assailants attack a group of cyclists on a farm in Saintes, Charente-Maritime, France, on their way to protest against megabasins in the "Water Village" in Melle. The attackers assault one demonstrator and throw themselves on a tent with a 68 year old woman inside. They also steal bikes and puncture car tires. Victims say they were attacked due to differences in ideology.

properties.Title: Students in Analamanga, Madagascar, protest water and power shortages with road barricades; one injured
properties.Description: Students in Antananarivo, Madagascar, block roads with burning tires to demand improved water and electricity services and infrastructure. Police disperse the crowd with tear gas; one student is injured.

properties.Title: Water shortage protest in Mirgund, India, leads to clashes and injuries
properties.Description: Demonstrators in Mirgund, India, block a road over drinking water shortages and clash with police and security staff. Two security officers are injured and a vehicle is damaged. Police fire shots in the air to disperse the crowd.

properties.Title: One person injured as Moruleng residents protest for water in North West, South Africa
properties.Description: Residents in Moruleng village in North West, South Africa, protest to demand access to water from the municipality. Witnesses say a protester is injured after falling from a truck amid disputed accounts of whether the driver tried to run over the crowd.

properties.Title: Man stabbed to death after dispute over water point in Bura, Kenya
properties.Description: Unidentified attackers fatally stab a man in Bura, Kenya, following a suspected dispute over control of a local water source.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water meters during mass raid on Kifil Haris, Palestine
properties.Description: Thousands of Israeli settlers raid Kifil Haris, Palestine, to perform prayers in disputed shrines. They throw stones at Palestinian houses, destroy several water meters and attempt to set fire to a vehicle.

properties.Title: Three dead and water distribution systems destroyed during clash between military and PDFs in Sagaing, Myanmar
properties.Description: More than 100 security forces, including military soldiers and police, open fire on local People's Defence Force (PDF) vehicles arriving to the Min Kun village in the Sagaing region of Myanmar. Three people are killed, including a police officer and a Pyu Saw Htee. An airstrike by the security forces ensues. They set fire to multiple buildings and destroy the water distribution system and electric

properties.Title: Dispute over water pump distribution leads to hospitalization in Bhadrapur, Nepal
properties.Description: During a ward meeting in Bhadrapur, Nepal, a Communist Party of Nepal (Unified Marxist–Leninist) ward member assaults the ward secretary amid arguments over allocating water pumps. The secretary is hospitalized for their injuries.

properties.Title: Two injured by gunfire during protest in KwaDukuza, South Africa, over lack of water services
properties.Description: Residents of KwaDukuza, South Africa, protest outside the ward councilor’s home over the lack of water services. Demonstrators throw stones and try to force the gate. Bodyguards fire live rounds, injuring two protesters - one in the ankle and one in the shoulder.

properties.Title: Protesters threaten self-immolation over lake encroachment clearance in Chennai, India
properties.Description: Several residents threaten to set themselves on fire during a protest against the Water Resources Department’s drive to clear structures encroaching on Retteri Lake in Chennai, India. The protesters strongly oppose the court-ordered clearance, which is part of a plan to transform the lake into a source of drinking water. Police officers intervene to prevent self-immolation.

properties.Title: Dalit man assaulted for drinking water at pump near temple in Bhadohi, India
properties.Description: A young Dalit man is assaulted for drinking water at a handpump located close to a temple in Bhadohi, India. The attackers also assault him verbally with casteist slurs.

properties.Title: Israeli soldiers are videoed destroying a major water tank in Gaza
properties.Description: Israeli soldiers are videoed wiring explosives to pumps at the Canada Water reservoir in Rafah, southern Gaza, followed by an explosion. The reservoir held 3 million liters of water and was central to the treatment and distribution of water in the Rafah area.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drone attacks disrupt power and water supply in a village in Kursk, Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces conduct drone strikes and drop explosives in the village of Snagost, in the Kursk region of Russia. Power lines are damaged and water supply is disrupted. There are no casualties.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers assault herders and block access to spring in Tubas, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers assault Palestinian cow herders and prevent them from accessing a spring in the city of Tubas, Palestine.

properties.Title: Students injured during protest over poor infrastructure and water supply in Vontovorona, Madagascar
properties.Description: Students protest outside their university campus in Vontovorona, Madagascar, to demand the university make improvements to campus infrastructure, including drinking water supply, electricity and internet connection. They barricade the campus entrance with burning tires and tables, and throw stones at gendarmes who respond with tear gas. Several students are injured.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MAG3826, MAG3818, MAG3827, MAG3828

properties.Title: Brothers killed by landmine while deepening water well in Wadi Al Nile, Yemen
properties.Description: Two brothers are killed when a suspected Houthi landmine explodes while they are deepening a water well in Wadi Al Nile, Yemen.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers assault and run over Palestinian at a water spring in Jericho, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers attack and run over a Palestinian with an all-terrain vehicle at a water spring in Jericho, West Bank, Palestine. The victim is hospitalized for their injuries.

properties.Title: Municipal water truck set on fire, driver hospitalized amid threats to mayor in Piura, Peru
properties.Description: Unidentified suspects torch a municipal water truck in La Union district, Piura, injuring the driver who is taken to hospital. Police state the attack is linked to threats against the district mayor, which have been ongoing since 2023.

properties.Title: Turkish drone strike hits QSD positions and water tank in Al Hasakeh, Syria
properties.Description: Turkish forces launch a drone attack on Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) positions and a water tank in Shakar Khaj village in rural Al Hasakeh, Syria. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Eight explosive devices planted in Al Hudaydah water well, Yemen
properties.Description: A farmer finds a foreign object in a water well he is cleaning in Al Hudaydah, Yemen. He alerts authorities who discover eight explosive devices have been planted in the well, likely by Houthi rebels.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drones target water delivery vehicle in Donetsk region, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian drones strike a vehicle transporting water to Oleksandrivka, in the Donetsk region of Ukraine.

properties.Title: Protesters and motorists clash during roadblock demonstration over month-long water shortages in García, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents of García, Mexico, block an intersection to protest water shortages in their neighborhoods that have lasted for over a month. The roadblock causes long traffic delays, and some vehicles are reportedly damaged as drivers attempt to use the shoulder. Protesters refuse to clear the road until authorities restore the water supply, sparking confrontations and fights with motorists.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike in Hanniyeh, South Lebanon, damages utilities and injures civilians
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes carry out an airstrike on a house in Hanniyeh, Lebanon, during ongoing clashes with Hezbollah. The strike injures five civilians and damages water and electricity networks.

properties.Title: Youths and political party members injured during rally against rising water tariffs in Dharan, Nepal
properties.Description: Youths and political party members are injured during a rally against the rising water tariffs in the city of Dharan, Nepal. The protesters attempt to enter the office. The police try to stop them and some protesters are injured in the process.

properties.Title: Russian airstrike destroys water pumping station in Lyman, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces use a reconnaissance drone to guide an airstrike targeting a water pumping station in the city of Lyman in Donetsk Oblast, Ukraine. The pumping station is destroyed in the attack.

properties.Title: Ukrainian artillery fire leads to power and water outages in occupied Enerhodar, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian artillery fire leads to power and water outages in the occupied city of Enerhodar, Ukraine.

properties.Title: Tribal and Clan Forces shells QSD-linked water facilities and neighborhoods in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Tribal and Clan Forces, regime troops, National Defence Forces (QDW) fighters, and pro-Iranian militias fire mortars at Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD)-linked water facilities and neighborhoods in Basira, Deir ez-Zor, Syria. QSD reinforces positions along the Euphrates and orders civilian evacuations.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SYR131802, SYR131799, SYR131800, SYR131801

properties.Title: Gunmen open fire on solar water project committee in Uzlat Yuhayr, Yemen
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen open fire on a Rural Water Authority committee and stop them from accessing the site of a solar-powered water project in Uzlat Yuhayr, Yemen.

properties.Title: Ukrainian shelling damages water pipeline and injures two in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces shell Donetsk People's Republic (DPR) positions in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine. A water pipeline is damaged and two civilians are wounded in the attack.

properties.Title: Military shelling injures villager in Myingyan Township, Myanmar, after attack on water distiller
properties.Description: Myanmar military soldiers fire artillery into Kan Chaw village, Myingyan Township of Myanmar after an earlier attack on a military training school water distiller. One civilian is injured.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MMR66091, MMR66090

properties.Title: A device detonates in a water truck in Hama, Syria, killing one and injuring two
properties.Description: An explosive device planted by unknown gunmen in previous clashes detonates in a water truck near Shakkushiyah, Hama countryside. A man is killed, and his wife and sister are injured.

properties.Title: Nigerian airstrikes kill ISWAP fighters and destroy water vessels in Marte, Nigeria
properties.Description: The Nigerian Air Force conducts airstrikes on Islamic State – West Africa Province (ISWAP) sites in Marte, in Borno State, Nigeria, killing over 40 fighters including five commanders. Vehicles, water vessels and a dispensary are destroyed in the attacks.

properties.Title: ENDF seizes generator and water pipe, claims to have killed several in alleged OLF-OLA clashes in Oromia, Ethiopia
properties.Description: Ethiopian National Defense Force (ENDF) claims to have clashed with the Oromo Liberation Front-Oromo Liberation Army (OLF-OLA) and killed a number of militants in Gora Dola and Negele areas of Oromia, Ethiopia. They seized various items including a generator, more than 200 meters of water pipe, medicines, and identity documents.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. ETH13404, ETH13405

properties.Title: SAF airstrikes target water station in Abu Hamira, Sudan
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) carries out airstrikes on Telis water station in Abu Hamira, Sudan.

properties.Title: Water pipeline targeted with explosives in Tuban, Yemen
properties.Description: Unidentified militants in Tuban, Yemen, target an Al-Baytarah - Al Fayush water pipeline, detonating an explosive device which causes material damage.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers assault foreign journalist covering attacks on water well in Jericho, Palestine
properties.Description: A foreign journalist covering settler attacks on a water well to prevent its use by Palestinians is beaten by Israeli settlers in Jericho, Palestine.

properties.Title: Farmer protests over lack of water for crops in Nalgonda, India, lead to physical altercations
properties.Description: Farmers linked to the Alimineti Madhava Reddy Project (AMRP) in Nalgonda, India, protest over lack of water for crops. The demonstration leads to physical altercations between farmers and police.

properties.Title: Turkish forces fire on DFNS maintenance team while repairing water station in Shuyukh village, Syria
properties.Description: Turkish troops open fire on a Democratic Federation of North Syria (DFNS) Water Department team as they repair a water station in Shuyukh village in rural Aleppo, Syria.

properties.Title: Russian missile strikes damage critical infrastructure in Hlukhiv, Ukraine, disrupting water and power
properties.Description: Russian forces launch missile and drone strikes on Hlukhiv in Sumy, Ukraine. The attack damages infrastructure, disrupting water and electricity services.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian farmland and irrigation system in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian-owned farmland and its irrigation system in Hebron, Palestine, and remove the surrounding fence.

properties.Title: SAF airstrikes in North Darfur, Sudan, destroy water sources, kills five civilians and cattle
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) carries out airstrikes in Koma, North Darfur, Sudan. Five civilians are killed, water sources are destroyed, and over 150 cattle perish in the attack.

properties.Title: Russian shelling disrupts water and power and injures two in Kherson, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian shelling damages infrastructure in Kherson, Ukraine, leading to water and power disruption. Two civilians are wounded in the attack.

properties.Title: Man injured by landmine while turning on village water supply in Tedim, Myanmar
properties.Description: A man steps on a landmine near Tedim hospital in Chin state, Myanmar, while attempting to turn on the residential drinking water supply. He loses his right leg. Locals suspect the mine may have been planted by Myanmar military forces.

properties.Title: Ukrainian shelling damages infrastructure in Enerhodar, Ukraine, leaving city without water
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces shell Enerhodar, Ukraine, causing damage to hydraulic infrastructure. Part of the city is left without water.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike near Chamaa, Lebanon, damages water and electricity networks
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes carry out an airstrike in the area of Chamaa, southern Lebanon, amid ongoing clashes with Hezbollah. The attack damages water and power infrastructure.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. LBN23518, LBN23517, LBN23519, LBN23520, LBN23516

properties.Title: Palestinian family fetching water from spring attacked by Israeli settlers and dogs in Jericho, Palestine
properties.Description: A Palestinian family fetching water from a spring is attacked by Israeli settlers in Jericho, West Bank, Palestine. The settlers hurl stones at the family and set their dogs on them before stealing their belongings.

properties.Title: Russia attacks Kyiv Dam with drones and missiles
properties.Description: In an attack on Ukrainian energy infrastruture, Russia attacks the Kyiv Dam resulting in civilian casualties.

properties.Title: Massive Russian air attack disrupts water and energy provision in Kyiv, Ukraine
properties.Description: Power and water supplies are disrupted in parts of Kyiv, Ukraine after a massive Russian air attack in August.

properties.Title: Orma militia attack Degodia herders at water point in Bura, Kenya, killing five and injuring others
properties.Description: Suspected Orma militia ambush Degodia herders at a water point near El Niqa, in Bura, Kenya. Armed with arrows and machetes, they kill five people, including a child, and injure others. The attack is linked to tensions following the arrest of Orma community members.

properties.Title: Istanbul café owner dies after being stabbed and shot during dispute over leaking drain, Türkiye
properties.Description: A dispute over a leaking drain between two business owners in Istanbul, Türkiye, escalates into violence, leaving one person dead. The victim, a café owner, had confronted the owner of a neighbouring business about the leak. During the altercation, the café owner is stabbed and shot, sustaining fatal injuries.

properties.Title: Canal dispute sparks deadly clash between Sylhet villages in Bangladesh, killing one and injuring 70
properties.Description: Residents of the villages of Rafinagar and Mirzapur clash in Derai, Bangladesh, over control of a government canal. One person is killed and at least 70 are injured. Shops in Banglabazar are also looted and vandalized.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian crops and irrigation systems in Nahhalin, Palestine
properties.Description: Dozens of Israeli settlers destroy irrigation systems and uproot olive trees and other crops on Palestinian lands in Nahhalin, Palestine.

properties.Title: Ukrainian shelling damages water supply generator in Lyubymivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian shelling in Lyubymivka village (Kherson Oblast), Ukraine, damages a generator that powers the local water supply.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers in military uniforms vandalize water tanks, assault Palestinians, and loot livestock in West Bank, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers disguised in military uniforms attack Palestinians east of Siir in West Bank, Palestine. They vandalize water tanks, injure residents, loot 300 sheep, and destroy residential rooms.

properties.Title: A water treatment facility in Kansas, U.S., experiences a cybersecurity incident disrupting operations
properties.Description: The water treatment facility in Arkansas City, Kansas experiences a cybersecurity incident on 22 September 2024, leading to a temporary switch to manual operations. Despite the incident, there was no disruption to the water supply or service delivery.

properties.Title: Israeli forces open fire on water tanks during clash with Palestinian militant groups in Jenin, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli forces raid Jenin camp in West Bank, Palestine, and exchange fire with Palestinian militant groups, including Hamas, Al Aqsa Martyrs Brigade, Mujahideen Brigades, and Katibat Jenin (PIJ). Israeli soldiers target homes and open fire on water tanks, and an Israeli drone strikes gunmen hurling explosives. Two Palestinians are injured.

properties.Title: Woman injured in armed clash over water drainage in Shaheed Benazirabad, Pakistan
properties.Description: A violent clash between two groups from the Otho community breaks out in Dolo Otho village in Shaheed Benazirabad District, Pakistan, over the drainage of water from an alley. A woman is injured when shots are fired.

properties.Title: Syrian regime forces shell water station in Deir ez-Zor countryside, Syria, injuring one
properties.Description: Syrian regime forces shell a water station in Abu Hardoub village in Deir ez-Zor, Syria. One civilian is injured.

properties.Title: QSD forces detain civilian over alleged water station breach in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) arrests a civilian in Basira village, Deir ez-Zor, Syria, accusing him of helping facilitate breaches at the town’s water station.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike damages water and power networks in Aita ech Chaab, Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike Aita ech Chaab, Lebanon, during ongoing clashes with Hezbollah. The strike causes damage to electricity and water networks. Israeli forces also fire machine guns toward the town.

properties.Title: Residents' demands for drinking water lead to physical altercations with police in in Naucalpan de Juarez, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents of several Colonias in Naucalpan de Juarez, Mexico, block a road demanding access to drinking water. There are some reports of physical altercations as state police intervene, surrounding and dispersing the protesters.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MEX92760; Gonzalez 2024

properties.Title: Girl killed by shelling while fetching water in Khyber, Pakistan
properties.Description: Artillery fire kills a young girl in Tirah Valley in Khyber District, Pakistan, while she collects water from a well. The shelling is part of an ongoing military operation that has also damaged nearby homes.

properties.Title: Russia destroys a bridge in Ukraine, cutting water supply and ending operation of a filtration plant
properties.Description: Russia destroys a bridge between Pokrovsk and Myrnohrad, Donesk region of Ukraine, interrupting the water supply and ending operation of a modular filtration plant.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. UKR174286; ANTIKOR 2024b

properties.Title: Houthi forces arrest Oxfam aid worker during water project field visit in Sadah,Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces arrest an Oxfam International water and sanitation project manager during a field visit to a water project in Sadah, Yemen. The reason for the arrest is unclear, but occurs amid Houthi claims of a "CIA-linked US-Israeli spy network" crackdown. The Oxfam worker is released eight months later, in May 2025.

properties.Title: Mob accosts man who stole water jerricans in Muranga South, Kenya
properties.Description: Residents of a village near Kenol in Muranga South, Kenya, accost a man for stealing a blanket and six water jerricans and hand him to police.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers vandalize Palestinian water systems in in Massafer Yuta, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers raid Yuta in Hebron, Palestine. They cut water pipes and destroy tanks in Massafer Yuta on Palestinian-owned land.

properties.Title: Police officer injured in violent protest over lack of potable water and poor sanitation in Jalandhar, India
properties.Description: A police officer is injured during a protest at the Jalandhar Municipal Corporation office, condemning them for their failure to provide clean drinking water or resolve ongoing problems with sewerage and drainage systems.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND167614; Hindustan Times 2024

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water container, olive trees and agricultural structures on Palestinian land in Bayt Imrin, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers on Palestinian-owned land destroy a water container, stone walls, olive trees and agricultural structures in Bayt Imrin, Palestine.

properties.Title: Environmental leader Juan Lopez who is helping protect a river is murdered in Honduras
properties.Description: Juan Lopez, an environmental activist in Honduras who worked to protect forests and rivers is assassinated, the fourth member of his organization to be killed since 2023.

properties.Title: Israeli jets destroy a water distribution vehicle in the Nuseirat Refugee Camp, Gaza, killing one
properties.Description: An Israeli air strike against a water distribution vehicle kills at least one Palestinian and wounds six others in the Nuseirat Refugee Camp in Gaza, Palestine.
properties.Sources: Azzoum 2024; Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE59783

properties.Title: IS gunmen attack water tanker in Deir ez-Zor, Syria, injuring one
properties.Description: Islamic State (IS) members armed with machine guns open fire on a water tanker belonging to the Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) in Abu Khashab, Deir ez-Zor, Syria, injuring one.

properties.Title: University student shot during demonstration over poor university sanitation in Ongata Rongai, Kenya
properties.Description: Students in Ongata Rongai, Kenya, block a road with burning tires in a protest over ongoing issues at Multimedia University, including poor sanitation. Police intervene by hitting and kicking the protesters, and use a water cannon and tear gas to disperse them. One student sustains a gunshot wound and another student is injured.

properties.Title: Attacks on energy systems in Sumy, Ukraine cut water supplies
properties.Description: Attacks on energy systems in Sumy, Ukraine cut water supplies.
properties.Sources: ANTIKOR 2024c; Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. UKR174316

properties.Title: Russian drone strikes damage water infrastructure leading to widespread outages in Sumy, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian drone strikes in Sumy, Ukraine, damage power and water infrastructure, causing widespread water outages across the city. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers violently block Palestinians from water well in Khirbat Tana, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers, backed by Israeli forces, attack Palestinians in Khirbat Tana, Nablus, to prevent them from accessing a water well.

properties.Title: Homes left without water following Ukrainian strike on munitions warehouse in Kamennyi, Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces conduct drone strikes on a munitions warehouse in Kamennyi village, Russia, triggering a series of explosions. In nearby Tikhoretsky District, 131 houses lose electricity and water and 1,200 people are evacuated. There are no civilian casualties.

properties.Title: Malian airstrike reportedly hits water truck near Abeibara, Mali
properties.Description: The Malian Air Force conducts an airstrike northeast of Abeibara, Mali. Local sources say a water truck is hit.

properties.Title: Guerrilla attack on oil pipeline leads to river oil spill in Norte de Santander, Colombia
properties.Description: Members of the National Liberation Army (ELN), a Colombian guerrilla group, detonate an explosive device attached to an oil pipeline in rural Norte de Santander, Columbia, causing an oil spill into the Margua River and nearby water sources.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike targets water station in Nasriyeh, Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike a water station in Nasriyeh, Lebanon, amid ongoing hostilities with Hezbollah. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Police fire shots at protest over water shortage in Boane, Mozambique
properties.Description: Residents in Boane, Mozambique, block a road over water and power shortages. Police intervene with dogs and fire shots. A young man leading the protest is detained for several hours; police tear his shirt and he is left with bruises.

properties.Title: Siblings fatally shot on return from fetching water in Matswale, South Africa
properties.Description: A brother and sister on their way home from fetching water are shot and killed by an unknown assailant in Matswale, South Africa. The attack occurs amid water shortages in the area which have left residents without consistent water supply to their homes. Locals report that water is sometimes available only at night, forcing people to make the journey in darkness and leaving them vulnerable to atta

properties.Title: At least 30 injured in BNP factional clash over water body in Kishoreganj, Bangladesh
properties.Description: Rival Bangladesh National Party (BNP) groups clash in Kishoreganj, Bangladesh, over control of a local water body, injuring at least 30 people.

properties.Title: Protesters block railways and detain railway staff over water access in Chapulco, Mexico
properties.Description: Protesters block railways and detain railway staff in Chapulco, Mexico, to protest the railway company's impact on a local well and water access.

properties.Title: Separatists destroy water supply machinery in Kech, Pakistan
properties.Description: Unidentified assailants (possibly Baloch separatists) use explosives to destroy water supply equipment in the Tagran Maskingar area of Kech, Pakistan, which they claim is used by military forces.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers attack farmers and spill drinking water in Khirbat Zanutah, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers attack Palestinian farmers, spill their drinking water and force them out of Khirbat Zanutah in Hebron, Palestine.

properties.Title: Missile strikes and falling debris damage water pipes in Belgorod, Russia; six civilians injured
properties.Description: Ukrainian missile strikes and falling debris from intercepted missiles damage water pipes and power lines in Belgorod, Russia. Six civilians are injured.

properties.Title: SAF drone strikes damage Tuti Island water station in Khartoum, Sudan
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) conducts drone strikes on Rapid Support Forces (RSF) in Khartoum‚ Sudan, damaging a water station in Tuti Island. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: One injured as police detain protesters over waterlogging in Charkhi Dadri, India
properties.Description: A protester is injured while being detained by police during a demonstration against waterlogging in Charkhi Dadri, India.

properties.Title: Delhi water board employee assaulted in sewer drainage dispute, India
properties.Description: About 20 to 25 people, led by a member of the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), are suspected of assaulting a Delhi water board employee during a dispute over sewer water drainage in the Kalyan Vihar neighborhood of North Delhi, India. The employee says he fell after being slapped and hit with a shoe, and was then beaten by men who had accompanied the AAP member.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND168605; The Indian Express 2024

properties.Title: Child killed in grenade blast near irrigation official's house in Sibi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Militants throw a grenade near the home of the Sibi Irrigation Department's sub-divisional officer in Balochistan, Pakistan, killing a child and wounding three others.

properties.Title: Pro-regime militias fire rocket at water drilling rig on the Euphrates river in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Pro-regime militias fire a rocket at a Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) water drilling rig on the Euphrates river bank near Thiban water station in Deir ez-Zor, Syria. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Farmer dies by self-immolation following protest over irrigation canal dispute in Melmalayanur, India
properties.Description: A farmer in Melmalayanur, India, sets himself on fire following a protest held in solidarity with a neighboring landowner seeking to build an irrigation canal on the farmer's land, which the landowner claims is public property. Officials confirm the land belongs to the farmer’s family, but he continues to face pressure over the dispute. He is taken to hospital but later dies from his injuries. Pol
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND168775; Nadu 2024

properties.Title: Two injured as residents clash over unpaid water bills in Tehuacan, Mexico
properties.Description: A fight breaks out between residents of a housing unit in Tehuacan, Mexico, after the president of the municipal water committee discloses the names of households that had not paid their water bills. The non-payments led the committee to cut off the area’s water supply. A woman and a girl are injured.

properties.Title: Mob torches two water tankers after pedestrian killed by vehicle in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Demonstrators in the Gulshan Town area of Karachi, Pakistan, throw stones at two water tankers and set them alight after a youth is run over and killed by a vehicle.

properties.Title: Strikes damage water pipes in Shebekino, Russia; one killed, two injured
properties.Description: Ukrainian drones and artillery hit Shebekino in Belgorod, Russia, damaging gas and water pipes. One civilian is killed and two others are injured.

properties.Title: Tribal and Clan Forces shells QSD water tanks, injuring two in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Tribal and Clan Forces shells Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) water tanks in Deir ez-Zor, Syria. Two QSD members are wounded in the attack.

properties.Title: A series of Russian missile attacks on the water systems of Donbas region of Ukraine cut water supplies to 260,000 people
properties.Description: Russian forces cause significant damage to two water facilities of the Donbas region of Ukraine, cutting water to Slovyansk, Kramatorsk, Druzhkivka, Kostyantynivka, and surrounding settlements affecting access for 260,000 people.

properties.Title: Activist shot after accusing Nkomazi officials of sabotaging village water in Schoemansdal, South Africa
properties.Description: An unidentified gunman shoots and injures a community activist outside his home in Schoemansdal, South Africa. The victim had recently used social media to accuse Nkomazi Local Municipality officials of sabotaging water provisions in a number of villages.

properties.Title: Rocket fire from Lebanon damages water infrastructure in Metulla, Israel
properties.Description: Hezbollah missiles and shrapnel hit Metulla, Israel, damaging homes and water and power infrastructure.

properties.Title: At least two killed in clash at watering point in Anole, Kenya
properties.Description: Suspected Wardei and Wailwana community members clash with weapons at a watering point in the village of Anole, Kenya, amid a land dispute. At least two people are killed and two are left injured.

properties.Title: Booby-trapped water tower kills three civilians in Inakarot, Mali
properties.Description: An improvised explosive device planted on a water tower generator detonates in Inakarot, Mali, killing three civilians and injuring one.

properties.Title: Seven Frontier Corps personnel ambushed and killed while fetching water in Kurram, Pakistan
properties.Description: Militants linked to the Pakistani Taliban (TTP) ambush Frontier Corps personnel near the Barani River in Central Kurram, Pakistan, as they fetch water, killing seven and wounding two.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water tank in Rujayb, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a water tank and trees on Palestinian land in Rujayb, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike on water tanker in Jabalya, Palestine, leaves several dead
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike a water tanker in Jabalya, Palestine. Three people are thought to have been killed but the exact figure is unknown.

properties.Title: Residents irrigating fields attacked over water dispute in Etah, India
properties.Description: Residents from the village of Tajpur Tigra are suspected of attacking people irrigating their fields in Nagla Mali, India, in a dispute over water supply. They throw stones and fire weapons, leaving six injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers in the West Bank block off the al-Auja spring, preventing Palestinians from accessing the water
properties.Description: Israeli settlers in the West Bank block off the al-Auja spring, preventing Palestinians from accessing the water.

properties.Title: Al-Qaeda militants claim to have targeted UAE water tanker in Abyan, Yemen
properties.Description: Al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula (AQAP) militants claim to have targeted a water tanker belonging to "United Arab Emirates (UAE) mercenaries" in Abyan, Yemen.

properties.Title: Fano claims attack on water tank at Ethiopian Defense Force camp in Amhara, Ethiopia
properties.Description: Fano (Amhara-based militia group) claims to have shelled a water tank at an Ethiopian National Defense Force (ENDF) camp in Birsheleko, in the Amhara region of Ethiopia. The group says seven soldiers were killed (figures unverified) in the attack and many wounded.

properties.Title: Israeli strike kills eight at water filling station in Rafah, Palestine
properties.Description: An Israeli drone strikes Palestinians at a water filling station in Rafah, Palestine, killing eight and injuring others.

properties.Title: Tribal and Clan Forces attacks QSD water station in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Tribal and Clan Forces attacks a Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) water station in the Deir ez-Zor countryside, Syria, sparking armed clashes. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Journalists investigating reports of contaminated water assaulted at water treatment company in Udayapur, Nepal
properties.Description: Two journalists investigating reports of contaminated water at a water treatment company in Udayapur, Nepal, are assaulted by a group while collecting samples. The group is led by the company's owner.

properties.Title: Violent clash over water source destroyed by illegal mining activities in Apowa, Ghana; several seriously injured
properties.Description: An armed clash breaks out between residents and illegal miners in Apowa, Ghana, after mining activities destroy a community water source. Two residents are shot and left seriously injured, while another person, thought to be a miner, has his hand severed by a machete.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water pipelines near As Sawahira ash Sharqiya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy water pipelines that serve Bedouin communities near the town of As Sawahira ash Sharqiya, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Russian airstrike destroys water station in rural Idlib, Syria; two workers wounded
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out an airstrike on a water station in in rural Idlib, Syria, wounding two workers and destroying the facility.

properties.Title: One killed in clash over water drainage in Jalil Pur, India
properties.Description: Two groups fight with sticks in a dispute over water drainage in the village of Jalil Pur, India. One person is killed.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers attack water pipelines supplying Palestinian farms in Ayn al Bayda, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers attack and destroy water pipelines used by Palestinian farmers in Ayn al Bayda, West Bank.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE61939, PSE61793

properties.Title: Four water engineers from Khuzaa municipality in Gaza are killed by an Israeli air strike
properties.Description: Four water engineers on their way to repair water infrastructure in Khuzaa, Gaza are killed by an Israeli airstrike on their vehicle.

properties.Title: Landmine kills water tanker driver near Khanaser, Syria
properties.Description: A civilian driving a water tanker in rural Aleppo, Syria, is killed when a landmine planted by unidentified gunmen explodes.

properties.Title: Six killed in airstrike on water filling point in Jabalya, Palestine
properties.Description: An Israeli airstrike targets a group of people fetching water in Jabalya, Palestine, killing six.

properties.Title: Water supply system damaged and four injured during strikes on Russian-backed separatist forces in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces target Russian-backed separatist forces with drone strikes and shelling in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine. Four civilians are injured and a water supply system is damaged.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike targets water supply point in Beit Lahiya, Palestine
properties.Description: An Israeli airstrike in Beit Lahiya, Palestine, targets a water supply point. A school is also struck, and an area outside of a hospital is shelled. At least 11 people are killed.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water meters during raid in Salfit, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers raid the village of Kifil Haris, Salfit, West Bank. They destroy water meters and throw stones at Palestinian houses.

properties.Title: Tribal and Clan Forces targets water station in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: A water station is attacked by Tribal and Clan Forces in the village of Al-Hawayij in Deir ez-Zor, Syria. Four members of the Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) are injured.

properties.Title: Grenade attack on irrigation office wounds two in Khuzdar, Pakistan
properties.Description: Unidentified militants throw a hand grenade at the irrigation department office in Khuzdar, Pakistan, injuring two people. The attackers flee the scene.

properties.Title: Clash over water extraction rights leaves one dead, three injured in Dadu District, Pakistan
properties.Description: An armed clash breaks out between Bhurt community groups over water extraction rights in Kothi Khokar village in Dadu District, Pakistan. One person is killed and three others are injured.

properties.Title: At least nine killed as Rapid Support Forces attack civilians and burn water stations in Azraq, Sudan
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) attacks civilians in the village of Azraq, Sudan, because they did follow an RSF order to vacate the village. Between nine and 15 civilians are killed, and water and electricity stations are set on fire.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water tanks in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy water tanks on Palestinian-owned land in the Umm Sarara area of Hebron, Palestine.

properties.Title: Water supply facility damaged in Ukrainian strikes on Valuyskiy, Russia
properties.Description: A water supply facility building is damaged following Ukrainian drone strikes and shelling across the Valuyskiy district of Russia, including the villages of Dolgoe, Kukuevka and Nizhniye Melnitsy. There are no casualties.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. RUS25624, RUS25700, RUS25746

properties.Title: Malian drone strike hits civilian vehicle carrying water tank in Kidal, Mali
properties.Description: The Malian Air Force conducts a drone strike on a civilian vehicle carrying a water tank in the village of In Tebezas in Kidal, Mali. The vehicle is left slightly damaged and there are no casualties. JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group) condemns the attack.

properties.Title: Protest over water shortages and power cuts injures two in Ambohibao, Madagascar
properties.Description: Residents in Ambohibao, Madagascar, block roads and burn tires to protest water shortages and power cuts. Protesters throw stones at gendarmes who respond with tear gas. At least two people are injured.

properties.Title: Israeli forces launch airstrikes across Lebanon’s Tyr District; water networks damaged, one dead, five injured
properties.Description: Israeli forces carry out airstrikes on multiple localities across Lebanon’s Tyr District, including Majdel Zoun, Rmadiyeh, El Bayada, Tayr Harfa, Jannata, Jouaiya and Maarakeh. The strikes damage water networks and other infrastructure, as well as property and crops. In Jouaiya, one person is killed and five others are injured. Casualties elsewhere are unknown.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. LBN28442, LBN28444 , LBN28449, LBN28450, LBN28455, LBN28456, LBN28454

properties.Title: One killed, seven injured in dispute over water entering fields in Gothana, India
properties.Description: Two groups fight with sticks in the village of Gothana, India, in a dispute over water entering fields. A school headmaster is killed and seven others are injured.

properties.Title: Farmers clash with police over canal access in Sullana, Peru
properties.Description: More than 60 farmers in Sullana, Peru, clash with police at a canal while trying to collect water for their crops during a water shortage. Police fire shots in the air to disperse them.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrikes leave nine dead and damage water networks in Tyr, Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli airstrikes destroy buildings and damage water networks in Tyr, Lebanon. Nine people are killed and 12 are wounded.

properties.Title: Grenade thrown at home of irrigation department engineer in Turbat, Pakistan
properties.Description: Unidentified assailants (likely Baloch separatists) throw a hand grenade at the home of an executive engineer from the government irrigation department in Turbat, Pakistan.

properties.Title: Police officer injured in protest over water shortages in Antananarivo, Madagascar
properties.Description: Residents in Antananarivo, Madagascar, stage a protest over water shortages and load shedding affecting their neighborhood. They block roads with burning tires, damage cars and throw stones at police officers, injuring at least one.

properties.Title: Shelling injures six and damages hospital water tanks in Beit Lahiya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli forces shell Kamal Odwan Hospital in Beit Lahiya, Palestine, damaging water tanks and injuring six children.

properties.Title: Airstrike targets drinking water facility in El Babliye, Lebanon
properties.Description: Israeli forces carry out an airstrike on a building used for drinking water in El Babliye, Lebanon. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Airstrikes kill 10 and damage water infrastructure in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces launch airstrikes on Zaporizhzhia, southeast Ukraine, damaging water and power infrastructure, a cancer treatment center and over 40 private buildings. 10 civilians are killed and 42 are injured.

properties.Title: Farmers attacked carrying water in Mapate, Mozambique; one person beheaded
properties.Description: Islamist militants attack farmers carrying water in the village of Mapate, Mozambique. At least one farmer is beheaded. Islamic State (IS) claims responsibility for the attack.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage water pipelines in Massafer Yuta, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers from the Suseya settlement damage water pipelines on Palestinian land in Massafer Yuta, West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: SAF airstrikes kill seven and destroy water station in Koma, Sudan
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) carries out airstrikes on Rapid Support Forces (RSF) in Koma in Sudan's North Darfur State, destroying a water station and killing seven civilians.

properties.Title: Shelling damages water pipelines and injures one in Nova Kakhovka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces shell the occupied city of Nova Kakhovka, Ukraine, damaging water and gas pipelines and injuring one civilian.

properties.Title: Two girls killed, several injured fetching water in Jabalya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli forces target Palestinians filling water containers in Jabalya, Palestine. Two girls are killed and several others are injured.

properties.Title: Soldier killed in JNIM attack on water truck in Intahaka, Mali
properties.Description: JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group) militants attack a Malian military vehicle transporting water in the village of Intahaka, Mali. One soldier is killed and militants seize the vehicle.

properties.Title: Water agency worker shot dead while inspecting well in Tehuacan, Mexico
properties.Description: An employee of a drinking water agency is shot dead by armed assailants on motorcycles while inspecting a well in Tehuacan, Mexico.

properties.Title: BLF attacks military checkpoint and water supply in Kech, Pakistan
properties.Description: Armed Balochistan Liberation Front (BLF) militants attack checkpoints in Kech, Pakistan, targeting the military's water supply.

properties.Title: Russian forces destroy Ternivska Dam at the Kurakhove Reservoir, flooding villages in Donetsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukraine reports that Russia has attacked and severely damaged Ternivska Dam at the Kurakhove Reservoir on the Vovcha River, causing flooding downstream.

properties.Title: Residents protesting water shortages beaten by police in Boyeros, Cuba
properties.Description: Residents block traffic in Boyeros, Cuba, protesting week-long blackouts and water shortages. Police intervene and beat some of the demonstrators.

properties.Title: Four injured in protest over water supply and disconnection of illegal water connections in Johannesburg, South Africa
properties.Description: Dozens of residents protest the disconnection of their illegal water connections and the lack of formal water supply in the Lenasia South area of Johannesburg, South Africa. They block roads, throw stones at the water agency workers who cut off the illegal connections and throw rocks at police. Police fire rubber bullets to disperse the crowd. Four demonstrators are injured, with one requiring hos

properties.Title: Al Shabaab blows up water borehole in Buulo Xaaji, Somalia
properties.Description: Al Shabaab attaches a magnetic explosive device to a water borehole in Buulo Xaaji, Somalia. The borehole is destroyed in the blast.

properties.Title: Ukrainian shelling in Horlivka, Ukraine, leaves 60,000 without water
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces shell Donetsk People's Republic (DPR) positions and substations in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine, leaving 60,000 residents without electricity, water, or heat.

properties.Title: Bangladesh National Party leaders stab Jubo Dal leader in dispute over canal control in Companiganj, Bangladesh
properties.Description: Local Bangladesh National Party (BNP) leaders fatally stab a Jubo Dal leader and injure three others during a fight over control of a canal in Companiganj, Bangladesh.

properties.Title: Refugees injured in clash over water access at migration center in Agadez, Niger
properties.Description: Ivoirian and Sierra Leonese refugees fight over water at an International Organization for Migration office in Agadez, Niger. Both groups sustain injuries. Police intervene with tear gas.

properties.Title: RSF destroys water sources and attack civilians in Wad Abu Salih, Sudan
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) attacks residents of Wad Abu Salih, Sudan, forcing them out of their homes and destroying their water sources. One civilian is injured.

properties.Title: Protesters block water flow in protest over leaks from poor quality infrastructure in Jerusalen area, Mexico
properties.Description: Protesters in the vicinity of Jerusalen, Mexico, block water flow in a demonstration over water leaking onto their lands as a result of poor quality infrastructure and the failure of the federal government and CONAGUA (National Water Commission) to meet commitments made with users of a local irrigation scheme.

properties.Title: QDW fighters and pro-Iranian militias attack QSD water station checkpoint in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: National Defence Forces (QDW), pro-Iranian militias from Al Hafl and Tribal and Clan Forces, attacks a Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) position in a water station in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria, sparking clashes and causing material damage.

properties.Title: Russian rocket attack on Odesa, Ukraine cuts water and power to the city
properties.Description: A Russian missile attack on Odesa, Ukraine cuts water and power to the city.

properties.Title: Russian attack on Kryvyi Rhi, Ukraine cuts power and water throughout the city
properties.Description: Energy infrastructure in Kryvyi Rih, Ukraine is attacked by Russian missiles, cutting power to pumping stations and water networks and cutting water to the entire city.

properties.Title: Russian attacks Kremenchuk hydroelectric station in Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian missile attack damages the Kremenchuk hydroelectric station in Ukraine.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrike on water company in Tyr, Lebanon, kills two and injures four
properties.Description: Israeli forces conduct an airstrike on the Tyr Water Company in Tyr, south Lebanon. Two people are killed, including the deputy mayor of Burj al-Chemali, and two others are injured in the attack.

properties.Title: Five killed, eight injured in clan dispute over water sources in Jalalaqsi, Somalia
properties.Description: Militias from Hawadle and Abgal clans clash between the villages of Ceelhareeri and Tarda, Hiiraan, Somalia over use of water sources and grazing pastures. Five people are killed and eight are left injured.

properties.Title: Eight villages left without water following Ukrainian drone attacks on substation in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces launch drone attacks on the "Fregat" transformer substation in the occupied village of Mykhailivka in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine. The attack destroys high-voltage electrical equipment, leaving eight villages without electricity and water.

properties.Title: Gunmen open fire on protest over flooding and water shortages in Chilpancingo de los Bravo, Mexico; two killed, four injured
properties.Description: Armed men open fire on people gathering outside a department store to join a protest demanding action on drinking water shortages, flooding, and poor infrastructure in Chilpancingo de los Bravo, Mexico. Two people are killed and four others are injured.

properties.Title: Woman killed while fetching water from stream near Ajebo, Nigeria
properties.Description: An unidentified armed group kills a woman fetching water from a stream in Mile 7 community, near Ajebo in Ogun State, Nigeria.

properties.Title: Seven injured in clan dispute over water sources in Xalfooley village, Somalia
properties.Description: Hawadle and Abgal clan militias fight in the village of Xalfooley, Somalia, over water sources and grazing pastures. Seven Hawadle members are injured.

properties.Title: SAF airstrikes kill six and destroy water sources in Kebkabiya, Sudan
properties.Description: Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) launches airstrikes on Kebkabiya, North Darfur, destroying water sources and killing six civilians.

properties.Title: Two killed in JNIM attack on water station in Tangayiri, Burkina Faso
properties.Description: A water station in Tangayiri, Burkina Faso, is attacked by JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group) militants. Two employees are killed.

properties.Title: Israeli forces open fire on people filling water outside hospital, killing two in Beit Lahiya, Palestine
properties.Description: Two people are killed and others are injured when Israeli forces open fire on people gathering to collect water at the Kamal Odwan Hospital in Beit Lahiya in Gaza, Palestine.

properties.Title: Indigenous people block highway in protest over water shortages in Mato Grosso do Sul, Brazil; 15 injured
properties.Description: Guarani, Guarani Kaiowa, and Terena Indigenous people block a highway between the areas of Itapora and Dourados in Matto Grosso Do Sul, Brazil, to protest water shortages. Military police fire rubber bullets and use pepper spray to disperse the protesters. 10 police vehicles are vandalized and 15 people are injured, including three Indigenous people and 12 police officers.

properties.Title: Mother and daughter assaulted by neighbors over water dispute in Panvel, India
properties.Description: A mother and her 18-year-old daughter are stripped and assaulted by their neighbors over a water dispute in Panvel, India.

properties.Title: Water outages in Khmelnytskyi Oblast, Ukraine, after Russian missile debris damages energy infrastructure
properties.Description: Several settlements across Khmelnytskyi Oblast, Ukraine, are temporarily without water after debris from Russian missiles crashes into energy infrastructure.

properties.Title: Russian missile attacks cut water and electricity to 280,000 people in the Rivne region of Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian missile attacks cut water and electricity to the Rivne region of Ukraine, affecting 280,000 people.

properties.Title: Water and power lost in cities after 20kg of explosives used to blow up critical canal in Zubin Potok, Kosovo
properties.Description: 20 kilograms of explosives planted at the Ibar-Lepenac canal in Zubin Potok are detonated, destroying critical infrastructure and cutting water and power to cities across Kosovo. The canal supplies water to a number of cities and supports the operation of three power stations, including the country's main coal-fired station. Kosovo officials Kosovo officials called it a “terrorist act” conducted b
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. XKX1092; Bytyci and Sekularac 2024; Dimadick 2025; Zhinipotoku and Semini 2024; Associated Press 2024b

properties.Title: 10 killed in water dispute between clan militias in Ceel Dheere, Somalia
properties.Description: Militias from Hawadle and Abgal clans clash over water sources in Ceel Dheere, Somalia, killing 10 people and leaving several others injured.

properties.Title: Regime airstrikes target water station and other infrastructure in Idlib, Syria
properties.Description: Regime warplanes launch airstrikes on the city of Idlib, Syria, targeting a water station, schools, and other infrastructure while regime fighters attack the city with missiles. Four civilians are killed and 19 are wounded.

properties.Title: Hundreds occupy Ancipa dam in Troina, Sicily, to block supply diversion amid shortages
properties.Description: Hundreds of people, including residents and local mayors, occupy the water distribution facilities of Lake Ancipa dam in Troina, Sicily, for three days and attempt to block a pipeline supplying Caltanissetta and San Cataldo. The protest is led by the mayors of Troina, Nicosia, Sperlinga, Gagliano Castelferrato and Cerami, whose municipalities rely solely on the Ancipa reservoir for their water sup
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. ITA25264; Quotidiano 2024; Tondo 2024

properties.Title: BNP and UP members attacked and thrown into reservoir over irrigation project in Pich Kamtal, Bangladesh; seven injured
properties.Description: Members of the Bangladesh National Party (BNP) and United People's Bangladesh (UP) are attacked by around 15 armed locals who claim they are obstructing an irrigation project in the Pich Kamtal area of Bandar Upazila, Bangladesh. Two BNP members are thrown into a reservoir and later rescued by the police. In total, seven people are injured in the attack. One victim files a case for attempted murde
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. BGD29562; Prothomalo 2024

properties.Title: Israeli settlers attack Palestinians installing water pipelines in Umm Safa, Palestine, injuring three
properties.Description: Israeli settlers open fire on Palestinians and beat workers installing water pipelines in Umm Safa in West Bank, Palestine, leaving three people injured. Israeli forces then raid the area to secure settlers before firing tear gas at Palestinians, causing several people to suffer inhalation injuries.

properties.Title: Forces opposed to the Syrian government seize the main water pumping station for the city of Aleppo, cutting water supplies
properties.Description: Forces opposed to the Syrian government of Assad seize the main water pumping station for the city of Aleppo, cutting off water to the city.

properties.Title: Protesters clash with police during demonstration over chemical pollution of stream in Ludhiana, India; one injured
properties.Description: Thousands gather in Ludhiana, India, to protest the discharge of chemical waste into the Buddha Nala stream, demanding the closure of common effluent treatment plants at dyeing units.
