A counter-protest is staged by thousands of dyeing unit employees. Over 2,000 police are deployed, who use network jammers to restrict communication and baton charge the protesters. One person sustains a head injury
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND173043; Kaur 2024

properties.Title: Protesters set fire to water facility in demonstration against general election results in Chokwe, Mozambique
properties.Description: Supporters of the Optimist Party for the Development of Mozambique (PODEMOS) set fire to a state-owned water facility in Chokwe, Mozambique, to protest the election of the Mozambique Liberation Front (FRELIMO) in the 2024 general election. They also set fire to the home of a police officer and FRELIMO supporter.

properties.Title: Three injured in Israeli drone attack on hospital water tanks in Beit Lahiya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli forces use drones to attack water tanks at the Indonesian Hospital in Beit Lahiya in North Gaza, Palestine, injuring three.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water pipeline on Palestinian land in Nahhalin, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers attack Palestinian land in Nahhalin in West Bank< Palestine. They destroy a water pipeline and chop down olive trees and grape vines.

properties.Title: Farmers break dike of water company to irrigate crops amid water shortages in Piura, Peru
properties.Description: Farmers protesting water shortages in Piura, Peru, break the dike of a local water company in order to irrigate their crops. They clash with police but there are no casualties.

properties.Title: QSD seizes control of Babiri water station following clash with JWS in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) makes advances in northern Aleppo, Syria, taking control of Babiri water station in Jirah Airbase after clashing with Syrian National Army (JWS) members.

properties.Title: Israeli drone blows up water tank in Majdel Zoun, Lebanon
properties.Description: A drone launched by Israeli forces during a ceasefire explodes in a water tank in Majdel Zoun in Tyr, Lebanon.

properties.Title: JWS forces take control of Babiri water station following QSD clashes in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian National Army (JWS) fighters enter the town of Babiri in rural Aleppo, Syria, and take control of its water station following clashes with Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD).

properties.Title: Clashes between farmers and Rapid Reaction Force over water shortages leave one dead, six injured in Kut, Iraq
properties.Description: Farmers protesting water shortages in Kut, Iraq, clash with Rapid Reaction Force, leaving one dead and six others injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water well on Palestinian land in Yasuf, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a water well and cut down 15 olive trees on Palestinian-owned land in Yasuf, Palestine.

properties.Title: At least five injured as BNP factions clash over control of canal in Bashila village, Bangladesh
properties.Description: A violent clash breaks out between two factions of the Bangladesh National Party (BNP) in a dispute over the control of a canal in the Rajshahi village of Bashila, Bangladesh. The groups are armed with sticks and improvised weapons, leaving at least five people injured.

properties.Title: Residents and farmers break dike in protest over water shortages in Paita, Peru
properties.Description: Over 500 farmers and residents from several localities in Paita, Peru, gather at a water company site and break a dike supplying water to the La Huaca district, redirecting it to irrigate their crops and nearby areas. The action is part of a protest against regional water shortages, with demonstrators calling on the government and the Ministry of Agriculture for assistance.

properties.Title: Locals expel QSD forces after attempted theft from water stations in Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Residents take control of Hayet village in Aleppo, Syria, after expelling Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) who had attempted to steal equipment from local water and electricity stations.

properties.Title: For weeks Turkish military forces attack the Tishrin Dam in Syria with reports of deaths and injuries
properties.Description: Beginning on 9 December 2024 and continuing through January 2025, pro-Turkish Syrian National Army (SNA) military forces attack the Tishrin Dam on the Euphrates in Syria, severely damaging electrical generation infrastructure and cutting power to numerous population centers. At least five civilians are killed and 15 injured.

properties.Title: Resident shot dead by Houthi supervisor during dispute over water project in Ar Rujum, Yemen
properties.Description: A resident of Ar Rujum, Yemen, dies after being shot five times by a Houthi supervisor in a row over a water project. The incident takes place at the home of a sheikh and is witnessed by tribal mediators who had been attempting to resolve the dispute.

properties.Title: Residents block highway and clash with police in Talara, Peru, after 10 days without drinking water
properties.Description: Dozens of residents in Talara, Peru, block a highway with burning objects to protest being without drinking water for 10 days and the lack of water tanks to supply their area. Clashes break out when police arrive to clear the road, with protesters alleging they were assaulted by officers.

properties.Title: Farmers threaten mass suicide to demand compensation for land lost to irrigation project in Bidar, India
properties.Description: Members of Karanja Horata Samiti, a farmers' organization, stage a protest in Bidar city, India, demanding compensation for land they lost to the Karanja Irrigation Project. They carry nooses and threaten mass suicide if their demands are not met. A farmer is rescued by a police officer and hospitalized after he attempts to consume poison.

properties.Title: Woman seriously injured in explosion while attempting to access booby-trapped well in Essouk, Mali
properties.Description: Malian Armed Forces (FAMa) and Wagner forces burn Tuareg huts in Essouk, Mali, and trap the door of a water well with an improvised explosive device, leaving a woman seriously injured after she attempts to access the well.

properties.Title: Myanmar soldier fleeing border police attacks villagers fetching water in Maungdaw Township, Myanmar, injuring one
properties.Description: A Myanmar military soldier fleeing border police throws a grenade at locals collecting water from a pond near Kan Thar Yar village in Maungdaw Township, Myanmar. One person is injured in the attack.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water well in Ayn al Bayda, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers set fire to a Palestinian-owned residential building and destroy a water well in Ayn al Bayda in West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: The towns of Burshtyn and Demyaniv, Ukraine lose heating and water supplies after Russian missile attacks
properties.Description: The towns of Burshtyn and Demyaniv, Ukraine lose heating and water supplies after Russian missile attacks on Ukrainian energy systems.

properties.Title: Kuki assailants bomb water supply quarters in Jiribam, India
properties.Description: Kuki assailants detonate an improvised explosive device in Jatrapur village in Jiribam, India, destroying recently built quarters of a water supply scheme. The attack occurs amid ongoing violence between Meitei and tribal communities, including Kuki-Zomi groups.

properties.Title: Officer injured in clash between farmers and activists at demonstration against water reservoirs in Sainte-Soline, France
properties.Description: In Sainte-Soline, France, 30 members of the Stop Megabasins collective rally to oppose large water reservoirs and celebrate a Bordeaux court ruling that declared four of them illegal. Tensions flare when farmers supporting the reservoirs stage a counter-demonstration, leading to clashes. Gendarmes intervene to separate the groups, and one officer is slightly injured in the process. A 26-year-old a

properties.Title: Heavy fighting in Al Zorg, North Darfur, Sudan, leaves nearly 100 dead and water resources destroyed
properties.Description: Clashes continue between Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF), backed by Darfur Joint Forces (JSAMF), and the Rapid Support Forces (RSF), supported by Arab militia in Al Zorg, Kutum (North Darfur, Sudan). SAF airstrikes are reported as joint forces retake RSF bases, the airport, and weapons depots. The joint forces claim to have killed or wounded 700 RSF soldiers, while RSF denies the figure and accuses it

properties.Title: Water borehole destroyed in Montepuez, Mozambique, amid election protests
properties.Description: A water borehole is destroyed by a group of people in Nanune village in Montepuez, Mozambique. The incident is reportedly linked to protests over general election results.

properties.Title: QSD forces shell water station in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) shells a water station in the town of Al-Khafsa, in rural Aleppo, Syria.

properties.Title: Malian Air Force drone strike hits water barrels in Talhandak village, Mali
properties.Description: Malian Air Force drone strikes targeting an unidentified armed group hit water barrels in Talhandak, Mali.

properties.Title: South African water and sanitation employee is shot while working on a water-supply reservoir
properties.Description: A water sector worker for the eThekwini Municipality in South Africa was shot while working on a reservoir providing water to the community, in what is thought to be a "water mafia" attack.

properties.Title: QSD forces shell water station and farm in rural Aleppo, Syria, injuring two
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) shells a water station and a farm near the town of Rasm Abbud Jaftalak in Aleppo, Syria, injuring two civilians.

properties.Title: The city of Kalush, Ukraine is left without heat and water after a Russian missile attack
properties.Description: The city of Kalush, Ukraine loses water and power on Christmas after a Russian missile attack cuts power to treatment plants and pumps.

properties.Title: Myanmar military abducts men digging water well in Minhla Township, Myanmar
properties.Description: Four men digging a water well in Shwe Zan Pyayt village, Minhla Township, are abducted by the Myanmar military.

properties.Title: ISIL members attack water station in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: A Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) military point in a water station in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria, is attacked and damaged by members of the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL).

properties.Title: Turkish forces shell village water station in rural Ar Raqqa, Syria
properties.Description: Turkish forces, together with the Syrian National Army (JWS), shell a water station in the village of Fatsa in Ar Raqqa, Syria, causing material damage.

properties.Title: Mortar shell damages water pipes in Duhok, Iraq
properties.Description: A mortar shell of unknown origin hits a road in Duhok, Iraq, damaging water pipes supplying surrounding areas.

properties.Title: Attacks on water and energy systems in Goma, DR Congo cut water to hundreds of thousands of people
properties.Description: Attacks on energy systems and water infrastructure in Goma, Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) cut water supplies to 700,000 people in January 2025.

properties.Title: Four people are killed in Maharashtra region of India in a dispute over water sharing from a well for irrigation
properties.Description: A long-running family dispute over sharing water from a well turns violent and four people are killed and several injured in the Maharashtra region of India.

properties.Title: Tribal disputes over village water supply leave three dead and four injured in Osmanabad, India
properties.Description: Two groups clash over water supply in the village of Bavi, Osmanabad, India. Three people are killed and four others injured.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IND175863, IND176535

properties.Title: Residents take over water station in Puerto Badel, Colombia, and disrupt water supply to Cartagena
properties.Description: Residents protesting the state of roads leading to their communities take over a water pumping station in Puerto Badel in Bolivar, Colombia, disrupting drinking water supply to the nearby city of Cartagena.

properties.Title: QSD drone strike on water station leaves one dead and two injured in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) carries out a drone strike on Al-Khafsa town's water station in rural Aleppo, Syria. Three people are injured, including the station manager and an electrical engineer who were trying to fix previous damage to the station. One victim dies from their injuries.

properties.Title: Attacks by Turkish forces on the Tishrin Dam in Syria kill and injure hundreds and cut water for more than 410,000 people
properties.Description: Many civilians are killed in Turkish attacks on the Tishrin Dam and surrounding areas. The dam is a flashpoint in fighting between the Syrian National Army, Turkish-backed rebel groups, and the Kurdish-led Syrian Democratic Forces. Attacks on the dam have cut access to water and power for more than 410,000 people and raised concerns about the safety of the dam.
properties.Sources: Syrians for Truth and Justice 2025; Waller and Abbas 2025; Abdo and Martany (AP) 2025

properties.Title: Clash between protesters and gendarmerie leaves eight injured in demonstration over water price increases in Paoscoto, Senegal
properties.Description: A protest over increased water costs leads to violent clashes in Paoscoto village, Senegal. At least six female protesters are attacked, and one is taken to hospital for her injuries. Two gendarmes also sustain injuries. The gendarmerie launches over 300 canisters of tear gas at the crowd before arresting 34 demonstrators, including minors and the elderly.

properties.Title: Turkish forces and JWS target water tanker in rural Al Hasakeh, Syria
properties.Description: Turkish forces use drones and artillery to target a water tanker in rural Al Hasakeh, Syria. The attack is carried out in conjunction with the Syrian National Army (JWS).

properties.Title: Pakistani Taliban militants blow up water tanker; one dead in North Waziristan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Pakistani Taliban (TTP) militants use improvised explosives to carry out an attack on a military vehicle used for carrying water in Spinwam in Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa District. A Frontier Corps personnel is killed in the blast.

properties.Title: At least 40 killed in attack on fishers and irrigation farmers amid ISWAP factional clash near Baga, Nigeria
properties.Description: Suspected Islamic State – West Africa Province (ISWAP) fighters kill at least 40 fishers and irrigation farmers in attacks on villages near Baga in Nigeria’s Borno State. The victims had been working under a protection agreement with one ISWAP faction to continue irrigation farming, but another faction attacks them and kills the farmers under protection. Nearby Boko Haram members pursue the attack

properties.Title: A drone attack by the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces in Sudan damages Merowe Dam cutting water, pumps, and power to a city
properties.Description: Omdurman, a city north of Sudan’s capital, Khartoum, loses drinking water after a drone attack by the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) on the Merowe Dam, one of Africa’s largest hydropower projects. The attack disrupts electricity and renders Nile water stations and wells inoperable.

properties.Title: Gunmen attack Thiban water station in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen use rocket-propelled grenades to attack a water station in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water collection well and olive trees in Nablus, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy a water collection well and chop down olive trees on Palestinian-owned land in the Bayta district of Nablus, Palestine.

properties.Title: RSF floods villages in Al Jazirah, Sudan, after killing woman and demanding ransom
properties.Description: A woman with special needs is assaulted and killed by the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) in Tayba Al Naim in Al Jazirah, Sudan. The RSF demands a ransom for her body and then opens irrigation channels, flooding the village and neighboring Hasab Allah.

properties.Title: Rapid Support Forces shells Al Manara water station in Karrari, Sudan
properties.Description: The Al Manara water station in Sudan's Karrari District is shelled by Rapid Support Forces (RSF) fire.

properties.Title: Three killed while collecting water in RSF attack on Khartoum water distribution point, Sudan
properties.Description: The Rapid Support Forces (RSF) targets Al Nil city, including a water distribution point in the Al Thawra district of Khartoum, Sudan. The shelling kills three civilians who were lining up to collect water.

properties.Title: Water stations are targeted by RSF drone strikes in Shuwak, Sudan
properties.Description: Water stations are targeted by Rapid Support Forces (RSF) drone strikes in Shuwak, Sudan. A number of civil defense personnel are injured trying to extinguish flames.

properties.Title: Ballistic missile strike on Kyiv, Ukraine, kills four and damages water supply system
properties.Description: A Russian ballistic missile strike on Kyiv, Ukraine, leaves four dead, injures three and damages a water supply system. The damage leads to flooding and prevents water from reaching residents.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. UKR204547; ANTIKOR 2025a

properties.Title: Violent dispute at waterpoint leads to death of woman in Rumbek, South Sudan
properties.Description: Five unidentified women suspected to be from an Agar Dinka clan attack a woman at a waterpoint in Rumbek, South Sudan. The victim, from another Agar Dinka clan, later dies from her injuries.

properties.Title: QSD forces shell Al-Khafsa water station in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) launches rockets at the Al-Khafsa water station in Aleppo, Syria, targeting Syrian National Army (JWS) positions.

properties.Title: Houthi forces abduct more than 10 villagers and shoot at houses over water sanitation project in Ar Ribat, Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces abduct over 10 residents and raid houses in Ar Ribat, Yemen. The attack is aimed at forcing residents to give up their land for a water sanitation project proposed by a Houthi investor. Houses are shot at but no casualties are reported.

properties.Title: Water truck triggers improvised explosives in Tillaberi, Niger
properties.Description: An improvised explosive device planted by an armed group, likely JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group), explodes as a water truck passes near Mine de Samira in Gotheye, Tillaberi, Niger. The truck sustains minor damage; no casualties are reported.

properties.Title: QSD forces shell water station in Big Habbuba, Syria
properties.Description: A water station is shelled by Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) in the town of Big Habbuba in rural Aleppo, Syria. The attack causes material damages; casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Around eight dead, 12 injured in clash between farmers and herders over land and water resources in Agana, Chad
properties.Description: Clashes erupt between farmers and herders in Agana, Chad, leaving between seven or eight people dead and 12 injured. The violence is driven by disputes over land and water resources.

properties.Title: Several farmers are injured during a conflict over water rights between cities and farms in Isfahan, Iran
properties.Description: Several farmers are injured in a violent clashes with Iranian security forces in a revival of conflict over water rights between cities and farms in Isfahan, Iran.

properties.Title: RSF soldier killed in dispute over water station in Abu Karaynka, Sudan
properties.Description: A clash erupts in a refugee camp in Abu Karaynka, Sudan, after a Rapid Support Forces (RSF) soldier fires shots and blocks the operation of a water station, claiming it was built on his farm. The soldier is killed.

properties.Title: Russian drone strikes interrupt water supply in Sumy, Ukraine
properties.Description: Drone strikes carried out by Russian forces damage houses and lead to water supply disruptions in the Sumy village of Pishchane, Ukraine.

properties.Title: TTP abducts Frontier Corps personnel, torches water tanker in North Waziristan, Pakistan
properties.Description: Armed Pakistani Taliban (TTP) assailants abduct a Tochi Scouts member of the Frontier Corps in Hassan Khel, North Waziristan, as he returns from the market. The attackers also seize two government-owned water tankers and set fire to one of them.

properties.Title: RSF threatens to cut off water supply in Golo, Sudan
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) claims to have overtaken Golo in North Darfur, Sudan, and threaten to cut off water from Al Fasher during clashes with Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF).
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SUD33245, SUD33266

properties.Title: Systematic sabotage puts Bahri water station out of service in Khartoum, Sudan
properties.Description: The Khartoum State Water Corporation makes a press statement announcing that Bahri water station has been put out of service following systemic sabotage of equipment, including extensive damage to electrical transformers, cables, dashboards, pumps, laboratory equipment and tanks, which has rendered the station inoperable. The station is one of Khartoum's largest, and its closure occurs amid a seve

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water containers in Suseya, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian water containers and attack houses and vehicles in the village of Suseya in West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Turkish forces strike water station in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Turkish forces carry out an airstrike on a water station in the village of Upper Shyookh in Aleppo, Syria, causing material damages.

properties.Title: Ukrainian shelling and drone strikes damage water treatment plant and injure three in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces launch drone strikes and shell Russian separatist forces in occupied Horlivka, Donetsk. The attack injures three civilians and damages a water treatment facility.

properties.Title: RSF snipers shoot at engineers assessing water station damage in Khartoum, Sudan
properties.Description: A group of engineers assessing conflict-related damage to Bahri water station in Khartoum North, Sudan, are shot at by Rapid Support Forces (RSF) snipers. There are no casualties.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SUD33419; Sudan Tribune 2025

properties.Title: Gunmen clash over water well digging in Yarim, Yemen
properties.Description: Gunmen from Al Dakhla and Aboum villages exchange fire during a dispute over water well digging in Yarim, Yemen.

properties.Title: Aid workers report people are killing each other over access to water in Gaza after Israel cuts off aid deliveries
properties.Description: Aid workers in Gaza report "people are fighting for water… people are killing each other over water" after Israel cuts off all humanitarian aid.

properties.Title: Two killed, three injured in clash over irrigation water in Maysan, Iraq
properties.Description: Gunmen from two unidentified tribes clash with light weapons in Al Abyad village, in Maysan, Iraq, after a dispute over irrigation water. Two people are killed and three injured.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drone strikes damage water infrastructure in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces carry out drone strikes and shell an unknown target in occupied Horlivka, Ukraine. Water infrastructure is damaged during the attack.

properties.Title: Irrigation canal dispute leads to armed clashes in Nisab, Yemen
properties.Description: Two tribes armed with weapons clash over the use of an irrigation canal in Nisab, Yemen.

properties.Title: Clash over sewer water disposal injures four in Matikunda, India
properties.Description: Two factions of the Trinamool Congress clash with bricks, sticks, and sharp weapons in a dispute over sewer water disposal in Matikunda, India. Four people are injured.

properties.Title: 20 injured, five seriously, in armed mob attack after community water supply is cut off in San Juan Sacatepequez, Guatemala
properties.Description: An armed mob attacks and beats indigenous authorities in El Pilar 2, San Juan Sacatepequez, leaving 20 people injured (five seriously). The violence erupts following ongoing tensions with the mayor, who cut off the indigenous community’s water supply and is accused of inciting the mob. At the time of the attack, the indigenous people had entered a building occupied by supporters of the mayor in or

properties.Title: Five injured in dispute over irrigation in Khulna, Bangladesh
properties.Description: Villagers staging a protest over an irrigation dispute clash with Awami League supporters in Khulna, Bangladesh. Five people are injured, including a Jubo Dal member who was attempting to mediate between the groups.

properties.Title: Striking shipyard workers in El Natahoyo, Spain, set fire to a water treatment plant during protests over employee dismissals
properties.Description: Striking shipyard workers in El Natahoyo, Spain, set fire to a water treatment plant during protests over employee dismissals. Police respond with smoke canisters and rubber bullets. 30 people are injured.

properties.Title: Drone debris hits wastewater treatment plant, severely injuring one in Lipetsk, Russia
properties.Description: Debris from an intercepted Ukrainian drone falls on the Lipetsk wastewater treatment plant in Russia, severely injuring an employee.

properties.Title: Drone strikes kill two civilians and disrupt water supply in Kherson, Ukraine
properties.Description: A Russian drone attack on Kherson, Ukraine, kills two civilians and disrupts the city's water supply, heating, and electricity.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. UKR207723; ANTIKOR 2025b

properties.Title: Protesters shut off water pipeline in Tontouan, Indonesia
properties.Description: Dozens of residents stage a protest in the village of Tontouan, Indonesia, over road damage caused by the vehicle of a water supply company. During the protest they shut off the main valve of the company's water pipeline.

properties.Title: Clashes erupt over alleged water and electricity theft in Anthili, Greece
properties.Description: Residents of Anthili, Central Greece, clash with Roma after reporting them for alleged water and electricity theft. A community leader claims a Roma tried to run him and two others over, while the Roma accuse the residents of throwing rocks. Both sides file lawsuits.

properties.Title: Violent clash erupts between villagers over land irrigation in Natore, Bangladesh, injuring at least 15
properties.Description: Residents of the Kadamkuri area of Natore, Bangladesh, clash with firearms in a dispute over the irrigation of a paddy field. At least 15 people are injured.

properties.Title: Suspected RSF drone targets water treatment plant in Kosti, Sudan
properties.Description: A water treatment plant on the White Nile River in Kosti, Sudan, is targeted by a fighter drone. The drone is suspected to be linked to the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) due to similar incidents in the area.

properties.Title: Water tower damaged by Ukrainian shelling in Belgorod, Russia
properties.Description: A water tower in the village of Terebreno in Belgorod, Russia, is damaged by shelling from Ukrainian forces.

properties.Title: Mob torches water tankers and beats up drivers in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: A mob torches five water tankers and assaults their drivers during a demonstration near Jail Chowrangi, Karachi, Pakistan. The protest erupted after a speeding dumper truck hit and killed a motorcyclist.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers attack water pump on Palestinian-owned land in Bayt Illu, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers target a water pump on Palestinian-owned land in Bayt Illu, West Bank, Palestine. They also target an agricultural greenhouse and spray anti-Arab sentiments.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drones strike oil pumping station in Krasnodar, Russia, damaging water tank
properties.Description: Ukrainian drones strike an oil pumping station in Krasnodar, Russia, damaging a water tank and disrupting operations.

properties.Title: Russian drone strikes on water tanker injure emergency workers and officials in Donetsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Two State Emergency Service of Ukraine (SESU) workers delivering water in Dontesk, Ukraine, are injured when a manually piloted Russian drone targets the SESU tanker. A second drone targets the evacuation crew who had come to rescue the workers, injuring two police officers and the head of the local administration.

properties.Title: Shelling damages water supply system in occupied Shevchenko, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces shell occupied Shevchenko, Ukraine, damaging power lines and a water supply system.

properties.Title: Rioters protesting water price increases torch infrastructure at water offices in Chokwe, Mozambique
properties.Description: During a demonstration over water prices, rioters break and torch infrastructure at water offices in the town of Chokwe, Mozambique, prompting the district administrator and mayor to flee the area. Police open fire to disperse them.

properties.Title: Mass Russian drone attack cripples power and water supplies in Odesa, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces attack Ukraine's Black Sea port city of Odesa with a massive drone strike, leaving most of its residents without power, water, or heating.

properties.Title: Gunmen open fire on water tanker in Al Abr, Yemen, killing one and injuring another
properties.Description: Unidentified gunmen open fire on a water tanker belonging to Yemen's National Shield Forces between the Al Muthalath and Ba Haj checkpoints in Al Abr, Yemen. One soldier is killed and another injured.

properties.Title: Protesters clash with police during violent protest over Indus river canals project in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Police personnel in Karachi, Pakistan, are attacked by protesters during a demonstration against the construction of six new canals on the Indus river. The protest, attended by around 500-600 people, turns violent when some of the protesters beat police workers and hit them with sticks and stones. Many are injured during the clash but the exact number is not reported.

properties.Title: Water supply infrastructure damaged by drone debris in Belgorod, Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces carry out 41 drone strikes across the district of Valuyskiy in Belgorod, Russia. Part of a water supply system is damaged, likely caused by falling debris after 37 drones are shot down by Russian forces.

properties.Title: Physical fight breaks out at community meeting in Knysna, South Africa, over housing, water and sanitation services
properties.Description: Residents clash during a meeting at a community hall in Knysna, South Africa, over demands for subsidized housing, electricity, toilets and water. A physical fight breaks out and police are called. The extent of injuries is unknown.

properties.Title: Drone strike destroys schools and water storage tank in Kyauktaga Township, Myanmar
properties.Description: A drone strike carried out by the Myanmar military drops bombs in the village of Hpyan Tha Lin in Kyauktaga Township, Myanmar. Two schools and a water storage tank are destroyed in the attack. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Protester and journalist run over by vehicle during drain demonstration in Hermosillo, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents from Colonia Santa Isabel in Hermosillo, Mexico, block traffic to protest a drain installed parallel to a canal. A vehicle runs over a woman who is protesting, as well as a journalist covering the protest. Both sustain injuries.

properties.Title: Unidentified gunmen open fire at water station military point in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: A Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) military point in a water station in in rural Deir ez-Zor, Syria, is targeted by unknown assailants with machine guns. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water tanks and hurl stones at Palestinians in Hebron, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers throw stones at Palestinians in Hebron, West Bank, and destroy their water tanks and solar panels.

properties.Title: Police use stun grenades to disperse residents demanding water in Johannesburg, South Africa
properties.Description: Hundreds of residents blocking a road to demand water in the Lenansia South suburb of Johannesburg, South Africa, are dispersed when police launch stun grenades into the crowd.

properties.Title: Police fire tear gas and rubber bullets in protest over two-month water outage in Buffalo City, South Africa
properties.Description: Protesters use rocks and burning tires to block the N6 highway in Buffalo City, South Africa, demanding an end to water outages that have persisted for nearly two months. A police vehicle catches fire during the demonstration. Tear gas and rubber bullets are used to disperse the crowd.

properties.Title: Refugee camp food and water shortages spark violence in Kakuma, Kenya
properties.Description: A demonstration attended by thousands of refugees over food and water shortages at Kakuma refugee camp, Kenya, turns violent when stones are pelted at police and protesters attempt to storm the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees offices. Police throw tear gas canisters and fire live bullets to disperse the protesters. At least three refugees, as well as three police officers and a local

properties.Title: Students injured in violent clash during Indus River development in Sindh, Pakistan
properties.Description: A student protest against the construction of water channels to facilitate irrigation of Punjab land using Indus River water turns violent when police fire tear gas and baton charge the crowd. The students retaliate by throwing stones, breaking the windows of two police vehicles. Many students are injured in the clash.

properties.Title: Palestinian water tanks seized by Israeli forces in Bethlehem, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli forces operating in Khirbat an Nahlah, in Bethlehem, West Bank, seize water tanks and woodworking tools from a Palestinian-owned house. The windows of the house are smashed by Israeli settlers.

properties.Title: Shelling damages water supply system in occupied Nova Kakhovka, Ukraine
properties.Description: Ukrainian shelling damages a water supply system as well as power lines, a gas pipeline and four apartment buildings in occupied Nova Kakhovka, according to Russian sources.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers seize Palestinian water tanks and agricultural equipment in Salfit, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers target Palestinian-owned land in Salfit, West Bank, seizing water tanks and agricultural equipment and uprooting around 100 olive trees.

properties.Title: Woman murdered by armed group while fetching water in Atacora, Benin
properties.Description: An unidentified armed group slits the throat of a woman fetching water alone in the village of Nanagade in Atacora, Benin. Local residents find her body the following morning and alert police.

properties.Title: Clashes over water network reconnection injure police and minors in Ixtapaluca, Mexico
properties.Description: In Ixtapaluca, Mexico, over 200 Colonia Luis Cordova residents and members of the National Torch Movement clash with residents of Colonia El Mirador and municipal workers reconnecting the area to the water network. The violence erupts over claims the reconnection would reduce supply to other neighborhoods. Stones, bricks and other objects are thrown, injuring at least five police officers and seve
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. MEX101000, MEX101001

properties.Title: Houthi shelling damages water tank in Taizz, Yemen
properties.Description: Houthi forces fire mortars at a residential area in Taizz-Ash Shamasi, Yemen. The attack damages a house and a water tank.

properties.Title: Drone debris damages water supply infrastructure in Belgorod, Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces carry out 34 drone strikes across the Valuyskiy district of Belgorod, Russia. In Dolgoe, one civilian is injured and part of a water supply system is damaged, likely from falling debris.

properties.Title: Lebanese militias linked to Hezbollah shell water station in rural Homs, Syria
properties.Description: Lebanese clan militias linked to Hezbollah shell the Ain Al-Tanoura water station Homs, Syria, halting its operations. Casualties are unknown.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SYR142286; SNHR 2025

properties.Title: Russian shelling in the Zaporizhzhia region cuts water to 3,000 residents
properties.Description: Russian shelling in the Zaporizhzhia region cuts electricity and water to 3,000 residents in three frontline villages.

properties.Title: Houthi forces blockade village, steal water well solar panels and open fire in Harf Sufyan, Yemen
properties.Description: A large Houthi military crew blockades the village of Al Thamathima in Harf Sufyan district, Yemen, and seizes solar panels from water wells. They also destroy crops and shoot randomly at houses.

properties.Title: Gunmen open fire at water point, killing one and seriously injuring two in Lomelo, Kenya
properties.Description: Three gunmen open fire at a water point in Lomelo, Kenya, killing one woman and leaving two others with gunshot wounds. The gunmen are thought to be Pokot militia who have previously attacked people in the area. The motivation for the attack is unclear.

properties.Title: One killed, nine injured in BNP clash over embankment construction in Barisal, Bangladesh
properties.Description: A clash between two rival factions of the Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP) over the construction of an embankment by the Water Development Board leaves one dead and at least nine injured in Barisal, Bangladesh.

properties.Title: Water pipes set ablaze in demonstration over water tariff increase in Othaya, Kenya
properties.Description: Protesters storm the Othaya-Mukurweini Water Service Company compound in Othaya, Kenya, and set fire to water pipes in a demonstration over increased water tariffs. Police deploy tear gas to disperse the group.

properties.Title: Drone strike damages water infrastructure object in Kyrylivka, Ukraine, says Russia
properties.Description: According to Russian sources, a Ukrainian drone strike on the occupied town of Kyrylivka in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine, damages a water infrastructure object.

properties.Title: Woman shot dead, child injured fetching water in Turkana, Kenya
properties.Description: Women and children fetching water from the Suguta River, Turkana, are ambushed by armed assailants. One woman is shot dead, while another woman and a boy sustain injuries. The attackers, thought to be Pokot militia, flee the area when police are called.

properties.Title: One killed, several injured and water access restricted in militia attacks on villages in Sokoto State, Nigeria
properties.Description: A Sokoto militia attacks the villages of Aliya and Layinna in Sokoto State, Nigeria, killing one and injuring several others, and restricts access to water in the area.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. NIG41375, NIG41376

properties.Title: Israel halts electricity to a desalination plant in Gaza, cutting off water supplies
properties.Description: Israel cuts off the electricity supply to Gaza, affecting a desalination plant producing drinking water.

properties.Title: Tiv woman accused of polluting water in Awe, Nigeria, killed by Fulani pastoralist in machete attack
properties.Description: A young Fulani pastoralist attacks and kills a Tiv woman with a machete in Imon village in Awe, Nigeria, after accusing her of polluting the water where she was fishing.

properties.Title: Farms and water wells damaged in SAF airstrikes in Um Hajaleig, Sudan
properties.Description: Airstrikes carried out by Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) damage farms and water wells in the Um Hajaleig area of Al Fasher, Sudan.

properties.Title: Police response to water shortage protest results in severe injuries in Matadi, Democratic Republic of Congo
properties.Description: A "brutal" police response to a peaceful demonstration over a shortage of drinking water leaves a dozen people injured, some severely, in Matadi, Democratic Republic of Congo. The circumstances around the violence are unclear.

properties.Title: Farmers sabotage water pumping stations in Varzaneh, Iran, demanding water rights and access
properties.Description: Farmers in Varzaneh, Iran, rally at pumping stations serving nearby industries, demanding agricultural water rights and access to the Zayandeh Roud River. The protest escalates with stations set on fire and a water transmission pipeline cut.

properties.Title: Farmers protest for water rights in Isfahan, Iran; police use tear gas and fire warning shots
properties.Description: Farmers rally in Isfahan, Iran, demanding water rights and access to the Zayandeh Roud River for agriculture. Police disperse protesters with tear gas and warning shots. The demonstration is one of many in an ongoing dispute between farmers and officials over water rights and access in the area, with drought and river diversions threatening crops. Some protests have reportedly been met with brutal
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. IRN30843; National Council of Resistance of Iran 2025

properties.Title: Water rescue volunteer dies in arson attack on tent in Moscow Oblast, Russia
properties.Description: Unknown individuals set fire to a tent in a forest park in Dzerzhinskiy, Moscow Oblast, killing the man inside. The man had been volunteering with a group from a water rescue organization attempting to stop further construction work in the forest when his tent was targeted. The group accuses the local government of being behind the attack and a number of others.

properties.Title: US strikes on Water & Sanitation Foundation in Al Mansuriyah, Yemen, kill four and injure two
properties.Description: Four workers are killed and two injured following United States military strikes on the Water & Sanitization Foundation in Al Mansuriyah, Yemen.

properties.Title: Fishermen and pastoralists clash over watering hole in Wacham, Cameroon
properties.Description: Between April 1, 2025, and April 20, 2025, fishermen and pastoralists in Wacham, Cameroon, clash multiple times over the fishermen’s accusations that the pastoralists are letting their livestock destroy their fishing nets in a watering hole. Five fishermen are injured with knives in this period.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. CAO16781, CAO16803, CAO16825, CAO16840

properties.Title: Four injured in machete attack over water pans and grazing land in Mandera North, Kenya
properties.Description: Members of the Degodia community in Mandera North, Kenya, are ambushed by suspected Murule militia, who attack them with machetes and sticks during a dispute over water pans and grazing land. Four people are injured.

properties.Title: Two teenagers injured, water reservoir damaged in armed attack on civilians in Torodi, Niger
properties.Description: Armed militants suspected to be linked to JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group), attack civilians in Garbangou village in Torodi, Niger. Two teenagers are injured and the village water reservoir is damaged.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrikes on schools in Gaza City kill 30 people and destroy latrines and desalination units
properties.Description: On April 3, Israeli airstrikes on two schools in Gaza City kill 30 people, injure more than 70, and destroy five mobile latrines and a solar-powered desalination unit that were delivered and installed in October 2024 as part of an EU-funded project.

properties.Title: Russian drone strikes disrupt water supply in Dnipropetrovsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian drone strikes near Malomykhaylivka in Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, Ukraine, damage power lines and disrupt water supply.

properties.Title: Israeli warplanes target water desalination plant in east Gaza, Palestine
properties.Description: The Ghababin water desalination plant in east Gaza City, Palestine, is targeted by Israeli warplanes. Israeli artillery fire is reported in the same area.

properties.Title: JNIM militants attack multiple locations in Sourou, Burkina Faso; at least 100 dead, dozens abducted and water station destroyed
properties.Description: JNIM (Salafi-jihadist group) militants attack the areas of Di, Lanfiera and Guiedougou in Sourou, Burkina Faso. At least 100 people are killed, dozens are abducted, and a water station is destroyed.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. BFO13546, BFO13545, BFO13547

properties.Title: Protesters damage water canal during demonstration over death of person displaced by Bokaro steel plant, India
properties.Description: 5,000 people gather under the banner of Visthapit Apprentice Sangh, an association representing the interests of those displaced by the Bokaro steel plant, in a demonstration over the death of one of its members. They block roads, burn vehicles and damage a water canal.

properties.Title: Ukrainian drone strike damages water infrastructure object in Belgorod, Russia
properties.Description: A Ukrainian drone strike damages a water infrastructure object at an inactive enterprise in the village of Krasnyi Oktyabr in Belgorod, Russia.

properties.Title: Armed group shoots and kills water well guard in rural Homs, Syria
properties.Description: A water well guard in the village of Mahfura, Syria, is shot by an unidentified armed group for unknown reasons.

properties.Title: Attack on occupied Makiivka, Ukraine, causes water outages
properties.Description: According to Russian sources, Ukrainian forces carry out an attack (likely shelling) on the occupied city of Makiivka, Ukraine, leading to water outages in the area.

properties.Title: Unidentified hackers succeed in taking over a Norwegian dam's control systems, spilling millions of liters of water
properties.Description: In April 2025, unidentified hackers succeed in taking over a Norwegian dam's control systems, spilling millions of liters of water from the Lake Risevatnet Dam, near the city of Svelgen in Southwest Norway.

properties.Title: Police fire pepper spray during protest over water shortages in Paita, Peru
properties.Description: Over a hundred residents gather outside the offices of a water company in a protest led by the mayor of Paita, Peru, over water shortages disrupting supply to more than 180,000 people. The company invites the mayor inside to a meeting, but as residents attempt to follow they are stopped by riot police who fire pepper spray at them.

properties.Title: Karachi Bar Association president injured in targeted attack over Indus river activism in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Six unidentified men carry out a targeted attack on the president of the Karachi Bar Association in the Saddar area of Karachi, Pakistan. The victim is reportedly hospitalized for serious injuries. The attack is thought to be motivated by his opposition to plans for six new canals on the Indus River.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PAK150775; The News International 2025

properties.Title: Protesters torch water tanker after dumper truck hits motorcyclists in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Residents in Karachi, Pakistan, set fire to trucks and a water tanker after a dumper truck crashed into several motorcyclists. Three people are injured, and a firefighter sustains a head injury.

properties.Title: Israeli warplanes strike vehicle transporting water in An Nusayrat, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli warplanes strike a moving vehicle carrying water in An Nusayrat, Palestine. Injuries are reported but the number is unknown.

properties.Title: Man opens fire during protest over water shortages in Mexico City, Mexico
properties.Description: During a demonstration over residential water shortages in Mexico City, Mexico, a man fires shots into the air while a woman beats a protester. The man then opens fire at police officers before being arrested. There are conflicting reports on the incident, with some stating there was no clash with police.

properties.Title: Israeli airstrikes on an aid center in Gaza damages water and sanitation facilities
properties.Description: On April 12 an Israeli airstrike on an aid center in Gaza City damages water and sanitation facilities.

properties.Title: RSF shelling damages water sources at Abu Shouk IDP Camp, Sudan; 40 killed, over 100 wounded
properties.Description: Rapid Support Forces (RSF) and allied militia shell Abu Shouk IDP (Internally Displaced Persons) Camp in Al Fasher, Sudan, damaging water sources. 40 people are killed and more than 100 injured.

properties.Title: An Israeli airstrike hits a desalination plant in Deir El Balah, Gaza
properties.Description: An Israeli air strike on April 13 hits the Deir El Balah desalination facility.

properties.Title: Several injured in violent clash over water in Dwarkapura, India
properties.Description: Several people are injured when two groups clash in a dispute over water in Dwarkapura village, India.

properties.Title: Mob attacks two men accused of tampering with water pipeline in Kithimani, Kenya
properties.Description: A mob beats two men in Kithimani, Kenya, who are accused of tampering with a public water pipeline and illegally siphoning water. Police intervene and place the men in custody. The extent of the injuries is not reported.

properties.Title: Russian drone strike hits water supply vehicle in Stepnohirsk, Ukraine
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out a drone strike on a water supply vehicle in Stepnohirsk in Zaporizhzhia Oblast, Ukraine. Casualties are unknown.

properties.Title: Clash over children's water tanker dispute injures several in Indore, India
properties.Description: A dispute between children over a water tanker in Indore, India, escalates into a clash between members of the Indian National Congress and the Bharatiya Janata Party, leaving several people injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy irrigation pipelines in Tubas, West Bank
properties.Description: Israeli settlers in the village of Bardalah, Tubas, West Bank, destroy irrigation pipelines on Palestinian-owned land. On the same day Israeli settlers destroy parts of a water pipeline in the village of Khirbat Yarzah, Tubas, West Bank.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE72802, PSE72688

properties.Title: QSD member injured in armed attack on Thiban water station military post in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: A Syrian Democratic Forces (QSD) member is injured in an attack on a QSD military post in Thiban water station, Deir ez-Zor, Syria. The unidentified assailants were armed with rocket-propelled grenades and machine guns.

properties.Title: Municipal delegate assaulted over water shortages in Rincon de Tamayo, Mexico
properties.Description: Residents in Rincon de Tamayo, Mexico, beat and injure a municipal PVEM (Ecologist Green Party of Mexico) delegate over water shortages.

properties.Title: Two die in dispute over well water in Benue State village, Nigeria
properties.Description: Armed pastoralists, thought to be Fulani, attack and kill a woman and a Roman Catholic Church leader during a dispute over the use of community well water in Ayua village in Benu, Nigeria. Some residents flee the community in response.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage water line and tanks in Tubas, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers damage a water line and two Palestinian-owned water tanks near the Tayasir checkpoint in Tubas, Palestine.

properties.Title: Body of missing water shortage activist found in Amatitán, Mexico
properties.Description: The body of a woman activist threatened for her work against the water shortage in El Arenal is found near Guadalajara-Tepic highway in Amatitán, Mexico. She had been reported missing about 10 days prior to the discovery.

properties.Title: Farmer injured in protest over quarry pollution in Manchenahalli, India
properties.Description: Villagers, farmers and environmental committee members stage a protest in Manchenahalli, India, over the construction of a road for the purpose of transporting quarry stones, citing concerns around air and water pollution. Protesters throw stones at the quarry owner who retaliates by firing his revolver, injuring a farmer in his leg.

properties.Title: Militants ambush Niger military escorting Kandadji dam workers; 12 dead, six kidnapped in Tillaberi
properties.Description: The Niger military is ambushed in the vicinity of Dangala, Tillaberi, while escorting workers to the Kandadji dam in Niger. The militants kill 12 soldiers and kidnap six workers. The Islamic State – Sahel Province (ISSP) claims responsibility for the attack. The Kandadji dam is a key infrastructure for electricity generation and water management in Niger.

properties.Title: IRG shelling hits water well in Al Jabalayn, Yemen, injuring two civilians
properties.Description: Yemen's Internationally Recognized Government (IRG) fighters shell a water well in Al Jabalayn, Yemen, injuring two civilians who were grazing sheep nearby.

properties.Title: Clash over agricultural water in Umerkot District, Pakistan, kills two, injures five
properties.Description: Shar and Mari community members armed with guns clash in Umerkot District, Pakistan, over an agricultural water dispute. Two people are killed and five injured.

properties.Title: Landmine damages water tanker in Deir ez-Zor, Syria
properties.Description: A landmine planted by an unidentified armed group during a previous conflict detonates in southern Deir ez-Zor, Syria, damaging a water tanker.

properties.Title: Houthi snipers open fire on children fetching water from well in At Ta'iziyah, Yemen, injuring two
properties.Description: Houthi snipers shoot and injure two children, aged 14 and 12, as they fetch water from a well in At Ta'iziyah, Yemen.

properties.Title: Citizens and activists in Kandhkot, Pakistan, clash with police during protest over Indus River canal project
properties.Description: Citizens, together with political and religious activists, stage a sit-in in Kandhkot, Pakistan, to oppose plans to build six new canals along the Indus River. Police launch tear gas and baton charge the protesters, who throw stones at the police in retaliation. The tear gas causes some demonstrators to faint.

properties.Title: Lawyer sit-in over Indus River canals sparks violent clashes in Karachi, Pakistan
properties.Description: Lawyers protesting plans for six canals along the Indus River clash with police in Gulshan-i-Hadeed, Karachi, Pakistan. Protestors throw stones at police, injuring eight people, including two police officers and a lawyer. A police vehicle is also set on fire. Six demonstrators are arrested.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PAK151815, PAK151816

properties.Title: Israeli settlers cut water pipelines supplying homes in Al Awja, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers cut several water pipelines in Al Awja, Palestine, disrupting residential drinking water supply.

properties.Title: Shelling in Horlivka, Ukraine, kills one, injures six; water supply facility damaged
properties.Description: According to Russian sources, Ukrainian shelling in the occupied city of Horlivka, Ukraine, leaves one person dead, six injured and damages a water supply facility.

properties.Title: Police assault a journalist and committee chairman protesting corruption over Indus canal projects in Mirpur Sakro, Pakistan
properties.Description: A journalist and the committee chairman of Mirpur Sakro, Pakistan, are left badly injured by police after being arrested for leading protests against plans to construct six new canals on the Indus River. The journalist sustains fractures to his hands and arms and is taken to a nearby hospital for urgent medical treatment.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PAK151541; Khawaja 2025

properties.Title: Israeli settlers assault Palestinian family and damage water truck in Nablus, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settler rioters assault a Palestinian family in Nablus, Palestine. They also puncture the tires of a water transportation truck and destroy solar panels.

properties.Title: Refugees protest reduced access to basic needs at Kakuma camp, Kenya; police use tear gas, several injured
properties.Description: Refugees at Kakuma camp in Turkana, Kenya, stage a protest over reduced access to food, water and healthcare following a freeze on United States foreign aid. Police use tear gas to disperse the crowd. Several refugees are injured.

properties.Title: After a terror attack in Jammu and Kashmir, India restricts flows of Indus River water to Pakistan
properties.Description: In May 2025, after a terror attack kills 26 Hindu tourists in Indian-administered Jammu and Kashmir. Prime Minister Narendra Modi of India restricts flows to Pakistan through two dams on the Chenab River causing unprecedented drops in water levels. These actions are outside of the agreements established by the Indus Water Treaty, a treaty that both countries have honored since 1960, and Pakistan r
properties.Sources: Ganai and Khajuria 2025; Ahmed et al. 2025

properties.Title: Demonstrators cut water supply in Nashik, India, protesting alleged Jal Jeevan Mission corruption
properties.Description: Elgar Kashtakari Sanghatana members halt the supply of water from Vaitarna Dam in Nashik, India, while protesting the implementation of the Jal Jeevan Mission. They claim officials are negligent and that contractors are profiting from the scheme.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers damage water pipelines near Jericho, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers damage Palestinian water pipelines and solar panels near Jericho in West Bank, Palestine. Tents are also targeted, and the settlers seize 70 sheep.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy solar panels and water pumps in Khirbet al Deir, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy solar panels and water pumps belonging to Palestinians in Khirbet al Deir in West Bank, Palestine.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy water pipeline supplying water to Palestinian communities near Khirbat Yarzah, Palestine
properties.Description: A water pipeline near Khirbat Yarzah in West Bank, Palestine, is destroyed by Israeli settlers, disrupting water supply to nearby Palestinian communities.

properties.Title: Water wells lose only power source after refrigeration unit damaged in Israeli strike in Khan Yunis, Palestine
properties.Description: A solar-powered refrigeration unit is damaged after being struck by Israeli artillery in the village of Qizan an-Najjar in Khan Yunis, Palestine. The damage disrupts the agricultural sector as the unit was the only source of power to water wells in the area.

properties.Title: Strike debris damages water supply infrastructure after Ukrainian drones shot down in Belgorod Oblast, Russia
properties.Description: Water supply infrastructure is damaged following Ukrainian drone strikes across the Belgorodskiy district of Belgorod Oblast, Russia.

properties.Title: Remnant landmine in water well kills one and injures another in Idlib, northwestern Syria
properties.Description: One civilian is killed and another injured after a remnant landmine detonates in a water well in rural Idlib, Syria. The landmine, planted by former regime members, exploded while the victims were cleaning the well.

properties.Title: Taliban governor shoots father and son over water dispute in Sang-e Atash, Afghanistan; victim in critical condition
properties.Description: A father and son are wounded after being shot by the Taliban deputy district governor over a water dispute in the village of Sang-e Atash in Takhar, Afghanistan. One victim is hospitalized in critical condition.

properties.Title: Police officers in Nentón, Guatemala, targeted by at least 50 armed individuals in dispute over water resources
properties.Description: At least 50 armed individuals target eight police officers carrying out a judicial proceeding relating to the reinstatement of water at Chacula treatment plant in Nenton, Guatemala. One officer and a local community leader are beaten and detained by the group. The incident is connected to ongoing conflict between the El Aguacate and Chacula communities over the use of land and water resources.

properties.Title: The city of Port Sudan, Sudan loses access to water after attacks on fuel supplies
properties.Description: Attacks by the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) in Port Sudan, Sudan leave the city without the diesel fuel needed to power groundwater pumps for the water supply, raising the price of water from vendors and cutting supplies.

properties.Title: Artillery fire destroys hospital water tanker, disrupts patient water supply in Al Fasher, Sudan
properties.Description: A UNICEF water tanker stationed at Saudi Hospital in Al Fasher, Sudan, is destroyed by artillery fire during clashes between Rapid Support Forces (RSF) militia and Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF). Around 1,000 severely ill patients are left nearly without drinking water.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. SUD35257; Arab News 2025

properties.Title: Military forces armed with machine guns open fire on water station workers in rural Aleppo, Syria
properties.Description: Syrian military forces armed with machine guns open fire at workers maintaining a water station in rural Aleppo, forcing them to flee the site. The water station is damaged in the attack but the workers escape without injury.

properties.Title: Nine injured in BNP clash over canal lease in Khulna, Bangladesh
properties.Description: Two factions of the Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP) clash with bricks in Chalna, Khulna, during a dispute over a canal lease. Nine people, including three police officers, are injured.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian-owned water pipelines and puncture water tanker tires near Tubas, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers destroy Palestinian-owned water pipelines and puncture the tires of a water tanker in Al Mayita village near Tubas, Palestine.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE73868, PSE73868

properties.Title: Israeli settlers attack water well and torch guard’s vehicle in Burqah, Palestine
properties.Description: Israeli settlers storm the town of Burqah in West Bank, Palestine, and attack a water well. They set fire to a number of Palestinian-owned vehicles, including the vehicle belonging to the well’s security guard.
properties.Sources: Raleigh et al. 2010 ID. PSE73873; Kestler-D’Amours, Marsi, and McCready 2025

properties.Title: A water tanker is attacked during a dispute over access to water in Knysna, South Africa
properties.Description: A water tanker is attacked during protests over disruptions of water supply in Knysna, South Africa. Water was cut off after a main water pump broke, leaving extensive areas without water.

properties.Title: Violent protests over plans to divert Indus River water to Pakistan kill at least two and set a house on fire
properties.Description: At least two people are killed and other injured in massive protests in Sindh province, Pakistan over plans to divert Indus River water to Punjab. Protesters also attack and burn down the local minister's house.

properties.Title: Riot police beat indigenous people protesting water outages in Tabasco, Mexico
properties.Description: Indigenous people from Tamulté de las Sábanas in Tabasco, Mexico, block a federal highway in protest of power and water grid failures. Riot police push and beat them in response.

properties.Title: Sabotage of electricity transformers in Zanzibar, Tanzania, results in severe water supply disruption
properties.Description: In June 2025, four electricity transformers are vandalized and stolen across several sites in Zanzibar, Tanzania, including water distribution facilities, resulting in severe disruptions to water supply in surrounding areas. According to Zanzibar’s Ministry of Water, Energy and Minerals, the incidents are deliberate acts of sabotage designed to impede the government's effort to provide essential s

properties.Title: An Iranian missile strike targeting Israel intelligence headquarters damages a nearby wastewater treatment plant
properties.Description: An Iranian missile strike targeting Mossad, Israel's intelligence headquarters, damages a nearby wastewater treatment plant in Herzliya.

properties.Title: An Israeli missile attack on Iran ruptures a major water pipeline, cutting water to thousands of people
properties.Description: An Israeli missile attack on Iran ruptures a major water pipeline, cutting water to thousands of people in Tajrish, northern Tehran

properties.Title: Russian shelling on infrastructure in Sumy, Ukraine, disrupts water supply and injures three
properties.Description: Russian forces shell civilian infrastructure in the city of Sumy, Ukraine, damaging a water intake which leads to water outages in surrounding areas. Three people are injured in the attack.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers seize a spring in the West Bank and damage a water system that provides water to 30 Palestinian villages
properties.Description: Israeli settlers seize the Ein Samiya spring in the West Bank and vandalize Palestinian pumping stations that supply water to 30 villages in the Ramallah area, diverting the water to a nearby pool.

properties.Title: Israeli settlers in the West Bank accused of damaging a Palestinian water system
properties.Description: In the West Bank Israeli settlers are seen breaking a water pipline from the Ein Samiyah spring that supplies water to around 110,000 people. The water system staff were able to get the supply back online.

properties.Title: Access to water for up to 80,000 people in Gaza is cut after Israel issues displacement order
properties.Description: Israeli authorities issue displacement orders for two neighbourhoods in Khan Younis, Gaza, where up to 80,000 people had been living, cutting their access to the Al Satar reservoir – a critical hub for distributing piped water from Israel.

properties.Title: Ukraine strikes military water pipeline in Vladivostok, Russia
properties.Description: Ukrainian forces strike a water pipeline supplying Russian military facilities in Vladivostok, in Russia's far east, cutting off drinking water to garrisons in the area.

properties.Title: Israeli missile strikes a water distribution site in Gaza, killing six children and injuring 17 others
properties.Description: An Israeli missile strikes a water distribution site in the al-Nuseirat refugee camp in Gaza, killing six children and injuring 17 others.

properties.Title: Russian drone strikes on Kupiansk, Ukraine, leave city without water
properties.Description: Russian forces carry out airstrikes on Kupiansk, Ukraine, in a prolonged attack on infrastructure in the area. A water pipeline is targeted, leaving the city without water.

properties.Title: Two injured in protest over water outages in eMalahleni, South Africa
properties.Description: Two people are injured during a protest over water outages in eMalahleni, South Africa, due to broken pipes serving the area. A woman is engulfed in flames and thrown into the air after a motorist, blinded by smoke from burning tires, runs her over as she crosses the road. Meanwhile, another motorist is assaulted by a man who accuses him of bumping his vehicle.

properties.Title: Man shot dead fetching water from a pump in The Bahamas
properties.Description: A man fetching water from a pump in The Bahamas is shot dead by an unknown assailant in a vehicle.

properties.Title: Water pipes and meters targeted in Lydenburg, South Africa
properties.Description: A number of businesses and households in Lydenburg, South Africa, have their water pipes and meters stolen or tampered with by unknown individuals.

properties.Title: Rapid Support Forces destroys $1 million water lab in Khartoum, Sudan
properties.Description: Sudan's Rapid Support Forces (RSF) destroys a water laboratory worth $1 million in Khartoum, Sudan, official say. The lab is used to analyze river and well water and is the main water analysis facility in the state.

properties.Title: Russian attack on Lozova, Ukraine, disrupts water supply, kills one and injures 10
properties.Description: Russian forces attack the city of Lozova, Ukraine, targeting critical infrastructure which disrupts water supply. Residential areas are also hit, leaving one dead and 10 others, including children, injured.

properties.Title: Man shot while fetching water in Liloan, Philippines
properties.Description: A construction worker fetching water for his workplace is shot in the neck by a man on a shooting spree in Liloan, Philippines. The suspect later dies from a self-inflicted gunshot wound.

properties.Title: Resident clashes with maintenance worker over water shortage in Ghaziabad, India
properties.Description: A fight breaks out between a resident of a high-rise housing complex in Ghaziabad, India, and one of it's maintenance workers during a dispute over a water shortage. The resident reportedly approached the worker to complain, leading to a heated argument. The resident pushes the worker, who retaliates by punching him in the face and continues the assault until witnesses intervene.

properties.Title: Pakistani Army Chief warns India of missile strikes on dam if built in breach of Indus Treaty
properties.Description: At a black-tie dinner in the United States, Pakistani Army Chief Asim Munir is said to have warned that Pakistan would retaliate against any perceived violations of the Indus Waters Treaty, saying a dam built by India would be destroyed "with 10 missiles", according to several attendees at the event.

properties.Title: Occupiers cut off water supply to Donetsk residents who refuse Russian documents
properties.Description: Occupiers in Donetsk, Ukraine, cut off water supply to residents who refuse Russian documents, declaring their homes as "ownerless".

properties.Title: Poland thwarts major cyberattack on critical water infrastructure
properties.Description: Poland's deputy prime minister reports that a major cyberattack on critical infrastructure that would have left a large Polish city without water has been thwarted.

properties.Title: 11-year-old girl attacked while fetching water at roadside tap in Bahawalpur, Pakistan
properties.Description: An 11-year-old girl fetching water from a roadside tap in Bahawalpur, Pakistan, is attacked and raped by a man thought to be responsible for several other attacks on young girls in the area. The suspect later dies by gunshot wound during a police raid in which the suspect's accomplices open fire on officers, reportedly shooting the suspect in the process.

properties.Title: Sabotage of borehole leads to water outages in South Corfu, Greece
properties.Description: Unknown individuals use axes to cut the power supply cables to a borehole in South Corfu, Greece, leaving residents of surrounding communities without water.

properties.Title: Doctors Without Borders report an attack on Gaza citizens waiting for a water truck
properties.Description: The non-governmental aid organization, Docotors Without Borders, reports that at least two people are shot and wounded, including one child, while waiting for a water truck in Khan Yonis in the Gaza strip. Water and food distribution sites have repatedly been places of vulnerability for Palestinians who have few other options for acquiring basic necessities during the ongoing war with Israel.

properties.Title: Russian missile strike destroys water intake facility in Trostianets, Ukraine
properties.Description: A Russian missile strike on Trostianets in Sumy Oblast, Ukraine, destroys the city's water intake facility, leaving around 100 residents without water.

properties.Title: Police strike protesters with rubber bullets during demonstration over water shortages in Johannesburg, South Africa
properties.Description: Residents of Coronationville in Johannesburg, South Africa, stage a protest over water shortages which they say have been ongoing for eight years. Police disperse the crowd with teargas and shoot several people with rubber bullets.

properties.Title: Security forces injured during protests over drinking water quality in Basra, Iraq
properties.Description: Residents of Basra, Iraq, stage protests over several days over poor drinking water quality due to the flow of saltwater into the city. They block roads with burning tires and scuffle with security forces, leaving several personall injured. Severe drought in Iraq has affected the flow of the Tigris and Euphrates rivers, allowing saltwater from the Shatt al-Arab to extend further into the city.

properties.Title: Six injured during protest over water shortages in Antananarivo, Madagascar
properties.Description: Anti-government protesters march through Antananarivo, Madagascar, in a mass demonstration over power and water shortages. Security forces use armored vehicles to charge the protesters who respond by throwing stones. At least four people are injured by rubber bullets and two others by stun grenades. In nearby Anosibe, a man is left unconscious after police chase and severely beat him.

properties.Title: Russia launches large-scale attack on Ukrainian infrastructure, killing a child and disrupting water supply
properties.Description: Over several consecutive nights, Russian forces carry out a large-scale attack on Ukraine, using cruise missiles and suicide drones to target the country's energy infrastructure. Electricity and water supplies are lost in parts of Kharkiv and Bilhorod-Dnistrovskyi. In Zaporizhzhia, a child is killed and the Dnipro hydroelectric plant is closed as a precaution.

properties.Title: Residents punch and beat firefighters due to lack of water in Manila, Philippines
properties.Description: Residents of a burning building punch two volunteer firefighters and beat them with wooden planks in Manila, Philippines. They are angry that there is no water available and that they will have to wait for a supply to arrive.
